Smaller than I expected but seems decent quality. Haven't wired it up yet so can't say much else.

This thing is awesome! I've used the soundfreaq soundkick for work for a couple of years and occasionally I bust it out at home but it's better suited for beating out ambient noise (for audibility's sake) than it is for casual home listening. I wanted more, and I got it. The fluance isn't really a good buy for portability, in my opinion. This is for a technology affluent sort who wants good sound they can tie to their smart phone. The unit is surprisingly heavy, which ends up being a good thing. Bass is substantial without being muddy, which I deeply appreciated after too much time spent with bose and Sony units at friends houses. It's sound has a difficult to place warmth that I imagine comes from the heavy wood enclosure. Highs are clear without being tinny, and mids are presented well. I personally believe that if mid range presentation is something you are deeply concerned with, single unit Bluetooth speakers will consistently disappoint you. Get something more akin to a stereo. With all of that said, I strongly suspect you will enjoy the sound of this unit. I've thrown everything at this thing, and it consistently sounds amazing. I've played techno, heavy metal, jazz, bossa nova, acoustic players like Andy McKee, and more others than I care to mention and it adds listening value to all of them. I don't want to understate this. Koop, the dillinger escape plan, aphex twin, jars of clay and Eric clapton all sounded awesome. That's a tonal diversity I'm not accustomed to with anything other than my sennheiser headphones that cost considerably more. I would shop around a little more if portability is a major selling point for you, but on all other points I urge you to get this unit. It is a delightful tonal surprise at this price and I'm thrilled with my purchase.

Overall, I enjoyed the story. Some of the details/actions were not consistent with the time period. Also, while I think flawed characters make for much better stories, there are better ways to write in the "flaws" than having an antagonist point them out at every opportunity. Also, the attempt at romantic tension between the heorine and the male character grated on my nerves. The male character was presented, first to last, as an insufferrable jerk, though the implication was that he's really just misunderstood. He's being an ass to push her away because he really wants to be close to her but can't for reaon xxx.... SMDH. Very irritating. This old saw is too reminiscent of soap opera sterotypes and bad dramas. If the reader can get past these issues, and the author can learn to avoid these sterotype pitfalls, future books by this author could be very promising. I think the author could really develope a rich fictional world that would keep many mystery readers turning pages. Just, please, drop the annoying romance sterotypes, there are better ways to develop intimacy, meaningful and realistic connections, between characters. (A little more research on the crime element of the time period might help too).

This is the first Sharon Shinn book I've ever read, but I've heard good things about her other books (Archangel, Jovah's Angel) so I decided to give it a try. I liked the setting, but I do wish some things had been explained in a bit more detail, like the Moonchildren. I especially liked the use of words from "our" languages, altered to reflect the passage of time. It's a detail many "colony of earth" sci-fi writers ignore or bungle. I can't say the mystery enthralled me, I figured the second biggest mystery about half-way through the book. The "whodunnit" part was weak, but this book is worth reading purely for the philosophy of the Triumphantes. It's a believable world, and the characters are well-drawn. I don't regret buying it.
One of the best Clint Eastwood movies of all time! Enjoyed it again for the third time.

This is a true ergonomic mouse. I work with computers for more than 10 hrs a day, previously I was using a logitech mouse but there was wrist pain which I started feeling. So I searched for a better one and found out this one. I should say this is a good find as I am using this one for around 4 months and no sign of that wrist pain. Also the buttons are very comfortable with an additional window button which comes very handy in day to day use. Battery wise also it is good. I always keep it on, since it has auto off battery saving feature it runs good for more than 3 months with couple of AA batteries. So you have to be very careful while putting it in the computer and taking it out, otherwise it can become like mine (see the last picture).

This is by far the BEST dog toy I have ever invested in. My 125 lb Rottweiler/Mastiff mix LOVES to play soccer and I was having to buy a soccer ball for him every few weeks because he would deflate it and then shred it to pieces. This ball has been great for him...he loves this ball even more than soccer balls. The grooves on it make it so easy for him to catch/fetch & the best part is it's heavy duty foam and will not deflate. The only reason I'm giving it 4 stars is because the 1st one I bought only lasted about 4 months of heavy use before the thread/seams started coming apart. Eventually it broke down and the canvas covering came off exposing the foam and had to be thrown out. We are now on ball #2 and when this one gets torn up we will get another. These last so much longer than any other ball I have bought for my rough player.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but this little thing is fantastic. My kitten goes absolutely nuts chasing it around. The auto shutoff is clutch so she doesn't overdo it. Way better than pricier toys I've tried.

Ordered this for my Kindle last night and it was delivered instantly, no issues with the download at all. The cover looked great on my Paperwhite and the formatting was clean, no weird spacing or typos that I noticed right off the bat. Started reading during my lunch break and honestly didn't want to put it down. Lindsay and Ty's second chance thing hooked me pretty fast. I've read a couple of the earlier McGreer books and this one might be my favorite so far. The ranch setting is done well without being over the top. Got the digital version on sale which made it even better. Already planning to grab the next one. Definitely recommend if you're into contemporary romance with cowboys.
Arrived two days early in perfect condition, no dents or scuffs. Unboxed it and was immediately impressed by the solid build and how light it feels. Great first impression.

Picked this up for our annual Halloween dinner party and honestly wasn't sure what to expect for the price. It fit my six-person table perfectly with just enough hang on the sides. My one complaint is that it arrived super creased from being folded in the packaging, so I had to steam it before setting the table. After a wash on gentle cycle it held up fine with minimal fading. Overall a solid buy that exceeded what I paid for it.

Secret Smile. Rate ***** A well acted and directed probably made for television as it was presented in 2 parts. I have not read the original novel by the now established Nicci French from which the script was adapted. The quality of the transfer is very good as also the sound track. It has a very exciting finale after all the jealousy, greed and revenge not to mention the innocent deaths. I was one of the first to purchase Trakdots when they initially came out, then quickly learned (a) there is virtually no user support, and (b) the software was horribly flawed. Since then, the company has paid buyers to ship the units back for a "major software update," but...getting my two units back has been a nightmare. I shipped them to the vendor, as directed, in early November, yet here I am in late January, STILL trying to get my supposedly-updated TrakDots back. Endless emails back and forth, lots of "We'll overnight them right away" promises, but nothing. If it was possible to give negative stars on a review, I would. TrakDots are a complete waste of money. * * * * * 01.30.14 FOLLOW UP * * * * * Finally got two units back. Notice I didn't say "my units." In spite of assurances we'd be getting our originals back, I was sent two open box returns that someone else dumped. The security seals on both boxes were torn open; the serial number on one unit had been completely removed (rendering it incapable of being activated) with the "Warranty void if damaged" seal torn in half. One of my two originals had yet to be activated (read: brand new, unused). Now, I'm holding someone else's rejects. * * * * * 02.11.14 FOLLOW UP * * * * * After circling back to TrakDot *again,* was sent two more replacement units. These did not appear to have been opened, however...neither one would power on. Tried multiple batteries, to no avail. Both units were dead boxes. This time, I cc'd (Harry Streck, President of GlobaTrac) on my email to Customer Service, asking for a full refund of my entire purchase price, including the pre-paid first year of service for each unit. I like the bright blue coloring with the sliver and gold since it makes it look more robotic. Batman is the perfect size! We did receive it from Mattel as part of a Rate and Play review but it has been one of the most played with toys we have reviewed!

If your using Tidy Cat your not using the best. We where faithful Tidy Cat purchasers for over 10 years then after taking up our carpets to go back to the hardwood underneath we where shocked by how much litter was in and under the carpet, yes we vacuum. Within a week of having hardwood floors again we where shocked how much litter was all over the house, not to mention in the bed - ughh. Also we found that Tidy Cat wasn't clumping as well as it use to and we were always fishing out tiny clumps too. Well it was time to do something about the mess so we decided to try a different litter. WOW if you have never used Cat's Pride Fresh and Light litter you have to try it! Tidy Cat is like little balls, Cat's Pride is not. Cat's Pride is a very light litter which is a big plus, no strong scent and clumps great! We have 2 covered litter boxes side by side one still with Tidy and one with Cat's Pride. I put a 4' x 5' piece of astro truf (outdoor type) in front of the boxes and still have to sweep Tidy off the hardwood in that room, hallway and adjoining rooms but no Cat's Pride. I hope you find this review helpful and think if you just give Cat's Pride Fresh and Light a try you will never buy any other brand again!

This is only the second dystopian novel I've read so I don't have much to compare it to in this genre. What I do know is that I thoroughly enjoyed following the story of Raine, Jem and Leif. While there are a few lighthearted, even romantic aspects, there also many dark, heartbreaking moments and more than a few surprises. While I am by nature a voracious reader, I will admit to the habit of skipping sections of books when the story drags even a little. I did not skip sections in this book, and while a few other readers commented on a slow beginning, personally I did not find that to be the case. Clearly the story ends on a note meant to set the reader up for the next book in the series. This can be tricky because the author needs to leave the reader feeling satisfied with where they've ended this part of the story, and yet wanting more. The author has accomplished that with this book, and I can honestly say I look forward to learning what the future holds for Raine. Happy to recommend Kindreds: An Alliance of Bloods.

I am extremely large-busted and was in search of a "miracle" bra to solve several problems I have with most bras. 1) My everyday bras with underwire were always poking, chafing and causing a rash. 2) Exercise was difficult since no bra supported me well enough to prevent bounce. 3) I needed a bra to sleep in for extra support but didn't want to buy a ton of bras just for that purpose. The Fiona bra has come closer than any other I've tried at meeting my needs. The material is soft and absorbent with no underwire, and yet I feel better supported (for everyday wear) than I did in a Bali underwire bra. It moves with my body, absorbs sweat, and doesn't chafe or poke me anywhere, so it's very comfortable to sleep in. It's also supportive enough for low-impact exercise; however, it is NOT supportive enough to prevent bounce while jogging or during other high-impact exercise. Maybe that's just not a possibility for me and someone a little smaller would have better luck. I should mention that I'm wearing this bra in size 44DD and that it's actually a little small in the cup area. Fortunately, it launders well. I haven't found any change in the bra's size or shape from putting it through my washer and dryer. One other negative is that the bra looks like a sports bra with wide straps and seams running along the sides. This is fine except for the fact that it makes it a little difficult to wear the bra under all tops as an everyday bra. Depending on the cut of the top and the material, either the straps or the seams or both will sometimes show through. This is annoying but not enough of an issue to make me stop using this bra for daily wear. Overall, I find the bra to be excellent for my full figure. Although it's not quite my "miracle" bra, I still plan to buy more of these.

I recently lost my Contigo mug like this and started using a random back-up mug I already had laying around the kitchen. After a few days, I noticed that I'd finished my coffee hours earlier than usual every single morning with the back-up mug. Normally I sip on my coffee until it's nearly lunchtime, but now I was finishing it on my morning commute. The next morning I was thinking about this and realized exactly what the cause was: My Contigo mug kept my coffee so hot that I could not take big gulps of it and it took me until 11 am to get through it. The back-up mug cooled so quickly that I was gulping my coffee by the time I got in the car. After less than a week I ordered a new Contigo and I will be a customer for life now. This mug will keep your coffee pipingly, tongue-burningly hot for hours when sealed. Like others have said, I actually leave the lid off for a couple of minutes after I pour and blow on it to bring it down to a drinkable temperature because I know once I seal the lid it's staying that hot. The more of the coffee you drink the more it will start to lose its heat (because you're replacing hot coffee with room-temperature air with every sip, which is cooling the remaining coffee). But the cooling happens slowly enough that the only time the liquid inside of it really gets *cold* is when the cup is less than half full and the snap lid is open, which is letting a lot of air circulate inside the cup. If you leave it full, it will stay *hot*--not warm--for 7 hours.

The middle was still not cooked, I think I went all the way to 4 minutes and it still was not cooked in the middle, So I used a glass cot cut out the middle a little bigger than the uncooked part and put that back in the microwave for 1 minute and it finally got cooked. Put the middle back in and the dogs didn't mind at all. The icing was thin and the amount was small so I stretched it with some Greek yogurt, again, the dogs didn't mind. Since all this is silliness, it's up to you if you care about how it looks. The dogs when given permission eat every last crumb and they loved it. I might buy it again, this time I just had neck surgery and the oven was broke. Slaughter really knows how to dig into small-town Georgia politics and make you feel every bit of the tension between these characters. The stuff with Lena's backstory just wrecked me, I had to put the book down a couple times because it got so heavy. What I love about this series is that nobody is completely good or bad, and the reveals actually make sense instead of coming out of nowhere. The pacing drags slightly in the middle during some of the procedural stuff but picks right back up. For the price of a coffee you get a genuinely intense read that sticks with you. Already grabbed the next one.

My vet quoted me over $500 for a dental cleaning on my senior beagle, so I figured I'd try this first. Sprinkled it on her food twice a day and within about five weeks the brown buildup on her molars was noticeably flaking off. Her breath improved too. I'd absolutely recommend this to anyone with an older dog or a pup that won't let you brush their teeth. Way cheaper than anesthesia and she actually gets excited at mealtime.

McEwan's courtroom stuff is genuinely fascinating here, the legal reasoning behind Fiona's decisions had me completely hooked. But then the plot shifts to that weird domestic situation with her husband and the teenage boy, and it kind of lost me. The two halves don't really connect the way they should. I kept waiting for something bigger to tie it together and it never quite happened. That said, I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who enjoys legal drama or ethics-heavy fiction. If you're already a McEwan fan you'll probably appreciate the prose even when the story drags. Just don't go in expecting Amsterdam-level tightness. It's a quick read at under 250 pages, which honestly helps, any longer and I think the pacing issues would've been harder to forgive.

Looked to be good quality- bought it for the good price too- just needed one (for a missing one) but got two just in case. It was to short and did not make contact in order to turn the light bulb on- I tried modifying both to make them work- no luck, so needing to buy the same adapter from a different maker at this point. I ruined the ones I got but I suppose that's okay- they are cheap. Just wish I had read the other 1 star reviews then I would have known this adapter wouldn't work for me either.
These were priced right as an add on to another order. Have not used them yet so do not know quality.

Arrived two days early in sturdy retail packaging with no dents. Plugged it in and everything paired up immediately. Build quality feels surprisingly solid for the price. Way cheaper than the OEM version and works just as well.
Got this for a steal and it's been solid for gym days. No complaints at all for the price.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this plush is way bigger and softer than I imagined. My niece carries it everywhere now. Totally worth it.

Picked this up for my daughter's fifth grade reading list and ended up finishing it myself in one sitting. The subject matter is heavy for a kids' book, but it's handled in a way that sparks real conversation without being graphic or overwhelming. My daughter had tons of questions afterward, which I think is exactly the point. I'd definitely recommend this for ages 10 and up, especially for parents who want to read alongside their kids and discuss. Teachers could build an entire unit around it. Only reason I'm giving four stars instead of five is that the ending felt abrupt and left us wanting more closure. Still, it's one of those books that sticks with you long after you put it down. Glad it's still assigned in schools.

Wish our two cats took to these better. One sniffs and walks away, the other will reluctantly eat a couple if they're crushed into her wet food. The texture seems really dry and crumbly compared to other brands we've tried. After sitting in the bowl for an hour they go stale fast. Disappointing because the ingredient list looked decent. Still on the hunt for a hairball remedy both of them will actually enjoy.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy mailer with no damage. Popped it in right away and the picture quality blew me away.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with zero damage. Pulled it out and the build quality immediately impressed me. My kid hasn't put it down since.
This is a fairly good white dress shirt, but it's quality is not quite as good as what I usually buy. After not much use, the collar lost its crease.
Arrived quickly in a sturdy box with no damage. Opened it up and was impressed by the detail on each piece. Really solid little set.
Perfect for BBQs. Napkins stay put and everything looks neat on the patio.

Got this for my daughter's birthday since she's obsessed with this character right now. It's decent for the price but don't expect anything amazing. The stitching on mine was fine, though one eye sits slightly higher than the other which gives it a quirky look. My kid doesn't care at all and sleeps with it every night. The fabric is soft but pretty thin, and after a couple of washes it's already looking a bit faded. For a young child who just wants their favorite character in plush form, this does the job. I wouldn't recommend it as a gift for an older kid or a collector though. The quality just isn't there for that. Fine for everyday rough-and-tumble play, but temper your expectations.
Been using this case for six months now and it's held up great with zero scratches.

I bought this to clone the HD from my MacBook Pro before I installed a new HD in it. I put a new 500GB Hitachi HD into this case and cloned by existed 160GB HD onto this using Carbon Copy Cloner. I had to make sure the drive and cable were never touched during the process, or else the drive would lose the connection. I eventually got everything working. It is just very temperamental. But for the price, I am glad I got it. It won't be used on a regular basis.

Ordered this as a birthday gift for my husband and it arrived two days earlier than expected, which was a nice surprise. The packaging was solid, no bent corners or dinged edges like I've gotten from other online retailers. Book came sealed in shrink wrap with a cardboard backing, so it was in pristine condition straight out of the box. He tore into it immediately and hasn't put it down since dinner. The cover art is even better in person and the pages have a good weight to them, not that flimsy paperback feel. I flipped through the first chapter myself and honestly might borrow it when he's done. Really impressed with both the physical quality and the story itself. Would absolutely order from this seller again.
Awesome toolset here. Purchased it to have all wrenches and sockets in one place and this does the job perfectly, not to mention the great brand name. Highly recommended.
I've read everything this author has put out and usually love their stuff, but this one felt like a rough draft. The plotlines barely connect and the whole thing just drags. Skip it.

Arrived quickly but the box was pretty beat up and the parts were loose inside. Setup was straightforward and it feels sturdy enough. Doesn't wobble at all. Just wish the seat had more padding for longer sessions.
Gets the job done but the bulky shape makes it uncomfortable to hold. Works okay for quick use but I wouldn't buy again.
Yes, one of mine was delivered with the hole sewn shut in the inside. Took a razor knife and opened it, no problem. Filled the bags with rice. Took about 20 pounds.

Picked these up on sale to build out my first home theater setup and honestly I'm blown away by what you get for the money. I'm running four of them as surrounds and fronts paired with a mid-range Pioneer receiver, and the clarity is honestly ridiculous for speakers this small. Dialog is crisp and music sounds way more full than I expected. My buddy spent three times as much on a Polk setup and honestly can't tell the difference when we A/B tested them. The build quality feels solid too, heavy for their size and the finish looks way more expensive than it is. If you're on the fence about budget speakers, just get them. You'd have to spend significantly more to notice any real improvement in sound.

Rand Al'Thor is the Dragon Reborn, destined to defeat the Dark One and give his life to save the world while he destroys it in his madness. He sets off alone, searching for his own identity in hopes of proving what he is to himself. He searches for Callandor, the Sword That Is Not a Sword, the Sword That Cannot Be Touched. No hand but the true Dragon Reborn can break its wards and draw it. But, as with everything, it is not that simple. There is always a challenge and it is a battle to the finish that threatens to send him over the edge of sanity. Robert Jordan continues his tale with the third installment of The Wheel of Time, better still than the Great Hunt. With four dimensional characters, a vivid vision and the most complicated plot of any story, Jordan transcends the fantastic, discovering a tale truer than any text book, a story for all stories, a legend for all time.
Perfect size for storing an adult mummy bag in an uncompressed state

Got this tie super fast and it came in a nice little box, not just a plastic bag like I was expecting. Pulled it out and was honestly blown away. The silver color is sharp and the fabric feels way more expensive than it was. Wore it to a wedding last weekend and got several compliments. Really solid purchase.

Had this running nonstop for almost two years now behind my entertainment center and it hasn't skipped a beat. Survived a nasty storm season without letting anything through to my TV and receiver. Solid metal housing still looks new. Honestly forgot it was there until I needed to rearrange cables last week. No regrets.
Great for carpet stairs, though not as great for wood stairs. Tends to scratch them a bit with the plastic casing for the brush. Extremely happy though how it picks up dog hair so easily:).
Decent workout but the camera angles are frustrating. Way too many shots of the class when I need to watch the teacher's form.
Arrived two days early, boxed really well with no dents. Unwrapped them and was blown away by how sleek they look. Can't wait to get these mounted up.

I only gave this 4 stars because of the installation struggle I had with the post installation. Putting in on the mobo wasn't that bad at all (I had to take it out, but it was fine.) The problem I had (and might have could prevented) was putting the usb connecters and 4-pin connector on the board which were all underneath the fan. It fits nice in My Lanbox Lite with just enough room between my fan and the PSU. I was originally gettting the Blue Orb II, but on the day my item was suppose to be delivered, I got an email from Amazon stating that the item was out of stock and they had to refund me. Anyway, the fan looks, sounds, and cools ALOT better that the stock intel fan that I originally had there. I have a Intel Core 2 Quad Q6600. With Stock, temps were 44c idle, as high as mid 60s load. With this, 36 idle, 50 load. I call that improvement considering the noise difference. Edit: After further use, I used the 2 60mm fans that are placced the the inside to the outside of the vents to suck out the heat that lingers in that area (most likely due to the heat coming off of the cpu and out of the PSU that is DIRECTLY above the CPU fan. The temperature is now around the same temperature as the stock, but MUCH quieter, especially with my fan controller.

Kuuga Rising Ultimate first off, has amazing detail. From head to toe, the figure is a work of art. Every bit of detail is painted and sculpted to the point where it really is show accurate. The sculpt is so good that even the tips of the armor that point out have sharp feel to them. Even his Arcle (the transformation belt) has ridiculously awesome detail for something so small. Articulation wise, he has the same ones as the SH Figuarts series, albeit on a smaller scale. He does have accessories: interchangeable hands (default closed fists, open relaxed hands, a thumbs up hand and a transformation related hand) and an alternate head that depicts his "dark form." One thing that people won't expect from this line of figures is the scale. Compared to SH Figuarts, these are almost half the size. Those used to the SH Figuarts scale may have a hard time adjusting, but it's really not that bad. Matter of fact, despite the size that this line (S.I.C.) uses, all their figures have amazing detail. The same care put into the detailing of SH Figuarts is present in this line as well. Overall, this figure is great. It's a great add to my collection. If you're a fan of the show, character, or just love collecting figures, get this, it's a solid purchase!

The book was okay a new author for me. Not as attention grabbing as it could be and had a hard time staying with the story. Was interesting in some places and would try another book maybe from this author.

Bought this to play with my kids since I loved the original as a kid, but the updated board design is a disaster. The spinner feels super flimsy and sticks half the time, so you end up with the same numbers over and over. That wouldn't be a huge deal except the new path layout traps you in that middle section seemingly forever. We played for almost an hour and nobody could get past it. My eight-year-old literally gave up and asked to play something else. The artwork is nice and the gem pieces are decent quality, I'll give it that. But when the core gameplay is this broken, none of that matters. Going back to the thrift store version I should've bought in the first place.

Like the other books this involved a element and a Prakenskii. Lexi and Gavriil are broken because of their pasts but come together to make a whole. Five of the brothers and all six sisters come together to beat Lexi's past.
Does what it's supposed to do. The grip is comfortable enough but feels a bit narrow for my hands during longer sessions. Wish they offered a wider version. Build quality seems solid so far though.
Got this on sale and it's okay for the price. Way too much focus on people's feelings instead of actual science. The segment about the sick teacher got me though. Not bad, just not what I expected.
One of my favorite star wars t-shirt. I really like the photo! The t-shirt has good quality and the size was perfect.
Not quite Mel Brooks but certainly a very close second.

I fed a tiny bit of this to 2 nothobranchius guentheri fry (baby killifish). They had been doing fine on freshly hatched fairy shrimp for 3 days, so I figured it was time to move them up to a slightly larger food. Within 1 hour of feeding this stuff both fish were dead.

Ordered these for my daughter after seeing them recommended in a mom group. They shipped same-day and arrived in perfect condition, no crushed boxes or damaged pieces. The packaging was clean and secure, which I appreciated since I've had nightmare experiences with other orders arriving destroyed. Right out of the box I could tell these were solid. The plastic feels thick and durable, not flimsy like some off brands. The valves popped in easily and the lids clicked on with a satisfying snug fit. I handed one to my 18-month-old filled with water and braced for the usual mess, but nothing came out even when she shook it around. Already ordered a second set in a different color. Wish I'd found these six months ago.
I haven't worn them on the course yet but they fit pretty true to Adidas golf shoes I've had in the past. I really like the look.

Perfect replacement for my garbage disposal. Installed in about ten minutes with basic hand tools. The old one had corroded badly and stopped spinning. Everything runs quiet and smooth now. Way cheaper than buying a whole new unit.

This review is specifically about the leather-bound Easton Press edition, for those who are contemplating buying this version. It really is a beautiful looking book. It is bound in rust-brown full leather, with orange and metallic gold ornamentation on the front cover and spine, with all page edges gilt. (On the scan I have entered onto Amazon, the gold stamping looks very dull; it's difficult to scan reflective metallic colours. The appearance of the book when seen in person is much more brilliant that the photo suggests.) This edition measures six-and-a-half by nine inches in size, is 204 pages in length, and contains numerous black-and-white line drawings by Kay Nielsen. It also contains full-colour plates by the artist---HOWEVER---here is the problem. There were 25 paintings done for the original edition of this book, and the Easton Press edition only contains eight of them. I cannot imagine why on earth this "luxury" edition of the book doesn't contain all of the colour plates; I'm totally baffled by the omission of nearly two-thirds of the artwork. If not for that fact, this really would be the perfect edition of the book to own. But as it is, I don't know that this Easton edition is worth the price.

Really enjoyed this one overall. The military operation stuff was actually my favorite part - felt authentic and kept the pacing fast. Cade and Cecelia had decent chemistry but I'll admit I wanted more one-on-one time between them instead of so many mission sequences. That said, what romantic moments we did get were well written and felt earned, not rushed. The intimate scenes were good quality, just fewer than I expected going in. If you're someone who likes action-heavy stories with romance woven through rather than the other way around, this is right up your alley. Took off one star because the balance felt slightly off for what's marketed as romance, but I still read it in basically one sitting. Will definitely check out more from this author.

Install went smoothly except the intake hoses are quite slim and twisted when trying to attach them. I read some people had problems with the head not retracting. I put the old weight on the the hose along with the new one - works for me. I love the the easy button switch to stop the water temporarily. Say I want to fill a pot on the counter. Turn on the water, grab the head, push the stop button, and no splash or wet counters. I've had issues with other one handle faucet designs shutting off by themselves. The faucet I replaced would only stay on if I had the water on full blast. This handle does not do that. Now I can peel eggs under water easily. I can't attest to durability yet, but so far so good.
I've had this steamer for about eight months now and use it almost every morning. Still works like the day I got it. Heats up quick and punches through stubborn wrinkles on my dress shirts.

Bought these for hot yoga and they're honestly great. Waistband doesn't roll down, fabric is squat-proof, and the length hits right above my ankle on me at 5'6". My only gripe is the sizing runs slightly small so size up if you're between sizes. Would definitely recommend to anyone doing pilates or barre classes, just not for running, they're not quite supportive enough for that.

Nice and flexible. At a reasonable price too. I needed different size lugs than what they supply. A quick email to the seller and I got exactly what I needed. If you do need a different size lug, submit your change request pretty quickly because this will be shipped out before you blink.

I had to read this for a lit class years ago and honestly wasn't expecting much. Picked it up again recently and wow, it hits completely different as an adult. Joyce packs so much into these short pieces, every story has this quiet moment where you realize something devastating just happened beneath the surface. "The Dead" alone is worth the entire book. The final paragraph still gives me chills. If you've been intimidated by Joyce because of Ulysses, start here. It's accessible but still incredibly layered. I'd especially recommend this to anyone who likes stories that trust the reader to connect the dots, nothing is spelled out for you. Great for book clubs too because there's so much to unpack and argue about. Definitely picking up Portrait next.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing is solid. Way bigger than I thought and the extra accessories are actually useful, not cheap filler. Held up four adults no problem. Super impressed overall.
Picked this up on sale and honestly it's worth way more than what I paid. Tons of classic westerns packed together. You'd spend a fortune buying each title separately.

Arrived two days late and the box looked like it had been kicked down a flight of stairs. Both ends were taped up but still partially open when the driver handed it to me. No bubble wrap or anything inside, just the hub rattling around loose. Pulled it out and there are scuffs all over the top surface right out of the box. Plugged it in and the power LED flickers if you barely touch the cable. The USB connections feel super loose, like the ports are already worn. Tried my keyboard and mouse and they'd cut out every few seconds. Honestly not even worth dealing with a return, just going straight in the trash. Avoid this one.

Watched this with my kids over the weekend and honestly I wasn't expecting much. Figured it'd be another generic princess story but the sister dynamic really caught me off guard. The relationship between Anna and Elsa is actually the heart of the whole thing, and my youngest hasn't stopped talking about it since. The music is ridiculously catchy too, "Let It Go" has been on repeat in my house and I'm not even mad about it. Idina Menzel absolutely nails that song. The snowman character could've been annoying but somehow he works. Animation is gorgeous, especially the ice castle scene. Only minor complaint is the villain twist felt a little rushed at the end. Still, this one's going in the regular rotation. Definitely worth picking up on Blu-ray.

Used this to break loose some seriously rusted exhaust manifold bolts on my Silververado that had been on there for over 15 years. The extra leverage it provides is no joke, and it saved my knuckles more than once during this project. It is a bit bulky, so getting into tight spots takes some creativity, and you definitely want to pair it with beefy wrenches since it puts serious torque on whatever you are using. I would absolutely recommend this to any backyard mechanic or DIYer who regularly deals with stubborn, seized-up fasteners. Worth every penny.

waking up to find your world has become a nightmare you don't recognize can be a drain on your soul but to find that your life had be taken away and misused in such a way is heart breaking to know the loss of a child and feel that pain in your heart for so long that when the truth is right in front of you you become so lost will Cheyenne find her way back or will her world be forever lost to despair find out in this amazing tale of lost and found and see where it will lead you you laugh you'll ugly cry and you will find your heart pounding at the words this tale will tell this is a must read as in all the timeless series I have found Lisa L Wiedmeier has spun a series of stories so thrilling and so well put together you can't stop reading them I loved the book and will be glad to see more of Cheyenne and her family as they grow in power and numbers the love and magic flow as evenly as the pages of the story this is a great love story
Fun to buy something that has survived the test of time.

Bought this thinking I was getting a quality renewed device. Wrong. The screen has a weird yellow tint that's super noticeable when you compare it side by side with a friend's iPad. I tried adjusting the True Tone and night shift settings but nothing fixes it. The battery life is also terrible, dies after maybe three hours of just browsing Safari and watching YouTube. My old iPad Air 2 held a charge way better than this thing. The speaker crackles whenever the volume goes above fifty percent too. Definitely not worth the savings, just spend the extra money on a brand new one.
This product actually works. Tried before and after use, definitely a difference.

Arrived two days early in a nice resealable bag, not just loose in a box. The leather feels substantial and the hardware looks solid right out of the package. Way nicer than I expected for the price. Would've been five stars but sizing runs small.
What a gorgeous rug! Looks beautiful under my small round dining room table. A great value for the price. Very plush and expensive looking.
Interesting story. Not a particularly exciting movie and somewhat sad. The actors are what make it worth watching.
Got this for our family photos and it looks amazing in the hallway. Super sturdy, gorgeous design, and way nicer than I expected. Totally recommend!
when we lived at the beach, my grand daughter played with it all the time, then when we moved we gave it to a child on the beach who was thrilled to get it!
These fit perfectly and the water tastes noticeably cleaner. Way cheaper than brand name ones and they last just as long. Super happy.
Perfect for beginners or anyone getting back into working out. I'd definitely recommend this to friends looking for a simple home setup.

Honestly wasn't expecting much from a short read but this completely caught me off guard. The depth packed into such a small page count is pretty incredible. I've read plenty of shorts that feel rushed or underdeveloped, but this one actually takes the time to breathe and lets the characters shine. Thorn's backstory hit way harder than I anticipated and added so much context to what we've seen from him before. If you're caught up on the series this is an absolute must-read, and even if you're not, it still works well enough on its own. My only complaint is that now I need the next full book ASAP. Easily exceeded every expectation I had going in.

Arrived quickly in a padded mailer, no damage. First impression out of the box was nice, the fabric feels premium and the magnet flap clicks securely. But it's pretty tight getting my Surface in, and I can't leave the type cover attached. Decent enough for what I paid, just wish it had more room.
Perfect for streamers needing accurate colors. My viewers noticed instantly.
My youngest kitty loves it. Took my two older kitties a bit to figure it out, but an awesome feeding activity for all my cats.

Bought this to round out my TNA collection from that era. It's a decent watch if you're already a fan of the product, but nothing here really screams must-see. The main event scene with Jeff Hardy and Bobby Roode does what it needs to do, though the build felt a little rushed for a pay-per-view. Some of the undercard bouts deliver solid action, but a couple of them definitely have that Impact television feel rather than something worth paying extra for. Production is what you'd expect from TNA at the time, nothing fancy. Overall I don't regret the purchase since I enjoy going back to this period, but casual viewers can probably skip it without missing much. Three stars feels fair.
In just about a month we've found this to be all we expected and more.
I downloaded this book a month ago and I cannot believe that I waited until today to read. There are not enough words to describe how much I love this book and the characters in it!
Bought this again after losing my first copy. Still just as good.
Put one of these in my pantry and it's perfect. Nice and bright, plus the sturdy cover means no worries about accidental bumps. Great for tight spaces, highly recommend for laundry rooms or closets.

Honestly didn't expect much from something this cheap, but figured I'd give it a shot for my workshop speakers. Boy was I wrong. This little box pushes way more clean power than I anticipated, no distortion even when I crank it. My buddy's big name-brand receiver honestly doesn't sound any better. If you need a compact amp and don't wanna drop serious cash, just grab one. Totally exceeded what I thought I'd get.

Arrived two days earlier than expected, nicely sealed in retail packaging with no dents or crushed corners. Everything inside was neatly organized with the charging cable tucked in its own little slot. Charged it up to full in about an hour right out of the box. First impression is solid, the weight feels substantial without being heavy, and the rubberized finish has a premium grip. Paired to my phone instantly, no fumbling through menus. Sound quality blew me away for something this compact. I tested it with a couple of acoustic tracks and the bass response was way better than anticipated. Volume gets surprisingly loud with zero distortion at higher levels. Only had it a week but already grabbed a second one for my garage.

I'd only recommend this to my worst enemy. Right out of the box, half the bolts were cross-threaded and useless. I had to rig the ankle clamps with zip ties just to test it, and even then the whole frame wobbled like crazy. The pin for the angle adjustment wouldn't budge no matter how hard I pulled. Honestly, if you value your spine, stay far away. Spend a little more on a name brand. This thing belongs in a dumpster, not supporting someone upside down.

Got these for my 6 year old's birthday and she hasn't taken them off since. She wears them to school, to the playground, even around the house. I was honestly shocked at the quality for the price - I expected to pay double for something this well-made. The leather is genuine and has held up to serious abuse already. What I really appreciate is the rubber sole, which gives her actual traction unlike a lot of dressy boots that slip around. The footbed has decent cushioning too. The pink embroidery is subtle and cute without being over the top. Sizing runs true - we ordered her usual size 13 and there's enough room for thicker socks in winter. For the money, you honestly can't do better. Highly recommend.

I did return mine - I have all tile floors with room rugs, and being semi-retired and self-employed from home I spend a lot of time in my slippers walking on the tile. The original cork built-up soles on the OG clogs are perfect for this whereas when I wear this Charisma with it's soft thinner sole in comparison it SEEMS I can almost feel the floor though the sole. That means not enough support for wearing them 10-12 hours a day every day. DANG it I love them and they were only $42 from Warehouse Deals....I do wish they had worked out! If you like the look I would encourage you to try them out and see for yourself how they feel. As a general house slipper, especially on wall to wall padded carpeting and just light use in morning, evening and weekends I bet they'd be GREAT. DETAILS: Charisma is unmistakably a slipper (as opposed to a clog that could be worn as a shoe). Charisma has a snug fit - the size 42 for women's size 11 had my toe pushing right up at the top. Bear in mind one of my feet is 10.5 and the other 11 - the 10.5 foot thought the length was perfect. The fabric is very soft with some give and they actually felt OK even with my toes nicely wrapped up - for the 10 minutes I tried. Like the OG clog style, these do have the molded foot bed with the slightly built up arch support. They are nowhere near as tough and stiff as the OG clog style; the sole is thinner and more flexible especially at the toes which are not bulbous and padded as are the OG clog style. The bottom of these soles are covered in thin "grips" that mildly keep them from slipping on tile so I would say these are not for use outdoors - much.

These work amazing under my recliner. I placed 2 at the front and 2 at the back under the recliner and so far so good. I haven't had to reposition the recliner because it is hitting the wall. My recliner sits on carpet. Problem solved! Happy customer!

Bought this for my 6 year old's birthday thinking it'd be a fun simplified version of the classic. Honestly pretty disappointed with the whole thing. The board feels flimsy and arrived already creased down the middle, which makes it hard to lay flat during play. The spinner sticks constantly so my kid ends up just flicking it manually half the time. We've played maybe four times and she's already losing interest. Some of the activity cards are genuinely fun, the scavenger hunt ones get her up and moving, but quite a few require reading skills beyond the target age group, so I end up doing all the work. Overall it feels rushed and not worth what I paid. Expected better quality from this brand.

Good looking package has a backup, a fun series looking good. Los Angeles's first Super Hero, so cool a Latino and an example of a graceful personality. Latter Theatre Series Style TV Show was a hit for a reason, and I see it again. Sergent Garcia balances the politics and offers much entertainment and humor. My girl requests the episodes and we watched the whole set and we are on to the second. Light Disney fun! Perfect after any film.

Ordered the two-pack and honestly wish I hadn't bothered. They showed up in this tiny vacuum-sealed pouch that looked like someone had run it over with a steamroller. I get that companies compress pillows to save on shipping, but these were absolutely wrecked by it. I unpacked them and let them sit for a full two days hoping they'd puff back up. Nope. Still completely flat and lumpy with these weird permanent creases running through the middle. The filling feels clumped together and honestly kind of cheap. Couldn't even bring myself to put a pillowcase on them. Straight into the donation bag. Save your cash and just buy these individually at an actual store where you can see what you're getting.

Really enjoyed the magic system in this one. The way the author ties spellcasting to emotional memory is genuinely fresh and I haven't seen anything quite like it in fantasy lately. That alone kept me turning pages. My only gripe is the pacing drags hard in the middle section. There's a stretch around the 40% mark where basically nothing happens and I almost put it down for good. Glad I pushed through because the last few chapters are fantastic and tie things together really well. The protagonist's voice is distinct and the dialogue feels natural, not forced. I'll probably grab the sequel eventually but not rushing out to get it immediately. Solid read overall.

I'd highly recommend this to anyone preparing for exams or just wanting to stay mentally sharp at work. The strategies are easy to apply and actually stick. I've already noticed a difference in how I retain details after just a couple weeks of practicing what's taught here.

Bought this last summer for night fishing and it was great at first. Nice and bright, charged up fast. But after about three months the battery started dying way too quick. Now it won't even hold a charge for 20 minutes. The rubber cover over the charging port also tore off completely. For the price I expected it to last longer than one season. Really disappointing.
Got this for a wedding and got so many compliments. The fabric feels way nicer than I expected and the fit is spot on. Definitely grabbing a second one.

Superior replacement for a damaged smoke detector. The amazing and fantastic quality is that its exactly the same as the damaged one I had, which made installation a snap. I was able to use the same mounting holes with the new bracket. Works flawlessly during test modes. Highly recommend this product for those that have an old worn out smoke detector

Could not put this book down. Well the IPad anyways. I love this author's writing style. She really captures my attention. I am looking forward to reading the last book in this trilogy. OR maybe we will get more of Colton in a 4th.
Great for history buffs who love complex narratives. Worth the effort.
I bought these for my son and he loves them. If they have one downside, it is the fact that the cardboard coukld be a little thicker to add strength to the product.
My kids have stepped on this thing a hundred times and it's still perfect.

really well designed. easy to put together. lots of power. great rip fence capacity for the portability. for me it was a toss up between this one and the bosch. I worked with a guy that had the bosch so I used it quite a bit and it was pretty great but now that I have this model I don't think I would go back.
Arrived two days early in sturdy packaging. Solid galvanized steel, way better than the flimsy ones at the hardware store. Very impressed.
Arrived quickly in a nice zippered bag with a handle. Unfolded it and the design looks awesome. Fabric feels a little flimsy but works fine as a lightweight couch layer.

I bought a set of these in different sizes and honestly they've completely changed my junk drawers. I've got one in the bathroom cabinet holding all my makeup samples and travel-sized toiletries, another in the pantry for spice packets and loose tea bags, and a third on my desk for chargers and batteries. The clear design makes it so easy to see what's inside without digging around, and they stack nicely which saves a ton of space. They feel surprisingly sturdy for the price too, not flimsy at all. I'd really recommend these to anyone moving into a new place or just trying to get their life together organization-wise. Would make a great housewarming gift honestly. Planning to order more sizes because I keep finding new spots that need them.
This was a cute story. Unusual storyline for a romance, but I enjoyed it.
Way better than I expected for a steampunk debut. The world-building hooked me fast and the characters actually felt real.
This product claims to be a large bowl but I can't even fit my fist into it, my bulldog could use this as a muzzle. It's picturesd with a Lab dog my dog is smaller than most Lab dogs.

I wasn't expecting much when I picked this up on a whim, but it completely blew me away. The writing is way sharper than the cover suggests, and I found myself staying up way too late just to finish one more chapter. Way better than other stuff I've read in this genre. Already lent my copy to my brother and he texted me the next day raving about it.

This is about half the size of what I expected. From top to bottom it will hang maybe half way down in your closet. To give you an idea of the size each pocket area holds about a half dozen sock pairs.
Perfect for beginners wanting to step up from basic cubes.
Arrived in two days, nicely shrink-wrapped and undamaged. Started reading right away and I'm already hooked by the second chapter. Really glad I grabbed this one.
Smaller than I pictured but seems solid enough. Fits fine and gives peace of mind.
Made in USA. Wanted to like them but they run small.

Bought two of these to split HDMI to different rooms. The build quality felt decent enough and the metal casing seemed solid, but the actual signal performance is garbage. One output works fine, the second has constant flickering and screen dropouts every few minutes. Tried swapping cables and inputs, same problem. Even tried different resolutions. It just can't handle pushing two displays simultaneously without issues. Returning both units. Don't waste your time if you actually need reliable dual output.
Great extensions used in the back seat of a Jeep for long trip charging of kids devices.

I picked this up expecting a standard romance, but it goes so much deeper. The way the main character wrestles with her decisions feels incredibly real, and I caught myself thinking about my own life choices while reading. The author doesn't take easy outs with the storyline, which I really respected. I'd highly recommend this to anyone who enjoys women's fiction with emotional depth, not just fluffy love stories. Book clubs would have a field day with this one. Fair warning, the ending hit me harder than I expected.

A well flowing story about different people who had to leave Earth and had a very long trip to the new planet. The story is about the last werewolf. A special female was raised to give birth to the next werewolf boy. Valentine Lo Bo is wealthy last werewolf, thousands of tears old. Mirella was the special female. The story relates the meeting of the two, and how they relate. The story has your feelings moving up and down, feeling for the two. Others are in the story to make it well rounded. Read it.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but these blew me away. The arch support is way better than my old Clarks and the pewter shade goes with everything. Broke them in at a backyard bbq last weekend and zero blisters. Already ordered the navy pair. Fits true to size if you skip the wide.
The filter is a joke. Water stayed filthy no matter how often I cleaned it. My cat wouldn't even touch the bowl. Total garbage, returned it immediately.
Arrived two days early in perfect condition. Kids ripped it open immediately and haven't stopped playing since.

The Buttkicker adds a bit of shake to your home theatre. It doesn't replace the subwoofer, but sort-of turns the floor into a lower subwoofer. And I love it. But there are some things you should know. First, the LFE Kit (with Amp) is probably the best choice to start with because you can't drive it from your receiver - not enough power. So getting in the game will cost you around $500. Which is more than for Aura Bass Shakers, but far better. Second, one LFE Kit will do a sofa nicely, but if you, like me, mount it under your floor, you're gonna need two. Possibly more, but probably two. Because that's a LOT more mass to shake, and otherwise they'll be maxxing out and making a loud knocking noise. Third, it's not like riding a rollercoaster. You'll feel the floor shake from loud sound effects, bombs, etc., but don't expect magic. It makes the movie more real, but it doesn't toss you around. All that said, it's a great addition. If you can afford the cost-of-entry, you'll be amazed how shallow the system feels with it off.

Works great, good construction. The Velcro is nice just keep it clean. Its a bit hefty so if your catcher looks up and quick brings his head back down, pending the position it can hang up a little. Overall recommend the product.
Had this running nonstop for eight months now, still going strong and my sinuses are finally clear.
Got these for a party outfit but they're way too cute to only wear once. Super comfy too.

I do not own this rifle but am open to purchasing one. The reviews are very positive, but some reviewers mention 'barrel-droop.' Amazon even sells a device to bolt onto the gun to mitigate 'barrel-droop' so this must be a real issue. Reviews of other manufacturers' guns do not mention 'barrel-droop' so I can only conclude that RWS has an issue other manufacturers do not. But if this is such a great gun, why does one have to purchase an extra device to mitigate what appears to me to be either a design issue or a manufacturing defect? I would love to hear a real explanation from an expert. Until then, I will postpone any purchase decision. Best regards.

Bought this for my 4-year-old's Valentine's basket and she adores it. The plush is soft and well-stitched, though smaller than I pictured. Still totally worth it for the price. She carries it everywhere now and sleeps with it every night. Shipping was quick too.
The beginning was a little slow but once the story started to gain momentum my attention was caught and kept captivated. I will definitely be on the look out for Book 2.

Been using this stand for about six months now at my home office and it's honestly one of those small purchases that made a big difference. My laptop used to run hot and the fan would kick on constantly, not anymore. Air circulates underneath nicely and the angled design keeps my wrists from aching during long work sessions. The lip at the bottom holds my 15-inch laptop securely without any sliding around, even when I'm typing fast. It's lightweight enough to toss in my bag when I travel but sturdy enough that it doesn't flex. Wish I'd grabbed one sooner.

Nothing special about this thong, more comfy than other thongs, for sure. It seems like it was simply cut from a cloth and then.... Voila! There were no stitchings around the band. Well, that's prob why it's 'invisible' because of no bulk. I like it though.
Way smaller than expected but my kid loves chasing the bubbles.
This guy thinks he needs a bad chick by his side,but he has nothing but problems with this type of woman, finally he wishes up and gets a good woman
I don't usually give up on a book because I think "it will get better. This book I finally gave up on and decided there was no hope. Starts out slow and stays that way

It is very, very small. It's a great concept, but it does not work for large, active dogs. The Velcro will not hold up to roughhousing, and if you loose your tags, you're screwed. Some people suggested that you can leave the tags attached to the O-ring and just slip them in the pouch, but still, you run the risk of the pouch ripping away. I ended up putting this on my cat and putting his rabies tag in it since he is an outdoor/indoor cat. He doesn't wander off, but instead of having to go thru the hassle to send it back, I just decided to put it on him. Back to looking for more solutions, and it sucks because I bought 2 brand new tags for my dog so I could put them in this pouch. I just didn't realize it was going to be so small. It's almost the size of two postage stamps laid top to bottom. My husband suggested I put the tags on a carabiner and then unclip it from her at night and when she is in the house so we don't have to listen to them jangle. Then I can just clip the carabiner back on her when she goes outside.

This has to be one of the best designed and most comfortable bras I have ever worn! As a size 36DD woman, it is very hard to find something that not only has good support, but is feminine and pretty too. This bra designer understands the needs of a heavily busted woman. First of all, they give you an extra hook and eye bra strap extender to allow your bra to fit perfectly throughout a little weight gain or weight loss. No back fat is going to be created by this band not fitting well. The straps are softly padded over the shoulders, so nothing digs in leaving those red strap marks on your shoulders at the end of the day. The underwire supported cups of the bra give full coverage and also great support holding everything at the right height and in place. They are lightly lined for comfort and concealment and the lace and bow accents are very feminine. Nothing shows through your clothing ~ even the lace overlay on the cups. I believe for me this was a perfect fit - it did not run too large or too small. I would certainly love to have a drawer full of these bras, as I personally could not ask for anything better made, more reasonable priced or with a better fit than this bra. I did receive this product at a discount in exchange for my honest and unbiased opinion.
Love it. Can't wait to read another story from this author
GOOD QUALITY PRODUCT. HAD TO CUT UP INTO SMALLER PIECES. BOTH MY CATS LOVED THE VEGGIES IN THE FOOD AND THE VARIETY
Very impressive package and of the Blue Ray picture quality was fantastic!! Greatest romance ever made. I watch it at once a year after NFL season ends.

I've had this installed for about three weeks now running a ceiling fan and light combo. Honestly, it works better than I expected. The fan speed control is smooth across all settings, and the dimmer function doesn't flicker like my old Lutron did. The remote is handy when I'm already in bed. My only real complaint is that it doesn't play nice with LED bulbs, I had to swap back to incandescents to get a clean dimming curve at low brightness. For the price though, it's a solid upgrade over a basic wall switch. Just wish the LED compatibility was there.

This works wonderfully to play your music and it comes out very clear and loud. Very easy to hook up and start using right away. The light for the radio station is a little dim and in the sun it was hard to tell it was on. For phone calls I honestly couldn't tell if the sound was coming out of my phone or the stereo until I hit mute on my stereo. It was very hard to hear. I tried several different calls and it was not working well but when I hung up and the music came back on nice volume. It would have been fewer stars had I care about the call part of it. I got this for my husband's car for road trips as his does not have aux or bluetooth and sometimes you can't get a station in or whatever reason and you want to hear music through the stereo speakers rather than the cell. So for my purposes it is great. I received this item at a discount in exchange for my honest review.
Content is solid and well-researched, but the binding fell apart after just two weeks of normal reading. Disappointed in the physical quality.

Got this on release day and the hardcover is honestly gorgeous for what I paid. The dust jacket art is stunning and the binding feels solid enough to survive multiple rereads, which I appreciate since I'm rough on books. Story-wise, I'm torn. Karen Marie Moning writes Dublin like nobody else and the atmosphere is as thick and moody as ever. But Dani's voice can be exhausting after 400 pages. She's exhausting on purpose, I get it, but still. I wanted more Barrons and Mac and felt a little shortchanged on that front. That said, for under twenty bucks you're getting a chunky, well-produced installment that moves the plot forward significantly. Not my favorite in the series but definitely worth picking up. Four solid stars.
A really fun project to do, would suggest a gift to someone that is interested in computers.

Just purchased this cat tree a week ago. It arrived quickly and was better than I imagined. The cat houses were large enough for my adult cats. I was worried they might be a little small, but they were spacious enough for one cat to fit in a house at a time and roll around or hide in it. This is my cats first cat tree condo and it won't be their last. When I purchased this cat tree I saw that there were similar trees for less money, but I chose this one by Armarkat because the reviews said it was sturdy. I must admit this cat tree was easy to put together and it is extremely sturdy. My cats jump on and off and climb it without any wobbling. I have two cats and both are about 13 lbs. The carpet material is a little on the cheapy side, but the cats enjoy it so I can't complain. I purchased the Kong catnip and sprinled some on the cat tree and my cats are in heaven and happy to be up off of the ground. I purchased the 74" tree and was concerned it might not be tall enough to make the cats feel secure, but it's plenty tall and spacious too! If you are looking for a sturdy tree that your cat/s will enjoy I recommend this product by Armarkat.

Solid target for the price. I really like how the layered foam stops arrows consistently, and the carry handle is a nice touch. Just wish the outer shell held up better after a few weeks of outdoor use. Still worth it overall.

My 3 cats love this brush. All I have to do is get it out of the drawer and they come running. Also use it to brush off hair that gets on the chairs and sofa. Comes in handy for keeping the cats and the furniture tidy.
Arrived super fast and packaged well. Opening it, the detail immediately stood out. Tons of tiny accessories included. Really impressed right out of the box.

Picked this up as an everyday carry and it's been decent for the price. The card slots hold tight which was my main concern. I've got about eight cards jammed in there and nothing has fallen out yet. The exterior has picked up some scuffs over the past couple months but honestly that doesn't bother me much. My one real complaint is the cash compartment. It's weirdly narrow and getting bills in and out is a hassle. Had to fold them twice which makes the whole thing bulky. For what I paid though it gets the job done and the magnetic clasp still snaps shut fine. Would I buy it again? Probably yeah, just wish the bill section was wider.

"My secret, my obsession is worse than any of theirs. To contain it, I do the only thing I can. I lock myself up. And in doing so, keep myself, and everyone else, safe." This was an edgy book that explored the dark places we try to keep locked up inside of us, since they are not in compliance with societal norms or potentially are illegal. Who among us doesn't have these secrets? Of course, most of us don't go to the extreme of locking ourselves up for the safety and protection of others. The book was a quick, but very gripping and entertaining read. The story is told from several points of view which makes for an interesting read as well. The pace moved along at a good clip, and then picks up as climax is nearing (no pun intended). Excellent suspense and many emotions are drawn out of the reader. I was not familiar with the author prior to this book. I don't read in the genre she specializes in, erotica, but this book definitely falls more in the thriller genre, and I would read more of her books with this sort of a cross over. She is a talented writer. I am not familiar with camming, but would expect that she got that pretty accurately. That aspect of the book was a nice twist. Not only does the main character have psychotic urges, and a dark past, but because she has locked herself up, she has become one of the country's premier web cammers to support herself. That combination makes for a very entertaining character who drew many different emotional responses from me. This book was riveting in the same way that Gone Girl by Gillian Flynn was to me. A. J. Torre knocked this one out of the park! I will definitely read it again.

Adorable toy. Fun and entertaining for young girls. Or boys. Well made and slightly interactive. The doll has movable arms and legs. It is cute and colorful. As cute as this is, though, I'm not sure I would want to pay the current price of $39.99 for it. I think that is way too much for this toy. Also, the packaging was a nightmare. I understand the need to protect it during shipping, but this was a bit overkill. My granddaughter loves it which is the only reason this gets 4 stars instead of 3.

Great product. My only complaint is that if you actually put stuff in each of the pockets, the whole thing is pretty bulky. I was hoping for something a bit slimmer, but it is definitely heavy-duty and will last quite a while.

Honestly I expected a bit more stability for the price. The telescoping action is smooth and it gets short enough to stash in a coat closet, which is why I bought it. But fully extended there's a noticeable wobble that makes you second-guess every step. I'm about 190 pounds and it held up fine, just didn't feel confidence-inspiring up top. The rungs are narrower than I anticipated too. For occasional light attic access in a tight space it does the job. Just don't expect it to feel like a traditional ladder. Decent but not great.
We love these! We buy a new one about every 18 months or so just because we like our dogs to have new ones as we wash them frequently and that takes its toll on them.

Arrived two days late in a padded envelope with no box, so the tip was already slightly nicked. It does fire consistently on soft wood, but struggles on steel. Not terrible for the price, just don't expect premium quality.

I bought this top and two other items using my husband's prime account. Everything came quickly and on time. Another review mentioned a smell, I too washed the top and smell gone! I wear a US 16, bra 36 I, and usually an XXL top; I ordered this top in XXL. Some other reviewers mentioned somewhat large fit. So I did expect this top to be a bit large and it is a bit "flowy" but in a nice way. I would describe this top as a t-shirt with a fun hem line.
Bought these to go with the Noah's Ark for my 2 year old great nephew. Perfect in every way! He is enjoying play with them so much.
Love this little timer! Been using it daily for my HIIT circuits and the vibration alerts are super helpful when my music is loud. Setup was quick and it's held up great so far. Totally worth it.
Arrived two days early in a nice little box. Opened them up and the aqua is even prettier in person. Super soft right out of the package.

Our cat sadly has cancer. He has been very finicky about his food and he doesn't eat much. But this food has a lot of creamy gravy in it which he loves and medications are easily crushed into it without changing the taste. The chicken is tender so he can chew it. There are not a lot of by products in it, only what any cat needs to thrive. I love the fact that you can buy individual flavors on Amazon. Most stores only sell the mixed flavor boxes. Our kitty only likes the chicken flavor so this is handy. Unfortunately our baby won't be here much longer but while he is, I'm treating him to the best I can find...And this is it!
I bought this for my mother and she absolutely loves the show, item came as described with 2 day shipping, YAY prime.
The top is cute and fits perfectly! However the shorts are way too big!

I will admit is a bit flimsy but that is what some other reviews said. I needed something that I could easily mount on the wall in the room at my father's nursing home so he can hang his baseball caps. This fits the bill. It is lightweight which is great because we are restricted as to what we can hang things with. Now he can keep tract of his hats.
As with all your devotion books, this one did not disappoint! Great read!
My medium dog loved the squeaker inside, but the rubber split open after two days. Disappointing durability for the price.

It's always a long wait for a new Gabriel Allon book by Daniel Silva. This book, like the others, was worth the wait. It was especially nice to have so many references to past characters & books, and kind of tying them together.

Just a few bucks and you can add several new tiles and slightly more interesting gameplay to your Carcassonne game. Ownership of the longest road posses the scout tile, owner of the largest city gets the King tile. At the end of the game you get extra points for the roads and cities depending on which tile(s) you posses. Easy, cheap, fun and a good starting expansion for the game. (also comes with tiles for Hunters and Gatherers game, so don't get confused and toss them in with Carcassonne).

Picked these up for my daily commute and honestly didn't expect much given the price tag. What a pleasant surprise. The audio is crisp with surprisingly punchy bass, way better than the pair I paid three times as much for last year. They sit nicely in my ears without that annoying fatiguing pressure you get after an hour or so. I've worn them on long train journeys and barely noticed they were there. Sure, they won't completely block out a noisy carriage, but they dull the background enough to enjoy a podcast without cranking the volume to max. My one tiny gripe is the cable feels a bit thin, so I'm careful when stuffing them in my bag. Still, for what they cost, absolutely chuffed.
Got this for my horse-crazy 5-year-old and she looked forward to opening a new piece every morning. The quality is fantastic. Perfect gift for any kid who loves farm animals!

A well told tale of "what if." What if the Germans defeated GB in WWII; what would the occupation be like; how would the resistance emerge. But its Deighton & there's much more including a wonderfully constructed plotline that captures the imaginary infighting among the victors.

These freeze-dried lamb strips have been a game changer for training my reactive border collie. She'll do anything for a tiny crumb of this stuff. I keep a few pieces in my pocket during walks and they don't make a greasy mess like other soft treats do. If you've got a picky eater or need high-value rewards for obedience work, definitely grab a bag. The ingredient list is impressively short too.
These work fine and hold up okay, but honestly the extra time threading everything wasn't worth it. Sticking with traditional rivets next go around.

I picked this up on a whim thinking it would be a pretty standard sci-fi read, but it completely blew me away. The way the author weaves together historical figures with genuinely strange esoteric ideas is unlike anything I've come across before. I expected a fun distraction on my commute and instead got something that genuinely messed with my head in the best way possible. The chapters from the perspective of historical conquerors are especially haunting. Fair warning though, this is not light reading. You have to pay attention or you'll miss the connections. If you want something that actually challenges how you think about awareness and identity instead of just entertaining you, grab this immediately. Already rereading it.

Got these in dark wash and black, and they've become my go-to pants for work and weekends. The waistband doesn't dig in like other brands I've tried, and the length hits perfectly right at the ankle on my 5'7" frame. I'd definitely recommend them to anyone with an athletic build who struggles to find jeans that aren't skin-tight. Knocked off one star because the pockets are pretty shallow, but honestly that's my only complaint.

This was a good story. It had good characters and a good storyline. I thought it was very enjoyable. I think everyone would enjoy reading this lighthearted Christmas romance I received this book for free from ebook discovery. I voluntarily review this book. This is my honest review.

The story, the plot is excellent in its own rite. But the writing is glorious. I felt like I was riding a tornado most of the time. One of the best works of fiction I've read. Left me a little breathless.
Great beach chairs! Easy to carry. Sit low to the ground.

I bought this for my 3-year-old daughter just a month before her 4th birthday. She loves jigsaw puzzles and things like Imaginets, but this was her first game of this sort. It took her a few cards to get a feel for the idea and become more familiar with the objects, but after that she really took off with this game. She completed all of the cards in two sessions, but she continues to ask for it. I think I could have bought a more complicated set from this company (and I plan on it!), but this one has been a great starting point for my daughter. It really is a high quality game with wooden pieces that are a great size for preschoolers to handle. The cards progress in difficulty, and it's quite impressive how many challenges there are using only four pieces. Very clever and perfect for quiet play!

Been using this wonder pack for about six months now with my weekly game group. The cards have held up really well despite constant shuffling and handling, no bent corners or peeling edges yet. Each wonder brings a fresh twist that keeps sessions interesting. Only knocking off a star because the rulebook could be clearer on a couple of the more complex abilities. Still, solid quality and totally worth picking up if you want to mix things up.

For the cost, Im really disappointed in the quality. I bought this just over a month ago, and despite care taken while washing the bra is fraying and falling apart. Ive always used a mesh bag, on gentle cycle and I hang dry; it started fraying almost immediately. Ive attached a picture. Maybe I got a defective item, but regardless the straps that do not snap off are very very thin and made with material that doesnt feel like it would last.

Drew has a good life, working at To Dye For (salon), with her friends; it will only get better soon since she'll be getting married! She always feared for Colby, her fiance, working as a storm chaser. Then, the day she fears, happens; police arrive at her door and she learns her fiance has been killed in a highway accident! Her grief is real and deep. Later, not satisfied with her life, she decides to try something new. She becomes part of Colby's team... Stirring story of loss, storm chasers and romance. Lively enjoyable characters and dialog. Not as action intense with storm chasing as I'd thought it would be. Enjoyable read. Book free through Netgalley for honest review.

I bought this for family game night wanting something quick and portable, and it's been a total hit.
