The thing I really love is the built-in timer on the lid, it's integrated right into the case so you never have to hunt down a separate sand timer or use your phone. You just flip the lid, press start, and you're rolling. The letter cubes have a really satisfying shake to them too, and the grid holds everything snugly so letters don't shift around mid-round. We've taken this on two road trips already and it barely takes up any room in the bag. My nine-year-old actually beats me half the time, which keeps her engaged. For the price you really can't go wrong with this one. Solid little game.

This special is exactly what I needed this December. The celebrity cameos are great and all, but the real standout for me is the musical arrangements. They somehow managed to take these ridiculous holiday songs and make them sound genuinely good while still being completely absurd. The duet with Willie Nelson had me rewinding three times because I couldn't stop laughing at how perfectly executed the whole bit was. The set design is another thing worth mentioning, it's got this deliberate retro variety show aesthetic that nails the 70s vibe without feeling like a cheap parody. My only minor complaint is that I wanted more Stephen Colbert, but what we got was gold. Already planning to make this a yearly tradition.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but these keyboards are solid. Replaced all the generic ones in our office and everyone noticed the difference immediately. The keys have a really satisfying click without being obnoxiously loud, and the wrist rest is way more comfortable than I anticipated. Typing feels natural and my wrists don't hurt after long days anymore. Build quality is better than keyboards costing twice as much. Going on six months of heavy daily use with zero issues. Definitely buying more for the rest of the team.

My 8 year old uses this for his iPad mini. It's been dropped a few times and it's helped up well. Didn't want to spend so much money on the otter box, since I needed to buy 2. (His brother also was gifted an iPad mini) Glad this worked out for us.

Switched from the New Balance Runner. What a difference. It takes me 10-20 seconds to sync most of the time (that was my problem before). Charts look great on Garmin Connect. The screen size is just fine and the watch is pretty small and thin which is great for those runners that don't like weights on their wrists for runs. I highly recommend.
Our groomer said our old dog had dry skin, and this spray did the trick, and our younger dog enjoys the spray too!

My cat only likes to drink running water. Before we bought this, he would beg at the water faucet when we washed our hands. We feared that he was not getting enough water so we purchased this item. It came fast and was easy to put together. It came with one filter that will eventually need to be cleaned or replaced. It is not as loud as I expected after reading other reviews. I put ours on the bathroom counter for our cat and you can only hear it if you are in the bathroom. It sounds like a water fountain which I think is nice. Several people have complimented it not realizing it was a cat water bowl. The cat loves it and took to it right away. Now he gets all the water he wants and we don't have to wash our hands under a cat head. I add water to it every day and wash it once a week which is pretty low maintenance. It is top rack dishwasher safe which I love.
Good product. Setup was a little difficult. Sound is very tinny.
Arrived quickly in secure packaging. Charged my phone right out of the box, compact little unit.

I wasn't sure what to expect going in, especially since it's a Cold War spy movie that takes its time building up the partnership. Most origin stories rush to get the team together, but this one actually earns it. Cavill and Hammer play off each other brilliantly, and their reluctant dynamic is way more fun than I anticipated. The action sequences have this really kinetic energy that reminded me of early Bourne but with more swagger. Guy Ritchie's style is all over it, which could have gone either way, but the split-screen editing during the chase scenes works surprisingly well here. The soundtrack is absolutely killer too. Honestly exceeded my expectations by a mile. If you want a stylish spy thriller that doesn't take itself too seriously, this delivers.

I went into this expecting a pretty standard dark romance, but honestly this blew me away. The pacing is relentless, I started it on my lunch break and literally stayed up until 2am because I couldn't put it down. What surprised me most was how much depth the two leads have. Usually in this genre you get one dimensional tropes, but both characters feel like actual people with real flaws and motivations. The banter between them had me laughing out loud more than once, which I totally wasn't expecting given some of the heavier scenes. Stylo balances the grit with humor and tension so well. Way better than anything else I've picked up in this category lately. Already bought the sequel.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this set really delivered. My son got it for his birthday and the number of builds you can make is impressive. The instructions are clear enough that he barely needs help. Way better quality than similar sets I've tried. Totally worth it.
Solid ingredients but the kibble size is too big for my ferrets.
My picky old guy gobbles this right up. Great quality and affordable too.

I've had this ramp for about six months now and I'm honestly torn on it. On the plus side, the frame has held up remarkably well. My golden retriever uses it every single day to get into the back of my SUV and the structure itself is still solid with no warping or cracking. That said, the traction surface started peeling around month three and now it's pretty much bare in the middle. I ended up gluing down some outdoor carpet remnants which solved the problem. It's also fairly heavy to lug around and doesn't fold flat enough to stash easily. For the price I expected better grip material, but the actual construction is built to last. Just plan on replacing the surface eventually.

Ordered this for vacation reading and it arrived two days early in a rigid mailer, so no bent corners. Started it poolside and barely looked up the rest of the afternoon. The opening chapter pulled me in right away. Already lent my copy to my sister because I couldn't stop talking about it.
The paint job on the face is incredibly realistic. My kids absolutely love it.
Order a size or two up. I did and fit is good.
These made my appetizers look so professional at Thanksgiving. The built-in dip compartments are a game changer for serving.

I've been very happy with these canteens. I have a filter that I used for long, multi-day hikes, but it only came with a bag that was 16 ounces. These bags are the same gauge as the filter, and they are much larger that the bag that came with it. This helps me have more confidence in my supply of water while I'm on backpacking trips.
Grabbed this on a whim and honestly couldn't put it down. The mystery kept me guessing the whole way through, and the characters felt like real people. For under three bucks, this was a total steal.
Cute and works (hangs) on anything. I love everything about it.

I thought this DVD slightly below an average National Geographic video once there is more personal dramas than scienfic information. However I was moved by the story of a teacher with a brain tumor and his family anxiety.

I expected to love this jacket, unfortunately it didn't meet my expectations. The material was okay, but it felt bulky. And the sizing was off. Unfortunately my hunt for the perfect red "leather" jacket continues.

This Plano product is the perfect companion for the Plano 3500 Monstrosity of a 737002 Three Drawer Tackle System and any/all 3500 series Stowaway with Adjustable Dividers boxes. Complete with two Stowaway boxes of its own, this pack is loaded with features. There's one width sized inside pockets with a zipper, one exterior front zippered pocket as well as one side pocket with a zipper. The other side has an elasticated mesh pocket suitable for various tools, phone, etc. There's even an elasticated water bottle holder which works in conjunction with the mesh pocket. Should the use as a waist (fanny) pack not appeal, a shoulder strap is included. Plano just for not disappoint!

Got this for my nephew's birthday and it was the hit of the party. The rockets go surprisingly high and hold up well to rough handling. Perfect gift for any active kid who likes things that launch. Just be ready to chase down stray rockets in the yard.

I picked this up after stumbling across some vintage stereoscopic slides at an estate sale and wanting to know more about the whole phenomenon. The reproductions are surprisingly sharp considering how old some of these images are, and the historical context really helps you understand why 3D photography had such a moment in mid-century America. I knocked off one star because I wish there had been more technical detail about the cameras and formats used, it's more of a visual celebration than a deep reference guide. That said, if you're into vernacular photography, mid-century Americana, or the history of imaging, you'll get a lot out of this. It's not a comprehensive encyclopedia, but it's a gorgeous conversation starter worth leaving out on the coffee table.

I've had this on my Kindle for about eight months now and I keep coming back to it. Reread it twice already while traveling for work and it holds up beautifully every time. The pacing doesn't drag even when you already know the twists, which says a lot about the writing. What really impressed me is how the rugby angle feels authentic without being overdone. You can tell the author actually did their homework on the sport and Irish media culture. The three leads bounce off each other naturally and their dynamic keeps getting sharper with each installment. Even after months of sitting in my library alongside bigger name thrillers, this is the one I still recommend to coworkers. Solid addition to the series and well worth the purchase. Already preordered the next one.

Took a chance on this after a friend wouldn't shut up about it, and honestly I get the hype now. The pacing took me a minute to get into, maybe the first few chapters felt a touch slow, but once the plot picks up, it really hooks you. The banter between the leads is easily the highlight. Felt natural, not forced like a lot of romance I've tried lately. I'd hand this to anyone who likes slow burn with some actual substance behind it. My sister devours this kind of thing and I already told her to grab a copy. Not perfect, a couple side characters could've used more page time, but solidly worth the read. Already bought the second one and my TBR pile is crying.
Nice upgrade for the peltor head sets. Just replace the batteries with this unit and recharge off your USB port. Long lasting too.

Mine arrived two days early which was a nice surprise. Packaging was solid, no dents on the box and the bracket itself was snug in molded foam with all the hardware sealed in a separate bag. First impression out of the box is that it's genuinely heavy duty. The aluminum feels thick and the finish is clean with no rough edges. Standoffs and screws are all clearly labeled which made install pretty painless. Mounted it to my 3080 in about ten minutes and it sits perfectly level with even pressure across the whole card. Honestly the build quality exceeded what I expected for the price. Temps dropped around four or five degrees under load so far but I'll update after a week of gaming. Really happy with this purchase overall.

The magnetic strip that's supposed to hold the flap closed is incredibly weak. Every time I pick it up the cover swings open. My screen keeps waking up in my bag and draining the battery. Don't waste your money.

Was really looking forward to this steam mop what a disappointment. Does not work on high steam. The steam fresh attachment does not stay attached. Would like to return but now that it is assembled the handle cannot be unattached. Don't buy this product keep shopping for one that totally works.
Didn't expect much going in but the writing is genuinely sharp. The lead's deadpan delivery sells every scene. That final act reveal caught me completely off guard. Watched it twice already.
The dividers are great for keeping small craft supplies sorted. Wish the lid snapped on tighter though, mine pops off if I grab it by the top.

Got this for my older cat who started shredding the couch arms. Assembly was straightforward and the base is wide enough that it doesn't wobble when she leans into it. The sisal rope is tightly wound and feels like it'll hold up for a good while. My only complaint is the carpet top section collects fur pretty badly and needs regular vacuuming. She took to it immediately, which surprised me. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone with a medium to large cat who needs a sturdy, tall post. Small kittens might find it too tall, but for full-grown cats it's perfect.
Solid metal frame for the price. Bolted right onto my Tacoma without issues.

Worked fine for the first two months, then things went downhill fast. The right earbud started crackling and eventually died completely. I take care of my stuff and always store them in the case, so this isn't from rough handling. The charging port also feels flimsy and the cover is already loose. Sound quality was decent while they lasted, but for the price I expected more than a few months of use. Definitely wouldn't buy again given how quickly they fell apart.
The grip on these is fantastic. No slipping when my hands are sweaty. Cuts through drywall like butter every time.

I love this little gadget and have used it a handful of times during this cold season. Sad to see that they are no longer available. The instructions are pretty clear and I just can't get over how awesome and easy it is to simply place the device in a cup of water. Growing up, we always had the huge R2D2-style contraptions posted up in our hallway during the winter months - given that it was in a house made sense but it was always a pain to refill. This is simple and convenient to just have on your nightstand or side table; the power cord being so long is a plus too. Once it's plugged in and you hit the power button, a nice, steady mist comes out. I am just in love with Deneve products...they always seem to have fun stuff!

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this carry-on has been way better than my old Samsonite. Flew roundtrip Denver to Boston and it glided through terminals without any wobble. Fit perfectly in the overhead both ways on a 737. The telescoping handle feels solid, not flimsy like cheaper bags I've returned. Already planning to grab the larger size for longer trips.

Reading through the reviews, people kept on saying about how the "No more than four of any one card" is a lie, but I decided to take a gamble on this anyway. I am pleasantly surprised. I sorted through them, most cards are 2X, a lot of them are 1X, some are 4X, didn't notice any cards that were more than 4 of a kind, but I might have missed some. Total number of cards received: 1139 (1138 English, 1 Russian) Color breakdown: White: 204 Green: 189 Black: 152 Blue: 202 Red: 180 Artifact: 63 Multicolor: 41 Eldrazi: 1 Non basic Land: 4 Land: 100 (20 of each color) Token: 2 Quality breakdown: Common: 877 Uncommon: 148 Rare: 5 (1 of the rare is signed by the artist) Foil common: 2 Do not buy this if you are an advanced player that's looking for cards to use for tournament play. Many of the cards are not tournament legal. I personally like it better because I like to collect some of the older cards for their artwork. Some old cards date back to Ice Age (1995), 5th edition (1997) etc and range to the new ones like M11 and Scars of Mirrodin (2011). I like to recommend this but remember you don't know what you are actually getting. They are mostly commons and some cards are old and a few are not in the best condition. If you are looking to expand your collection and adding more old cards, go for these! Maybe I got lucky, but I'm very happy with what I got.
I thought this would be a good action film, it was a good B rated action film that you could sleep through. The first 20 min, there was more violence than I care to see....too much blood and gore.
Been using it for six months now and it's held up great, just wish it was shorter.

Been using these on my Bluebuds X for about eight months now and they still spring back like new. No stretching or tearing at all. My old ones would flatten out after a few weeks but these keep their shape perfectly.
Nice heavy weight fabric. Washes and dries perfectly. All of the stains came right out and they looked like brand new after use. I would highly recommen this item.
Things get a bit crazy and allot of revenge! Good season

This was definitely a short story; leaving the reader wanting a few more pages to just end the curiosity of what happens next. Would recomend this to anyone looking to read a story of calling the wrong guy and then frantically searching for him.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but these blew me away. Bass is punchy without drowning out vocals. Way better than my old pair.
Such a great read for under three bucks. The plot twists had me hooked from chapter one. Totally worth every penny.

Picked this up for my son's birthday and honestly it's just okay for what you pay. The sound effects are legitimately the best part, the engine revving and horn are surprisingly clear and my kid loves that aspect. But the track itself feels pretty flimsy and the connections pop apart constantly if you barely touch them. We've had to reassemble it probably ten times in two days. You only get a few straight pieces and a couple curves so the layout options are really limited. The cars themselves are decent quality plastic and roll smoothly, but I wish they'd included at least one more. My son still plays with it but I think the novelty will wear off fast once the sounds stop being exciting.

Works fine for occasional range trips and basic sight swaps. Not the most heavy-duty construction, but perfect for someone who just needs to make adjustments now and then without paying gunsmith prices.
Love the snails but am fighting a losing battle with baby snails. Never had this problem before with snails.

Got this for my reactive border collie who can't be off-leash but needs more freedom than a standard lead gives. The length is perfect for letting her explore while I still have a way to reel her in if another dog shows up. Material feels sturdy and the clip has held up great so far. No fraying after about four months of daily use on trails and at the beach. It's lightweight enough that it doesn't drag her down but thick enough I trust it won't snap if she hits the end at full speed. Honestly recommend this to anyone doing recall training or anyone with a dog that needs space but isn't reliable off-leash yet. Way better than the cheaper ones I tried before that tangled constantly.
Interesting dragon that makes noise and has movable parts. The wings were torn up quickly, but not due to how it's made. Sister got ahold of scissors and cut the wings.

I got these to replace a pair of grey suede boots that I loved but that have worn out. I have slender legs and have trouble finding boots that fit my calves without making me look like I'm standing in two buckets. These are fine tucked into skinny jeans. The heel is a reasonable height, and they are pretty boots. Contrary to what one reviewer said, I believe the suede portion is real but the buckel trim is man-made. The boot does say "leather/manmade upper). They didn't have the boot in 7.5 so I got size 7 and they fit fine. Nice boots on sale at a very reasonable price.
Great files, I use them to dress HSS Lathe bits and carbide tips, they are fantastic.
Great product for great price. You can also use this on your Raspberry PI.

Excellent series with a perfect conclusion! Loved the way everything worked out for Lizzie and Thomas. Loved how their trust for each other evolved. Loved them and their families and friends. Hate to see the series end...oh, wait...there is still Christmas to look forward to-- yep...I will definitely be preordering that story! Thanks, Rachel,for remaining true to the story through the end of the trilogy. I'm looking forward to reading more by this excellent author!
Got this as an everyday kitchen knife and it hasn't disappointed. Comfortable grip, slices through veggies smoothly. Wish it came with a better sheath though.

For the price I wasn't expecting luxury, but these sheets are disappointingly thin. They've held up okay after a few washes, though the fitted sheet is constantly popping off my mattress. They do the job for a guest bedroom or a tight budget, but I wouldn't want them on my own bed every night. Not the worst purchase I've made, but spending a little more would probably be worth it.
Bought this for my nephew's birthday and he absolutely devoured it.
A "count your blessings" beautifully written story with an exceptional ending.
I bought this as a gift for my friend. It was well received. She was very pleased with the bracelet.
Love this tea set as does my 2 1/2 year old. She never tires of tea parties and I don't have to worry that she's playing with toxic plastic!!

Bought this for my table saw since my shop is tiny and everything needs to roll. Assembly took maybe 30 minutes, and the hardware feels solid. The adjustable corners are handy if your equipment has odd dimensions, though you'll want to cut some small shims to get a truly snug fit. I bolted my saw directly to the top rails and it doesn't budge. The wheels roll fine on smooth concrete but struggle a bit on expansion cracks. Foot pedals for locking work as expected. I'd recommend this to hobbyists and small-shop owners who need to shove tools against the wall between projects. If you're running a production shop and moving heavy machines daily, spend more on something heavier-duty. For the price though, it does what it needs to do.

Reader.. and that is all that needed to be said for me to dive in even running on almost no sleep. I wish I could give this more than 5 stars. Besides the fact that the series is written so good, you can't help but be pulled in by the characters and push yourself to keeping going and see what happens next. This book is equal amounts of thrill, angst, and hot steamy sex scenes.
Bought this on a whim and blew through it in two sittings. Highly recommend for fans of Tom Clancy or Brad Thor. The tactical details feel authentic throughout.
Can't beat the price for cables this long. Works perfectly for charging across the room and the red shade makes them easy to spot.
This book is a must read, garret and Vanessa are great characters, their chemistry is electrifying. You have to read this book, it's awesome. Can't wait for part two.

I've had this paperback sitting on my nightstand for the better part of four months now. Read it twice through already and the binding is still holding up great no cracked spine or loose pages which is honestly rare for a book this thick that I've been carting around in my backpack. The story itself grabbed me from the start. Nesbo really knows how to pile on the twists without making it feel cheap. Harry is such a mess of a detective but that's exactly what makes him compelling. Some of the secondary characters could have used more page time honestly and there's a stretch in the middle that drags a bit. But the last hundred pages totally make up for it. Solid addition to the series overall.
Hard to clean metal shavings out of bit. magnet is really strong but shavings prevent screws from sitting true so you spend a lot of time cleaning the bit, pretty much after ever screw
Can't beat the quality at this price. Wore them all week with zero blisters. Look way more expensive than they are.
SanDisk 16 GB microSDHC Flash Memory Card SDSDQ-016G (Bulk Packaging) - Class 2 is a premium product, worth beyond their price... therefore it is highly recommended for their utility

I'm really enjoying this lens. It's been an excellent choice, and has given me a lot more options than just my Nikon 50mm 1.4 D prime. I use it as my all-time walk around lens now. Pros: Construction quality is great. No dust in the lens, built big and tough. I took it camping with me and it held up great. VC is fantastic. Not too loud for me. I like that I can hear it put itself into action. Photos are sharp and clean. Low light photos are no problem. The lens lock button works well so the lens doesn't creep, but don't really need it. The zoom ring is tight enough to hold it. Lens is easy to operate in manual focus mode too. Price price price! Much less expensive when compared to the Nikon counterpart that doesn't have VC. Cons: Focus is not prime-lens-fast, but definitely quick enough to get the fast shot off (just comparing to my prime 50mm 1.4). Doesn't focus well on far away mountains / clouds. Sometimes the focus has a hard time locking on to things my prime has no problems with. The lens is big, does add size and weight to my Nikon D300, but it balances well on the body. My photos with the lens are here: [...]. I label the photos with tags on the right, so you know which lens was used. I highly recommend this lens.

I picked this up expecting a generic buddy movie and was honestly blown away. The whole New Mexico to NYC fish-out-of-water setup works incredibly well because Harrelson and Sutherland play off each other so naturally. Sutherland's straight-laced intensity mixed with Harrelson's chaos creates this perfect dynamic that had me laughing way more than I anticipated. The plot about tracking down a missing friend and his daughter gives it enough weight to not just be a string of gags, and the action sequences are genuinely well done. I figured this would be one of those forgettable late-era westerns buried in the algorithm, but it punches way above what you'd expect. Great supporting cast too. Definitely worth the watch if you like your action with a sense of humor.
It took me through the process quickly and intelligently. Learned a lot about the photography business and this new approach
Wore these twice and the sole already started separating. Disappointed given the price.
Finally found a treat my picky tabby actually eats. The crunchy texture keeps her teeth clean too.

Thought this would be flimsier based on the low price, but it's actually pretty solid. Does exactly what it should, keeps splatters off the microwave walls. Sits a little tall, so double-check your interior clearance. No regrets picking this up.
A fitting name for this book. Glad Oliver got his happily ever after. I hope I get to see what happens to Jacob further down, that would make a great book.
Absolutely gorgeous bedding set. The comforter feels lightweight but keeps me warm, and it brightened up my whole bedroom instantly. Super happy with this purchase.
Would have been a 5 star had all the holes been sewn instead I'd grommets

Arrived a day early in a neat, compact box with zero damage. Pulled it out and was genuinely surprised by how solid it feels for something so lightweight. The finish looks way nicer in person, almost like a decor piece rather than utility. Set it up in seconds flat. Already grabbed it twice today for the top kitchen cabinets. Super impressed right out of the gate.
Fits my 43 perfect and is a nice personal touch. Priced right, all gtg

Today was "Wash the Dogbed Day." This bed holds up the best to washing and is the easiest to put back together. My dogs like it best too for some reason. So I just ordered another. For those of you with really old dogs, try using a standard crib mattress. If they are incontinent, you can get "rubber" crib sheets so the bed doesn't get ruined. Easy to maintain but not very pretty. Works though.

The bottle arrived cracked and leaking all over the box with zero padding. What little product was left smelled weird, almost like chemicals. Tried it on my Maltese anyway and her tear stains look exactly the same after a week. Total waste of money.
Very cleanly designed case. This will become my default go to case for pc builds
Thought this would be tiny like most doll accessories but it's actually a great size. The sounds are surprisingly realistic and my daughter won't put it down. Totally exceeded what I expected.
Absolutely love this bedspread! Fits perfectly on my queen bed and washes beautifully without shrinking. Lightweight but keeps me warm. Worth every penny.
My dog really loves this toy for a game of tug of war.

I really enjoy the multiple story lines in this book. Nuts when you think the case has been solved you wonder what could possibly fill the remaining 150 or so pages. Then you find out. Harry Hole is his own toughest critic. The tragic hero to whom we can all relate with his failures as spectacular as his successes. Nesbo's story telling has steadily improved. There is more flow and less confusion in the plot of this and the previous novel, The Snowman, which I also loved. I have read all of the Harry Hole novels through this one and I am on to the next. I am a big fan of "Nordic Noir" having read Larsson, Lars-Keppler, Adler-Olsen (except for his latest, The Marco Effect), and several of Indridason's Detective Erlendur novels: Nesbo ranks high on the list.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with zero damage. Opened it up and the kids went absolutely nuts. Super impressed with the build quality right out of the package.
This modem works great. I've had this quite a while now and never had a problem. Recommend if you need both wireless and wired connections.
My picky beagle eats them but only if I break them in half first.

Got this for my daughter's second birthday and she still plays with it months later. The pages hold up surprisingly well even with a toddler yanking on them. Stickers are thick enough that they don't tear when little fingers peel them off. Worth every penny for how long it's lasted us.

I recently relocated to another city which meant I had to relocate my home (garage) wood shop. My new garage has 9+ foot side walls so I decided to take advantage of this height by storing lumber on these Triton racks high on the wall. I could not be more pleased with this product. Assembly was very easy, although I had to wait a day to install them as there were no lag bolts included for mounting. Properly installed, this lumber rack is VERY strong and stable. I highly recommend it!

Honestly I had higher hopes for this one. The waffles come out nicely crisp on the outside and soft in the middle, no complaints there. But I expected the whole unit to have a nonstick coating based on the listing, and that front edge where you pour the batter is just regular plastic. Stuff bakes onto it fast and if you walk away to eat breakfast you're basically chipping it off later with a spoon. My old Cuisinart had zero issues in that department. On the plus side the footprint is way smaller, which is why I bought it, and the included cup dispenser thing is handy for getting the right amount. Four stars because it cooks well, just wish cleanup matched the hype.

Bought this router a couple weeks ago thinking it would be a solid upgrade. Boy was I wrong. Setup was a nightmare from the start. The web interface kept freezing every time I tried to configure the wireless settings. Eventually got it connected but the signal would drop randomly throughout the day. My old $30 router from five years ago performed better than this thing. Streaming was basically impossible and even basic browsing felt sluggish. Called support twice and both times I was on hold for over 45 minutes just to speak with someone who clearly was reading off a script. They had me reset it three separate times before suggesting I return it. Save yourself the headache and look elsewhere. Complete waste of money.
What's the next book in the series I got left hanging on a limb. I would have liked an explanation of why these bad cops did what they did.

I picked this up after stumbling across the real Judge Crater case on a podcast, and I really enjoyed how the author brought the era to life. The Prohibition-era NYC atmosphere is genuinely immersive, you can practically smell the speakeasies. What I loved most was Stella's perspective as the maid. She sees everything the wife and mistress miss, and her chapters were easily my favorite part. That said, the pacing drags in the middle when the mistress's storyline takes over. Her sections felt repetitive compared to the other two narrators, and I found myself skimming a few chapters. Still, the ending ties things together nicely without pretending to solve an unsolvable mystery. A solid read for anyone into historical fiction with a real-life mystery at its core.

I had a chance to try out this game, I love the original game of life and have the board game and iOS game. This version for juniors is a let down. The game itself has promise but e construction of the board is cheap, the spinner compared to the original version is just terrible, and the cards you use some are really good like find the butterfly on the board or finish a jingle. But others are hard to u dear stand what you are supposed to do, and the rewards/penalty could easily be written clearly but ey use images and it's a bit hard to follow. All in all yes you can play this game, but honestly I would pass on it. If they upped the quality, and didn't take shortcuts on the cards so it was easy to understand I'd say try it, but for now I have to say it's a don't buy.
The product showed up as scheduled. Boxed securely. It charged up quickly but there has not been time to test its endurance to the name brand.

Jim Knighthorse back again, in a much too brief appearance. As witty and brilliant as ever and always on top of his game. I also enjoyed seeing his 'friends' from previous adventures. I agree, the original ending is the best. I highly recommend this short story, you won't be disappointed!
This is the kind of glove I used years ago as a kid. They fit well and are comfortable. Great retro look as well.
Didn't expect much going in, but this totally blew me away. Way deeper and funnier than I thought it'd be. Glad I took the chance.

OK this book pissed me off I fell in love with Blaze the way he just took over Pearl it was awesome. I love Tank character and the way he just think it's okay to just for him to walk into Pearl's life and take over. Now Pearl she just needs to get herself together. Can't wait to see what happens when both men find her and how they will react to her wanting both of them that's going to be interesting. Recommend you read Tanks book 1st before understand Pearls Blaze book is AWESOME thanks
Had to shut this one off about 20 mins in. Thank goodness our Society is more vocal about not tolerating teacher's inappropriate behavior to the minor-aged student. It's not funny, it's a crime.
Arrived two days early in secure packaging. Set it up in minutes and my senior kitty took to it immediately. Super quiet motor too.
I scratched the first one. this is exactly like the original. high quality and easy to install. Thanks for carrying it.
Had this disc about two years now, plays perfectly every time. My kids rewatch it constantly and it still looks brand new.
Material feels cheap but the stitching is actually pretty solid.
Thought it'd be gimmicky but the color shift actually makes patching drywall foolproof.
Decent for the price but runs small. My kitten barely fits and won't use it.
Been wearing this ring daily for about three months now, including showers and dishes. Not a single scratch or bit of tarnish. Solid quality for the price.
Wire started poking out after two washes. Super cheap material and totally unwearable now. Don't waste your money.

Got this on a Kindle deal for like two bucks and honestly it was worth way more than that. The story grabs you pretty fast, there's this creeping tension that builds as you realize how toxic the relationship at the center really is. I found myself genuinely frustrated at points, which I think means the author did their job. Some of the dialogue felt a little clunky in spots and I wanted a bit more from the ending, but for the price I paid I really can't complain. Read it in two sittings over a weekend. If you're into domestic suspense type stuff that doesn't get too graphic, this hits the mark. Would definitely recommend grabbing it if you see it on sale. Four solid stars from me.
Got this for five bucks and it was totally worth it. Solid cast, good story. Definitely recommend picking it up cheap.

Paid way too much for what's basically cheap plastic. The threads stripped out almost immediately when I tried hooking it up, and water just poured from every joint. For the money they're asking, I expected solid metal fittings at minimum. Total waste of cash, go with a different brand unless you enjoy returning stuff.

This is a great interactive food puzzle and works wonders on our high-energy year old pup! Keeps him occupied while we visit with houseguests and instead of jumping up and carrying on, he's learning that guests mean the treat ball comes out
These were not quite what I hoped for. They roll down my belly area and don't stay put. I got wedgies from these.
Disappointed in the deviation from the book. Hey I get it.. you have all of these successful characters from "LOTR" still a cool movie.

I use it for deads and squats, it holds solid similar to a buckle leather belt, but the quick latch makes it way easier close and open... when I rest between sets I flip the latch and get space while the belt stays attached, so when I set up it's easy to flip back to tight and get it. The quality is legit, could say it in more words but I'll just say it's built well, looks nice, and I suspect it will last me years to come... My lifting coach liked it so much he is/has bought himself one.

I've had these for about six months now, wearing them 3-4 times a week for lifting and running. No pilling, no stretched-out waistband, seams still totally intact. Compression hasn't faded at all. Genuinely impressed.
Bought 2 and sent one back because it didn't work
The ads made this thing look way better than it actually is. Feels super cheap and stopped working after a week. Honestly expected a lot better for the hype.
Watched it a dozen times, disc still plays perfectly. Michael at his best.

I have just started this book and hope I don't have to read too many graphic autopsy reports. I didn't read The Surgeon but found I didn't have to as this book so far has made numerous references to it. It seems most of these stories are written by women and always have female M.E.s doing the autopsies?
Bought this for my son's birthday. Three months of rough play and not a single piece broken.
Arrived quickly in a sturdy box, hat looks even better in person.

I love the NIV One-a-Day Chronological Bible. I am able to read thru the Bible in my favorite translation in the order it was written in 1 year. It is a great Book to read. I recommend it to everyone.

Arrived two days earlier than expected and was double-boxed, so no dents or scratches anywhere. The stainless finish looks really sharp in person and feels solid, not flimsy. Came with everything secured inside, basket, cord, and manual all accounted for. Washed it out and did a quick test run with some chicken tenders right away. Heated up reasonably fast and the basket slides smoothly. Only knocked off a star because the footprint is bigger than I expected, so measure your counter first. Happy with it overall.

I've had this deadbolt running on my SmartThings hub for about six months now and it's been completely trouble-free. Setup took maybe fifteen minutes, and the Z-Wave range is way better than the Yale lock I replaced. What really sold me though is how forgiving the motor is. My back door has always sat slightly crooked in the frame, and my old electronic lock would just jam and beep angrily. The keypad lights up nicely at night, batteries are still showing full after daily use, and the whole thing just feels substantial.

I'm an avid reader of narrative nonfiction, and this one instantly shot to the top of my favorites list. A buddy in my reading group suggested it last month, and honestly, I finished the whole thing in a single weekend. The pacing is absolutely relentless in the best way. The author weaves together disparate threads, personalities, timelines, historical context, without ever losing momentum or getting bogged down in minutiae. I felt completely transported. I'd strongly recommend this to anyone who enjoys gripping, well-researched accounts of real events. If you're a fan of authors like Erik Larson or David Grann, this is right up your alley. It's also a fantastic gateway book for fiction lovers looking to dip their toes into nonfiction. Just clear your schedule before starting it.

I had to read this for a book club and honestly wasn't looking forward to it. I remembered Hemingway being dry and boring from high school. Man, was I wrong. What got me this time around was how he handles the silent moments between the old man and the boy. There's this one part where no words are exchanged but you understand everything about their relationship through a simple gesture with the fishing gear. That takes serious skill. The fishing scenes themselves are surprisingly tense too, I found myself actually rooting for this guy to land the fish even though I knew how these stories usually go. Short enough to finish in an afternoon but it sticks with you for days after. Glad I gave it another shot.

Just finished reading. I felt as if I was a part of the story about what it took to survive in Nazi Germany from the perspective of a German woman and her daughter. Will her daughter ever know that she was not the daughter of a Nazi butcher? Perspective of those in the Resistance, which had a fine line to walk to survive and help so many unseen.

Among Wolves is the first book in the series Children of the Mountain. Story is penned by R.A.Hakok, this book is a suspenseful thriller that would send a chill along your spine while reading. The story is spun around Gabriel, a sixteen year old boy who overcomes his fears and saved his loved ones. The book contains suspense, thrill, excitement and even humor making this a blend of a good work piece. As Gabriel finds the truth about the missing Secret Service person as his body is found frozen in the mountain with the bullet story in the head, the plot makes an opening. This suspenseful book will make you want to read from beginning to end to find out the mystery and the dark secrets hidden. Get ready for lot of twists and turns which are embedded in this novel, a real enjoyment for those who like post-apocalyptic stories. Theres a bit of romance in the story, lot of action and an entertaining mystery appropriate for all age groups to read through. The story flows to shows the reality that might happen if a nuclear winter ever comes to pass. You can see the world through the adolescent age Gabriel who has a wider view on the concepts of the outside world. The book brings out a remarkable piece of fiction that can be enjoyed reading. Among Wolves bring out a well set plot with gradual character development making you get familiarized with the roles and to understand the situation. This book is a great read for thriller lovers! I rate it 5 out of 5 for the entertaining value it has and I'll be waiting for the next installment to read. Thanks.

`Intacto', the Spanish language film directed by Juan Carlos Fresnadillo is an ingenious take on an idea seemingly borrowed from `The Deer Hunter', with a bit of subtle sci-fi theming worthy of Rod Serling's `The Twilight Zone'. The impact of the supernatural theme is made convincing by the appearance of the great Max Von Sydow in an important supporting role. His appearance in all those spooky early Ingemar Bergman movies makes his character all that more credible. The story is a bit thin. All the interest in the movie revolves around the characters' participation in highly dangerous, some even fatal games of chance, much like the Russian roulette theme from `The Deer Hunter'. While the attraction in `The Deer Hunter' is purely an addiction to the thrill of the risk, the attraction is both more subtle and stronger in `Intacto'. I'm a big fan of the director's commentary on movies like this, but I found the commentary just a bit thin here. It did very little to explain the basic premise, it's development, or its origins. The movie is not as deep or as emotionally involving as Bergman's `The Magician' or `The Virgin Spring' or Fellini's `La Dolce Vita'. The characters are thrill seekers with little depth, but the subtly supernatural premise and the way the story is told makes the trip interesting.

This thing is pretty easy to assemble, and pretty easy to charge. Got it to take off, but it tends to bank pretty hard in a random direction even in no wind. Lots to compensate for. Well, there was a lot to compensate for...before it caught fire. After about 5-10 minutes of flying, it came in for a landing, tilted a few inches from the ground, caught the grass and flipped. Not a hard landing at all, and no physical damage. On picking it back up, the propellers were spinning at full speed (with the throttle off) and smoke was coming out of the battery compartment. I quickly removed the battery, and could see where the circuit board had caught fire. So, this one is being retired after one use. I'm not risking hurting someone or damaging property. On the other hand, if you're looking for something to catch fire in mid air (maybe for a movie or something), this could be the perfect product for you.

Picture quality on my 1080p set is noticeably sharper too. The remote feels a little chintzy though, and I miss having a dedicated Netflix button since I still use physical media alongside streaming. It handles scratched rental discs better than my previous player did, which was a pleasant surprise. Not perfect, but honestly for the price I wasn't expecting reference-level performance. The marketing makes it sound like a powerhouse that can handle anything, but reality is completely different. Vivienne and Ray have known each other all their lives and fell in love with each other before they were old enough to even know what love was. Now as high school is coming to a close the pair have decided to attend a party but when Vivienne separates from Ray to use the restroom their world is torn apart in an instant. Twenty years after the massive event happened that claimed the lives of a lot of the other teens in attendance at the part Vivienne appears out of nowhere. Everyone she knew has aged even though she hasn't at all. Vivienne longs for Ray to also return but when he doesnt she dedicates her life to figuring out time travel to hopefully save Ray from whatever event had sucked her into the future. A Betrayal of Time by Lucia Ashta is a novella length fantasy read that had a great story of lovers ripped apart but would do anything to be together again. The town thought it was an earthquake that had stolen the lives of their children until the day Vivienne appeared again. Once it was known that she wasn't the only one whos body hadnt been recovered she dedicates her life to figuring out what had happened. While being a short read the author did a wonderful job weaving together the time travel along with letting the readers know enough about the characters to care about their outcome. This is definitely one Id recommend to the fantasy/time travel lovers out there. I received a copy from the publisher via NetGalley.
Bought these on a whim and now I use them daily. The seal is incredibly strong, even on odd-shaped bowls. Love that I can see what's inside without lifting the lid.

this seemed like one of the more higher end dog food since it cost twice as much as the dog food I got the first time I got my shelter dog.. She's a terrier mix (my vet tells me terriers are picky with food? I'm not entirely sure being a first-time dog owner), so I'm trying out different dog food that she'll like.. I saw great rating on this dog food, so I tried giving it a go, but she barely eats any! She'll only eat about a quarter of a cup an entire day, and start eating the grass outside when I take her out... I fed her the indoor mini dog royal canin stuff before, and that one smelled much nicer like a can of tuna (which made her poop smell nicer) and she actually ate her portions when I gave that to her. I was just hoping if I was going to spend that much money on dog food, I might as well find her the best one for her, but this one is a total miss. I might give another brand besides royal canin a try (since it's so expensive...), but I'm going to stay away from the taste of the wild...
Glad to get it love the old movie can in on time.good people to work with will use them again

Got this for my husband who works private security and he's been wearing it almost every day for the past six months. The thing still looks practically new after dozens of washes. No pilling, no loose threads, no fading at all. He's pretty rough on his clothes too, crawling around, tackling obstacles on the job, and this shirt takes a beating without showing it. The fabric is thick but breathable enough for summer wear. Those concealed chest pockets are honestly genius for stashing a phone or wallet securely. Yeah it stings a little at checkout but I've already replaced cheaper tactical shirts twice in the same timeframe, so do the math. Just ordered a second one in black. Fit runs true to size, maybe slightly snug in shoulders if you're broad.

Got this for my 70lb lab who dragged me everywhere. First walk was a huge difference, she still tries but can't build up momentum. Highly recommend to anyone with a strong, excitable dog that makes walks miserable. Took about three days for her to stop pawing at it. Worth every penny.

My vet told me to bring my anxious ragdoll in a enclosed carrier instead of his normal open-top bag, and this thing totally changed office visits for us. The setup took maybe two minutes and it folds practically flat when I'm not using it. What I really love is how dark and cozy it gets once you pull the flaps down, my cat actually fell asleep during the car ride instead of crying the whole way. The zippers feel sturdy enough that I'm not worried about him busting out, and the padding on the bottom washes clean after the inevitable accident. Fits perfectly on my back seat too. Honestly wish I'd bought this years ago instead of dealing with that clunky plastic tub I used to dread dragging out.
Purchased arrived on time and in excellent condition! Recipient loved it! Great price also!
Bought this for my niece's Christmas collection and she adores it. The accessories are adorable and the quality is way better than expected. Super soft too.

Picked this up as a stocking stuffer and honestly for the price I wasn't expecting much. It does technically inflate a basketball or bike tire if you're patient enough, but anything bigger is a lost cause. Tried airing up my truck spare in the driveway and after about eight minutes it was barely lukewarm to the touch and the tire still looked flat. The motor smells like burning plastic if you push it past a few minutes. Build quality is exactly what you'd expect for under twenty bucks, mostly hollow feeling plastic. That said, it's handy to toss in the glovebox for emergencies and the LED light is a nice touch. Just don't rely on this as your main inflator because you'll be disappointed.

These tube baits have been my GO TO baits for 10 years. Been having trouble finding these lately and I have noticed Zoom has changed the plastic blend. These are now heavily salted and resemble other brands of tube. The old blend was a better, softer bait. I do know I paid way too much money from this Amazon supplier.
Arrived crushed in a flimsy envelope. Unraveled the first sheet and the whole roll fell apart instantly. Junk.
Arrived fast in a sturdy sleeve with no scratches. Watched it the same night and was completely blown away.

Was hesitant to drop money on another SSD since prices have been all over the place lately, but this thing is an absolute steal. Popped it into my aging Dell XPS from 2014 and the difference is night and day. Boot times went from roughly two minutes to maybe fifteen seconds. My wife's laptop was practically unusable with that old spinning disk, and now it runs like a brand new machine. For what you're paying here compared to the big name brands, the performance is honestly indistinguishable. I've been running it hard for about six weeks now with heavy photo editing in Lightroom and zero slowdowns or hiccups. If you're on the fence about upgrading an older computer, just buy it. At this price point you literally can't go wrong.
Got this for my 7-year-old daughter and she's obsessed. Perfect gift for any young reader.

Been using this webcam daily for almost eight months now for work calls and streaming, and it's held up amazingly well. I've knocked it off my monitor probably a dozen times onto a hardwood floor and there's not a scratch on it. The mount still grips tight and the lens hasn't picked up any weird fogging or dust issues internally. Picture stays crisp at 1080p even in my dim office lighting, and the autofocus is quick without that annoying hunting back and forth. Audio through the built in mic is clean enough that I stopped using my separate one. My old camera from a different brand died after like four months so I was nervous spending the money, but this thing is built like a tank. No regrets at all.
Works okay for keeping things dry but I've noticed some musty smells building up. Expected better moisture control for the price. Decent but not great.

Ordered this as a birthday gift for my niece and was honestly impressed right out of the box. It arrived two days earlier than expected, shrink-wrapped, and in a sturdy mailer with zero corner dings, which is rare for books these days. The cover art immediately caught my eye when I opened it, and the paper quality is noticeably thick and glossy. I flipped through a few pages before wrapping it and ended up sitting on the couch for twenty minutes just soaking it in. The way each artist shares their personal journey is really intimate and raw. My niece is six and maybe a little young for some of it, but I know she'll grow into it. Honestly might grab a second copy for myself now.

A truely enjoyable read. A fine young hero with a strange, but strong moral code, amusingly turned from a remorseless cold blooded killer to a hero with a few misheard garbled dying words. I love his emotionly stunted emergance into the real world and the wide eyed innocence of his first encounter with "friends". I intend to follow the series and sincerely hope the author continues in the same playful, yet deadly, vein.

Got this mounted in my bedroom last weekend and it's been solid. My 55-inch feels completely secure on the wall. Swiveling is smooth and the arm extends nicely for viewing from different angles. Only reason I'm knocking off a star is the instructions could be clearer, took some guessing during setup. Otherwise, great mount for the price. Would buy again.
Great book. Love this author and will continue to support her work.
Decent story but pretty forgettable. I'd recommend it to casual readers looking for a quick weekend distraction.

Solid pair of gloves for the price. I bought these mainly for yard work and hauling firewood. The grip is excellent and they breathe well enough in summer heat. Ran slightly big on me so consider sizing down. Would definitely recommend to DIYers and weekend warriors who need decent hand protection without spending a fortune.
Been using this piano gym daily for six months and it still works perfectly. Keys hold up great even with constant kicking.
Been using this daily for six months. Blade holds an edge and the mechanism is still solid.

My vet told me to find a slow feeder because my lab was inhaling his meals and throwing up right after. Honestly I figured these things were kind of a gimmick and didn't expect much, but I was completely wrong. The first time I used this it took him a solid six minutes to finish instead of his usual thirty seconds. The rubber texture seems gentle on his face and nose, which I was worried about since some plastic ones look rough. I also like that it sits flat and doesn't slide across my kitchen floor. Cleanup is easy, just warm soapy water. My dog seems to actually enjoy the challenge now instead of just panicking through dinner. Genuinely exceeded what I thought it would do.

Got this on my Kindle instantly which was great because I'd been waiting for weeks to read it. No packaging issues obviously since it's digital, but the download was smooth and the formatting looked clean on my Paperwhite. No weird line breaks or typos like you sometimes get with cheaper ebooks. Started reading it the same night and honestly couldn't put it down for the first few chapters. Sugar's voice just grabs you right away. The subject matter is heavy but Hall handles it with so much heart that it never feels exploitative. I've already recommended it to two friends and my book club is picking it for next month. Really glad I took a chance on this one. Five stars easy.
Absolutely love this bag. Hauls my bulky mat, towel, water bottle, and blocks with room to spare. Comfortable to carry and seems really well built. Highly recommend.

I've been following this series since book one and this installment didn't disappoint. The relationship between Ashaya and Dorian felt genuine and I appreciated how Singh handled the whole dynamic with the Silence protocol and his latent changeling status. There's a good balance of romance and world-building here, maybe slightly heavier on the politics than some of the earlier books, which dragged a bit in the middle for me, but the last third really picks up. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who's already invested in the Psy-Changeling world. If you're new to the series, don't start here, go back to Slave to Sensation or you'll be completely lost. Fans of slow-burn romance with a sci-fi edge will get a lot out of this one. Four solid stars.
Arrived two days early in secure packaging. Really impressed with the build quality straight out of the box. Fits all my camera gear perfectly.

Paid way too much for something this poorly made. The edges on these chargers are razor thin and sliced up my thumb before I even got it mounted. For what they charge, you'd expect at least basic finishing on the metal parts. Cheap construction all around and honestly a lawsuit waiting to happen. I've bought plenty of similar items at a fraction of the cost that didn't require a tetanus shot afterward. Save your money.
Bought a new raceband video transmitter and needed these to connect the antenna properly, these are great!

Replaced an old Delta with this Moen about six months ago. Overall I'm happy with it but it didn't blow me away like I expected given the price tag. The spot resist finish actually works pretty well, way fewer water spots than my last faucet. Pull down sprayer has good retraction and the hose moves smoothly. My main gripe is the water flow feels a bit weaker than I anticipated, even after removing the aerator screen. Installation was straightforward though, took maybe 45 minutes solo. The handle action is smooth and the lever stays put where you set it. Docking one star because I expected more pressure and the sprayer pattern could be wider. Solid faucet, just not sure it's worth the premium over other options. Would still recommend it.
Stayed up way too late finishing this. The story pulls you in immediately and doesn't let go. Every character felt real and flawed in the best way. That ending completely caught me off guard.
Soft and easy to clean. My 12 month old loves them!
Thought I'd miss my old iPod but honestly this little thing blows it out of the water. Sound quality is way better than expected and the battery just refuses to die.

I've been running this canister on my 75 gallon cichlid tank for about four months now and I'm honestly impressed. Set up took maybe twenty minutes once I figured out the priming. The thing is huge, so make sure you measure your cabinet before buying. Water clarity went from decent to crystal clear within two days of switching it on. I packed the baskets with filter floss, ceramic media, and a coarse sponge, and the flow rate hasn't dropped off at all. My nitrates even seem more stable. The only slight annoyance is the hoses are pretty stiff out of the box but once you get them seated they stay put. For the price point this thing outperforms canisters costing twice as much. Would definitely buy again.
Got this for my daughter's birthday and she plays with it constantly. For under twenty bucks you really can't beat it. Plenty of entertainment and holds up well to rough play.

Got these for my 4-year-old's birthday and she plays with them every single day. The colors are bright and the size is perfect for little hands. Highly recommend for any preschool classroom or family with toddlers who like building and stacking.

I bought this case a while ago for my Macbook. I loved it. It was durable and protected my Mac. The stand was also a plus on flat surfaces. Unfortunately, with age it broke. Also if you don't clean it often crud will pile up and it's noticeable because this product is see through.

This Howard Leight Patriotic safety glasses kit is a nice set to show your patriotism at the shooting range. The glasses are well made and comfortable. The earplugs are a plus, but I don't know anyone will see the patriotic earplugs in my ear. Most importantly, they reduce the noise to a bearable level.
Arrived quickly in a neat little box. Opened it and the colors are even prettier in person. Love it.
Wow so good better than Last Call. So happy for Gavin because once he fell for Ben he did not see anyone else n like Ben said, Gavin was it for him. Top the last one. Thoroughly enjoyed Delicious.

Shipped fast and showed up in a compact box with all the poles and stakes neatly bundled together. No damage or missing pieces which is always a relief. First impressions were solid, the canopy material feels thick and not cheap like some other beach tents I've owned. Popped it open in the backyard to test it before our trip and had it standing in under five minutes. The fiberglass frame is surprisingly sturdy and the anchored corners hold well even in a decent breeze. Roomy enough for two people with gear and a cooler. Knocking off one star because the side panels don't offer quite as much shade coverage as I expected based on the photos, but it still does the job for most situations. Overall happy with the purchase.

Bought this three months ago and honestly it's just okay. The coffee itself comes out decent when everything works right, but the whole process is way more finicky than it should be. The basket has to be seated perfectly or water leaks everywhere, and the carafe lid is stubborn to get on and off. I've also noticed the warming plate doesn't keep the coffee as hot as my old Mr. Coffee did. Cleaning all the extra parts is a hassle compared to a basic drip machine, and the water reservoir is awkward to fill without spilling. It's not terrible, and I do still use it every morning, but for the price I expected something that felt less cheap and worked more smoothly. Wouldn't buy again.
Thought it'd be another gimmick but my chin breakouts actually cleared up fast.
Arrived two days early in secure packaging. The roller feels solid and well-built right out of the box. Grips are comfortable and it rolls smoothly.
This product was recommended by my holistic vet for my dogs liver. I highly recommend it.
Love them. Their durable, I will buy another color for future builds.

It's like watching a ABC After School Special trying its best to be horror. It's goreless, boring and so bad it's not even good variety. What's more scary then the movie is the people who gave this film 5 stars. 48% of 50 some reviews gave it 5 stars?!? How is that even possible that at least 25 people on this planet, and I know there are more, think this is as good as such horror films that generally get 5 stars from fans and critics like Halloween, A Nightmare On Elm St, The Exorcist ect... Obviously there is a second edit of this movie floating around that I'm not privy to. A edit that incorporates everything that makes a 5 star horror film. Gore, suspense, good acting ect..... Man I would love to see that version!

I love westerns and the premise drew me in. This is the first book I've read by Elizabeth Rose and I am looking forward to reading more. She captured the Old West with a descriptive and believable setting. Rena dresses as a boy and helps her brother, who is falsely convicted of murder, escape the gallows. Now she has the bounty hunter on her tail! I felt connected to the spunky heroine and the hero who is surprisingly a bounty hunter. While this was a clean romance I did feel the sparks building at the end of the story and had wished it was a bit longer to show more of the budding romance.
Way cuter in person than I expected. Fits perfectly and the quality surprised me for the price.

Honestly I wasn't sure what to expect for the price but this thing exceeded what I had in mind. My last build was in a cheap budget case and the difference is night and day. Cable management actually works here instead of being an afterthought like on my old one. The side panel came a little scuffed right out of the box which was annoying but not worth returning over. Airflow is solid with three fans pre-installed, though the front intake could pull air a little better if the mesh was more open. Building in it was straightforward and everything lined up fine. Overall it feels like a premium case without the premium price tag. Would recommend to anyone upgrading from a budget setup.
Bought these for my weekly hiking trips and they literally fell apart on the first use. Would only recommend these to someone who enjoys wasting money on garbage. Complete ripoff, don't bother.

Picked this up on a whim and honestly it's worth every penny. The story grabs you right from the start and doesn't let go. Knowing it's based on real events hits different. For the price, you're getting a genuinely well-made film that sticks with you long after credits roll.
Bought this for the crisp Blu-ray transfer and was not disappointed. The picture quality is sharp, colors look natural, and the audio mix holds up beautifully. A solid upgrade from my old DVD copy.

Bought this for my electric leaf blower and it's been solid. The construction feels durable and the connectors fit snugly without any looseness. I've used it in damp conditions without issues. No complaints so far and the length is perfect for reaching around the yard. Would definitely buy again.
I like this shampooer. I no longer have carpet but if I ever do, I will definitely get another one. I also used it for cleaning my microfiber furniture.

Bought this for my grandson's birthday and honestly I have mixed feelings. The wheels roll really smoothly and the plastic feels surprisingly sturdy, not like the flimsy stuff you usually find at this price. My biggest gripe is the dump bed capacity. It is way too shallow for any serious sandbox play. He can maybe fit a couple handfuls of sand before it just slides right off the sides. The latch mechanism that holds the bed up works fine but the angle is pretty shallow too so sand doesn't really pour out cleanly. For the price it is an okay backyard toy but do not expect the heavy-duty hauling experience.
Arrived super fast in a sturdy little box. The slide-on plate looks great and feels solid. Slipped right onto the collar with no hassle.
Held up nicely after three months of daily wear. Looks good.
Fine for passing time on a commute. I'd suggest it to casual readers wanting something light and undemanding.

After the other 2 books in the series, I was expecting to be blown away. Unfortunately, I just found these characters to be be really whiney. Especially the hero. Even the love scenes weren't as good as the scenes in the other 2 books. This just wasn't a good way to wrap up the series. I was disappointed. I gave 3 stars because I like the author.

Perfect fit for my truck's cup holders. The rubber grip on the bottom keeps everything from sliding around on bumpy roads. Super easy to install and feels durable. Exactly what I needed for organizing cables.

Yea, pretty basic stuff I guess. I wish I had this info presented to me so organized and clear when I was a teen. I can't even fathom the pain and suffering I could have avoided. A great gift for any young person who matters in your life. Most adults could learn a thing or two as well.
Used this to replace a sensor that had gone bad on a Heath Zenith outdoor light. Works perfectly as described. The dual-bright function is a great feature.

I was so excited when I saw that this eARC had dropped on to my Kindle. From the first page, I was drawn in to the world of Keely & Ronan and just from the prologue I was like "dammmnnnn this is gonna be good" I read this book in a few hours, non stop. Whilst I really enjoyed aspects of it, I also felt like something was lacking to give it that X Factor ya know? I was intrigued to find out what happened for Ronan to leave all them years ago, however when it finally came out I was like hmm okay then. Also, 60% before we get some bow chicka wow wow, and even that was just a finger bang! Still had to wait a wee while for some full on loving;) I freaking loved Ronan with Emma, right from the get go - so freaking swoonworthy!! and the Epilogue part - gah perfection!! Ok, so yeah - whilst i Loved the story in general, I felt it was lacking in the usual Ella Fox finesse.
Harness didn't fit me right. Adjustment buckle ended up under my arm pit.
The collar lost its shape after one wash. Fabric feels paper-thin and the stitching started unraveling immediately. Definitely not worth the price.

Can't believe this was under ten bucks. Grabbed it as a stocking stuffer and it's become the go-to bath toy in our house. Floats perfectly, dries quick, and hasn't cracked or faded after months of daily use. Both my kids fight over it constantly. Absolute steal for the quality.
Update, my last 5 containers were bent on each end which made my cupcakes lean. So happen I just ordered from Websturant and was able to use the new ones.
We tried playing playing this game at every level and no one could get into it.

The Forgotten Jesus helped me exchange my Western viewpoint of scripture for that of a Torah-faithful Jew. Gallaty doesnt reinterpret the Bible, rather he explains the significance and symbolism of Jesus words, actions, and the Rabbinical methods of instruction he employed. By doing so, he made connections and provided insights which I wouldn't have made on my own. It took me a few days to tackle roughly 200 pages of text (not counting the reading plan or extensive endnotes) because I read with my Bible open and a notepad ready. At the end, I am left with 24 post-flags and two pages of shorthand notes Id like to discuss with my book group. Not since reading Sitting at the Feet of Rabbi Jesus (co-authored by Ann Spangler and Lois Tverberg) have I been so completely enthralled by the community and culture of first-century Judaism. I cannot wait to encounter these portions of scripture in my reading plan with fresh eyes. Highly recommend! I received a copy of this book for free, a favorable review was not required of me. All opinions expressed are my own.

For the price I paid I expected better performance. Got this for backpacking trips because it seemed like a solid deal compared to the Sawyer. Big mistake. The squeeze pouch is flimsy and the whole setup feels cheap. First time out at a creek it took forever to get anything through, and I was practically wrestling the bag to make it work. Flow rate dropped to almost nothing within the first liter even though the water wasn't that murky. Yeah it's affordable, but honestly you're better off spending a little more on something that actually functions reliably. I brought it as my main filter and ended up boiling water instead. Keeps it as a maybe backup for day hikes but I wouldn't trust it for anything serious.

Had a moving tank animation picture that I got on online garage sale and loved it. The light burned out and my kids were bummed (5 and 4 year old boys) couldn't find the replacement bulb so went on the hunt for one. Worried this was going to be too small but it's actually very nice. Doesn't plug in, takes 6 C batteries so we shall see if that's cost effective to keep it going. But I do like the timer setting so it shuts off. So far so good
Pretty intense book, I couldn't finish it because it was graphic in parts.

I've had this GLW light running for about six months now in my garage workshop, and I'm genuinely impressed with how it's holding up. We've had some pretty wild temperature swings here in the Midwest and I was worried the unit wouldn't last, but it fires right up every single time with no flickering. The housing feels solid and hasn't shown any signs of condensation or discoloration. My only minor complaint is that the mounting brackets are a bit flimsy for how heavy the fixture is, I ended up using my own hardware to get it secured properly. The brightness is fantastic though, and it covers my two-car garage evenly with no dark spots. For the price point, the longevity alone makes it worth it. Would definitely buy again.

This kit includes plenty of items to decorate, bedazzle and wear. A great little gift for any up and coming little fashionista. If you have a little girl, or even a little boy, who likes to play dress up and look pretty, then this is a fun kit with enough bling to make them look and feel special. They can make their own one-of-a-kind jewelry just how they want it. The kit includes pieces for making bracelets, necklaces, brooches and hair accessories. It also includes some fake nails and nail polish. I do think it's a stretch to say this is for 8 years and up, though. I think an 8-year-old or older child would feel this is too babyish for them. But I think a younger child in the age range from 5 to 7 might be a better target.

What a fun idea - great for adults and children! This is a fun/convenient way to make S'Mores any time of year. I love how it keeps everything contained and organized. It is so easy to use! You can make yummy S'mores at any time, without the mess of a campfire. We used this with kids on one event and then with adults for a "Gourmet S'more" party - I think the adults had more fun with it than the kids! I am very pleased with this product and would recommend it to friends and family! I did receive this item for no charge from Tryazon - this is my honest opinion

Home Movies got better and better, and was cut to short at four seasons. All four sets have tons of extra material on every disc. If you're a fan, you will be more than pleased. I wish they would have removed the beeps over explicit words.
Way better quality than I expected for the price. Fit perfectly.

These bags are surprisingly thick compared to other brands I've tried. No ripping when I tear them off the roll, and they actually contain the smell pretty well. Will definitely reorder when I run low.

I personally found this book to be superb for teaching me more of the best ways to get a ripped body using nothing other than kettle bells. Another added benefit for me was the fact that the book is 100+ pages- not too long and not too short. It gives you enough tips and tricks without stuffing your head with unnecessary facts and info. The workouts were very easy to follow and the photographs really helped me to get a better idea of how to do the moves. I found this to be an absolutely fantastic book for kettle bell training and would recommend it to others without hesitation.

I'll say upfront that the dial looks sharp in person and I get compliments on the face design. That's where the positives end for me. The lume is basically nonexistent, after about ten minutes in the dark, you can't read the time at all. My bigger issue though is the bracelet. It feels flimsy and hollow, and the clasp doesn't inspire confidence. I kept checking it throughout the day because it felt like it could pop open. For a watch at this price point, I expected something with a little more weight and substance on the wrist. Also, no manual included, so figuring out the date complication was a frustrating guessing game. Disappointing overall, especially given how nice the dial itself looks.

Bought this for my road bike after my old frame pump gave out, and I'm genuinely impressed. Despite the compact footprint, it pushes serious pressure without feeling like a workout. The convertible design lets you anchor it and use your whole body weight, which makes hitting high PSI way more manageable than a standard mini. It tucks neatly alongside my bottle cage with no interference, even on a medium frame. Build quality feels solid for the cost. I'd strongly recommend this to touring cyclists and daily commuters who want a reliable backup that won't weigh them down or take up valuable real estate on the frame. Definitely worth every penny.
Boaring... I didn't even finish the movie... not going to either.
I bought this for my suv I ask the the men who was install my alarm so he said the fuse in my car is too sensitive to jump so I still have in the box the camara working fine

This book dealt with the serious issue of racial inequality in our country. Hayes touched on many serious instances of this inequality, and provided historical antecedents for their existence. But, he jumped from issue to issue, without a smooth transition between topics. Just when I thought I knew what the focus of the book was, he inserted another issue into the mix. While these issues were seemingly related, I thought the inclusion of so many topics and reflections made for a choppy flow.

I bought this duffel two years ago to haul camping gear back and forth to the trunk, and it's held up way better than I expected. After multiple trips being stuffed to the brim with tents, sleeping bags, cookware, and firewood, there's not a single blown seam or frayed edge anywhere. The canvas material is thick enough that it doesn't puncture when I'm shoving sharp-ish items inside, and the bottom has survived being dragged across pavement more times than I can count. The zippers still glide smoothly too, which honestly surprises me given how much I overpack this thing. I've started using it as my go-to storage bag for seasonal blankets and bulkier items around the house too. For the price point, you really can't beat the construction. Definitely recommend.
These stories have a lot of twists and turns. They keep you engaged. Really enjoying them more and more.

Just as the tidewater ebbs and flows with the moon's phases, love and family relationships ebb and flow depending on the choices made and the reasons for making them. The condition of the heart, whether selfless or selfish, colors the outcome and affects other lives. Everything one does touches the other's life for good or for ill.
