Lisa Wingate has told a tale about two sisters who illustrate the consequences of taking opposite roads, one self serving, the other one selfless. It's a tale to cause the reader to think, really a parable that shines like an iridescent blood moon on calm waters giving warning to choose wisely and without self serving agenda. Well written and worthwhile story.

So there is a reason this food is a #1 best seller in dry dog food. It's not just because of the price for the size bag but it's the taste and scent the dogs go crazy for. Diamond pet foods had one bad recall a few gets back and everyone wants to judge them based on that. Doesn't just about everything everywhere get a recall at some point in its life span? My chocolate lab Bruce wasn't eating Wild Calling! And Natures Variety Instinct gave him the worst soft stool ever. I ordered this on Prime Now and it came to my doorstep in just under an hour. From the moment his food arrived Bruce was going crazy for the bag. Now he whines for his food before breakfast & dinner. He just can't get enough of the taste. Do yourselves all a favor and if your reading this review, BUY THIS GREAT PRODUCT FOR YOIR BEST FRIEND:)
Bought this for my daughter's backpacking trips. After a full year of rough trail use, no tears or broken zippers. Still looks practically new. Totally worth it.

For the price, this hutch is excellent. Not super-sturdy, but I'm not gonna be tossing it on the back of a truck and driving across the country....so.. yeah, it's a great indoor home for my little tortoise this winter!
Can't beat this for the price. Popped it on in under a minute with zero bubbles. Edges line up perfectly and the glass feels sturdy enough to handle everyday drops. Definitely recommend.
Bought this for my daughter's birthday and she hasn't put it down since. Everything arrived in great condition and the accessories make playtime so much fun. Totally worth it.
This is a really funny movie too. I like the fact that she sings in this movie too. Bette & Lily make a great comedic pair!
A wonderful read. I was sad when the story ended. Nora Roberts never fails to bring you back!

I loved this DVD!!! But, it made me really sad because the series is gone!! After it was over, I wanted to see more!!It was great to see the unusual suspects, but I have to confess I missed Colonol O'Neill, I wish they could have at least had him do a cameo appearance. It was nice to wrap up the Ori story line, we were all left hanging abit with the last televised episode. But, they left a little mystery behind, because we still had to wonder if they were really finished!!! This is a DVD that all fans of the series must own!!
This is a great read. I got so into the story that I could not put it down.

Everyone loves these unusually shaped bulbs. We used them in a multi-light fixture in our grandson's room. They are a conversation piece for everyone who sees them. Plus, they use less electricity and throw out ample light.
Really solid build quality and the carpet side glides perfectly. My only complaint is the hardwood side feels a bit sticky, so you have to push harder than expected on smooth floors.
Got this for my 90lb mastiff and it's held up great. She's a heavy chewer and most toys don't last a week. This one keeps her busy for hours every day. Totally worth it.
Manufacturers just seem to keep making shoes narrower and narrower
Got these for my kid three months ago and they still look practically new despite daily wear.

Update August 8, 2012: We've had this product for about a year now, and I'm still really happy with it. It's definitely full from my dog, but we have not had any overflow issues. I'm just about out of the powder that comes with the unit, so I'll need to get some more. Otherwise, it's been a really convenient product to have. I would suggest that you seriously dig the depth hole that they recommend in the instructions. The deeper the better though as sometimes the dog poop will fall down in the hole when you flush the unit with water. Original Post: In all honesty, I was a bit pessimistic when I first got this thing a few months ago, but I was desperate enough to buy it. Thankfully I did, as it's been a great addition to our household and in keeping out yard (and garbage) clean. The unit is real easy to install. Just dig a hole, shove it in, fill it up with water and the enzyme they give you, and you're off. I am lazy with the unit, and normally just pick up our dogs (we just have one) poop on the weekend, and then every month flush the unit with 5-gallons of water and add more enzyme. The thing seems to really be working. We have dog play dates regularly, and the unit seems to be able to handle it. Also, we're currently reaching 20 degree nights and 40 degree day here in Seattle, and it seems to still be working. While this thing holds a lot of poop, I'm pleasantly surprised that there is not a horrible stench (sure it has a slight poo smell, but it's not gagging). Definitely would recommend this unit to others who want to dispose of their dogs waste in their backyard.
Perfect for seeing which devices are running up the bill. I had always suspected my refrigerator was a waste, this proved it.
Super supportive footbed, wore them on vacation with zero blisters.
I have read all of Christine Feehan's Dark Series. And Solang and Dominic's Story is one of the best even though all her stories are. Wonderful.

I am very happy with these churidars. They not only look nice, but can accommodate my body which is not small. I bought others in a large size and they were incredibly small and a waste of money and time. These particular churidars should accommodate various body sizes.
Put this on my grip and it feels super secure. The textured rubber gives great control without being sticky. Slides on with a bit of heat. Solid upgrade.

Setup was straightforward and the range seemed fine at first. But the audio quality is pretty disappointing, there's a constant low hum that becomes really noticeable during quiet parts of songs. Tried it with two different speaker setups and got the same result both times. Ended up sending it back after a week.

The hotshot is a light orth waiting for. All my previous lights did not come close in term of brightness or handiness. Just ensure you had charge the light before usage. Another good thing is that hotshot can be charge with a portable power supply and use at the same time.

when I started buying this litter a few years back I loved it and the price was about $14.99 but the price has doubled since then I have 7 cats and I just can't afford it anymore, it's a shame too because I liked it. But it did get heavy when you cleaned the boxes and put it out for the trash. Now I just use shredded paper and add a little to the top, it's all I can afford.

This thing is amazing. I own this type and the one with the handle. I use it while starting up the fire pit for my little girl to cook smores. I've used it in wind, drizzle, and snow...with the right tinder and technique, you'll have fire in no time. I have these in my Bug-Out-Bag, my saddle bag, and on my knife. Every custom knife sheath maker that I have encountered can put a holder on your sheath, kydex or leather. It's very simple to use...cost as much as a cheap zippo and is more reliable! The 3/8" steel is perfect for me...it shows a little wear and I don't doubt that it will last 1,000's of strikes as it is advertised. With good technique, which you can acquire by watching youtube, and a 5-10 minute practice to...well...practice and get the coating off, you can get good technique and start fires with only a few strikes (at most). The shipping is a bit of a hike, but their website has awesome pricing for that aspect.

Got these for my mom who struggles with cold feet every winter and she's obsessed. She wears them around the house, to the grocery store, basically everywhere from November through March. The lining is super soft and keeps her feet warm without making them sweat like other fuzzy boots she's tried. She normally wears an 8.5 and the 9 fits great with thick socks. Traction is decent on wet pavement too. Honestly if you have someone in your life who is always complaining about cold feet, these make an awesome gift. Thinking about grabbing a pair for myself now.

Barry Raspbody has a unique sense of humor. Most of the jokes were a bit of a stretch. There were a few good, although painful, puns. He also had a few that makes one want to smack either their forehead or his. They might be easier to understand and appreciate if they were presented in a comedy routine.

Got this for my older dog who has arthritis and he loves it. The cushioning is surprisingly thick for what I paid, and the nonskid bottom stays put on my hardwood floors. He stopped sleeping on the couch and now naps here all day. Great quality at a fair price.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing is solid. Found my blown fuse in seconds. Super glad I bought it.

Played a full day of woodsball last weekend and had zero barrel breaks ruin my day because of this thing. The two-ended design is genius, the rubber end pushes out the thick stuff and the fluffy side mops up whatever's left. I was skeptical it'd actually fit my Freak barrel but it slides through perfectly. Every single person on my rec team needs one of these in their pack. If you play scenario ball or speedball and don't have this yet, you're doing yourself a huge disservice. Grab two so your buddy can borrow one.

Picked up a three-pack of these to replace the stock fans that came with my case and honestly the difference is night and day. My temps dropped about 6-7 degrees under load, which is wild for fans at this price point. The magnetic levitation bearing is super quiet, I can barely hear them even when my system is under heavy load during gaming sessions. The RGB looks fantastic too, really bright and even across all the fans without looking washed out. My only minor gripe is that the included controller requires some extra cable management, but honestly for what you're paying that's a fair tradeoff. Way better than spending way more on premium alternatives that perform basically the same. Definitely picking up another pack for my radiator soon.
Couldn't believe the build quality for what these cost. Replaced every hallway light with them and still came in under budget.

Arrived two days early and was packed really securely with no dents or chips. Right out of the box this thing feels indestructible. The weight immediately tells you it's built to last. Did a quick seasoning round before dinner and made skillet cornbread. Turned out amazing with a perfect crust. Super happy with this purchase so far.

The Kill Order is a zombie virus-trope story (a la Resident Evil and World War Z) that has abandoned almost everything (characters, relationships & unique situations) I loved about the initial Maze Runner books. Feeling more than a little annoyed. I was let down while reading Death Cure, but this one went fully off the rails. The only note in its favor is that it's a perfectly entertaining stand-alone piece of zombie fiction. Action, excitement, horror, blood, etc. I wouldn't suggest this for kids under age 14, due to violence. But older teens would dig it.

Likely my LEAST favorite Daniel Silva -- the main character is going too predictable. Mr. Silver is an excellent writer, but this novel lacks the quick pace, sharpness, & literary finesse he usually delivers.
Been using this on my belt for six months of hiking and it's held up great. No cracks or loose clips yet.

Arrived two days earlier than expected and was boxed up nicely with no dents or bent wire panels, which I was worried about with something this size. Unfolding it took maybe five minutes and the latches felt solid right away. The black finish looks clean and the matte coating seems like it'll hold up to scratching. My 90-pound Shepherd fits with room to spare on the first try. Only reason I'm holding back a star is the plastic floor tray feels a little thin for the price, but overall a solid buy so far.

Honestly didn't expect much given the price, but this stuff blew me away. My 5800X was hitting 90+ degrees under load with stock paste, and I was getting thermal throttling in games. After applying this, temps dropped to around 75 max during stress tests. Way better than the name brand stuff I've overpaid for in the past. Application was smooth and it spread evenly without making a mess. One tube is plenty, I did two CPUs and still have leftover. Exceeded my expectations by a mile and I'll be using this for every build from now on.

Pretty silly cat toy, silly as in pointless. Concept is great, so I listened to the 5 star reviews and asked for this as a gift. From the minute I pressed the power button and the thing started moving, I knew it would be a huge disappointment. It makes an annoying sound, but the worst part is that the laser movement is super rigid and not natural at all. It basically just moves back and forth along in a circular pattern. You can make this pattern large or small, but it otherwise does not change. I'm also not even sure why they provide a "manual" mode, as that's no different than a normal small laser pointer, except instead you're holding a gigantic bowling pin and feeling a bit like an idiot.:P Needless to say, my cats also thought this toy was useless. My super playful kitten (loooooves chasing the "red dot"), tried to chase it for a minute or two, but after a while got bored with the movement and just abandoned the thing.

We have been looking FOREVER it feels like for a good, durable outdoor table that will store away. It is great for kids. DEFINITELY will not hold the weight of an adult though, which was a little disappointing... we had our sons birthday party and he wanted me to sit with him and it about broke before I even put all my weight on it and I'm only 130. I don't think it would honestly hold more than 4 kids unless some sat on the joints. It held fine when my son (40lbs) sat on one bench but when his friend sat next to him (30 lbs) it began to creak and bend. The table top itself is a lot more sturdy. Our dog (60lbs) likes to lay on the table with our puppy (50lbs) and no bending or anything. Overall good buy, a little bit of a pain to put together but worth it for the safety factor.

Desserts for my slow cooker!!! When I saw this I had to have it! I mean my son had to have it. I've made 4 recipes already and they are all AMAZING! This book is perfect...especially with the holidays around the corner. I really like the nutritional facts and the pictures for each recipe.
Bought this six months ago and it still looks brand new. No shrinking, pilling, or fading after dozens of washes. Fabric holds up amazingly well. Fits my long torso perfectly too.
Thought it'd be bulkier but it's surprisingly slim and sturdy.

Installed these on my garage entry door last weekend and the hands-free operation is fantastic. The foot pedal release is super sturdy and holds tight even with strong gusts. No more propping doors with random objects while bringing in groceries. Clean look and the satin nickel finish matches my hardware perfectly.
Hooked this up to my PS3 and now everything runs perfectly. Setup took minutes and it works flawlessly with all my devices.
Bought three of these in different colors. They're my go-to for layering or wearing solo. Super comfortable and hold up great after washing.
Great clarity for the price. Holds zero perfectly on my turkey gun.

Awwwww.... how cute is this book! The first chapter threw me a bit, because of the immediate trauma that was going on, but as the story progressed, it became better and better and better. The growing love story was exactly what was needed. And the baby was perfect, even if she was too young to speak. I really wanted to have a bit more at the end. There should really be a short wrap up at maybe 6 month or a year later. Other than that, it was fantastic.
I am going to buy it again when the size Med is available.

Switched to this after dealing with constant leaks from cheaper brands. The absorbent core is honestly impressive, it holds way more liquid than I expected and the bottom layer stays completely dry, which means no more ruined floors. I have a medium-sized dog who tends to go right in the center, and the large size gives plenty of coverage without taking up half the room. My one complaint is the adhesive strips. They work okay on tile but pop off pretty quickly on carpet, so I end up taping the corners down myself. Took off a star for that. Otherwise these are solid. The size options are great and they don't have that chemical smell some pads do. Will keep ordering these.
Watched this back in the day and wanted to revisit. Holds up okay but some episodes drag. Fun for the nostalgia factor mostly.

Got this DVD set a few weeks ago and honestly couldn't stop watching. The production values are way better than I expected for a European TV release, costumes, sets, everything feels really authentic and pulled me right in. The storyline moves at a good pace without rushing through the political drama. I was worried the historical context might be confusing but the show does a solid job making everything accessible without dumbing it down. The English subtitles are a lifesaver since the dialogue can get pretty fast and some of the political maneuvering is complex. Packaging is clean and the discs played perfectly with no issues. If you're into period dramas with real depth, grab this. Already planning to rewatch it.

Nice knife. It is a good size -- a touch longer than a real EDC in my opinion, mostly b/c I carry small knives for my EDC. I don't like people looking at a big old knife and feeling weird. Nice rosewood handle, polished nicely. Nice decorative work on the spine. The knife was a little bit stiff when it arrived and needed some oil to loosen it up. The blade is nicely etched jacketed Damascus-pattern folded steel over a core of VG-10 (advertised -- I have no idea if it is or not). The knife is very sharp out of the box. It locks in place and the hinge is well made. Overall, it is a very nice knife.

Fits my 8,000 BTU unit perfectly. The elastic band around the edge is what really sold me, snugs right up against the frame so no gaps for bugs or moisture to sneak in. Fabric feels thick and durable, not that cheap crinkly stuff. Folded flat in the box too, so storing it during summer is easy. Survived a brutal winter with zero issues. Glad I skipped the plastic wrap route.
Predictable outcome but the story woven around it was good. Would have liked a little more time spent on developing the emotional connection between the two. Enjoyed the movie none-the-less.
Cute toy, but my 7 month old only plays with it for about five minutes then he's bored with it.

Bought this cot for my 60lb mutt about eight months ago and it's still going strong. He's a chewer and a digger, so I was nervous, but he took to it immediately and hasn't tried to destroy it once. The frame is solid metal and the fabric hasn't sagged at all even though he sleeps on it every single night. I keep it on the patio through rain and heat, and honestly it looks almost brand new. Setup took maybe ten minutes, and the feet don't dig into my pavers like other beds I've tried. Worth every penny compared to the cheaper ones I've replaced twice in one year. Finally found something that lasts.
Bought this for my son six months ago and it's held up perfectly through rough practices. Still looks new.
Great straps! Some don't like the thumb strap including myself, just don't use it if you don't want to and problem solved.

I got this for a crate pad but ended up using it as a play mat for my puppy. She loves it; it is sort of like her home base in the house. She plays on it, sleeps on it, chews on it, etc. It is her little place. Will use it for a crate pad as she gets bigger but it is perfect for a play mat now.

There is something so hot about a southern man. This story drew me in right away. It was sexy and fun, and I like the characters a lot. I would recommend it to anyone. I look forward to reading more from this author!
A wonderful story about amazing, strong women. Dinah was unbreakable in spite of the tragic events in her life.
Got this for under ten bucks and honestly worth every penny. The arena scenes had me staying up way too late. Such a gripping plot with real emotional depth. Couldn't put it down.

The Easter bunny brought this for my 4 year old daughter! She LOVES IT!!! She totally thinks it's the real deal. The items are sturdy, far beyond dollar store play makeup plastic. The perfect gift for my daughter.
Thought this would be another generic war doc, but the footage is way more raw than I expected. Wish it dug deeper into the soldiers' personal stories though.
Honestly didn't expect much from this but it blew me away. The effects hold up surprisingly well and the story actually kept me hooked the whole time.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with no damaged pieces. Set it up for my nephew in five minutes and he was immediately obsessed. Pretty neat little set.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this has been a total lifesaver on weeknights. I've tried about twelve recipes so far and every single one came out legit tasty without keeping me stuck in the kitchen forever. The ingredients are stuff I actually already have or can grab cheap at my local grocery store, which is huge for me. Most recipe books I've bought before either use weird expensive items or take way longer than advertised. These genuinely come together fast. For what I paid this is honestly worth way more. My grocery bill has actually gone down since I started using it regularly. If you want quick dinners without spending a fortune, just get it.
Thought this would help clean my pup's teeth but it's way too bulky. She can't grip it properly and just drops it on the floor. Complete waste of money, honestly.
This is a GREAT monitor, that does exactly what a monitor should do - allows me to SEE any and all websites as crystal clear as though I was watching HD TV.
Total waste of money. Fell apart before I even got it on my phone.
There are some movies that transcend time. Wonderful cast brings this story to life!
Love all of Cynthia Breeding's books. Well thought out, and interesting. Have picked up a lot about Scotland and Ireland and their history from reading these books.
Good saddle for a sporty fixie that I use for longer commutes. Not sure it would be all that comfy after 20 miles, but just fine in the 15 mile range!
Picked this up for under $50 and honestly it's worth twice that. Blasted through grout lines and sticky kitchen tile in minutes. Super lightweight too.

I am very familiar with Carson, having owned a couple binoculars with HD glass. I used those for surveillance work and for birding. One pair broke and they replaced them without any questions. I very much appreciate the company. As for this monocular, I shopped around and looked at several and was about to pay a lot more for a premium monocular when I decided that I didn't need it. I gambled on this unit, hoping that I would not need the better glass of a more expensive one. It's a bit large, but I have large hands. It isn't the easiest to focus with, but you become fairly adept at it quickly enough. The quality seems good and I imagine that I will have this unit around for a long time. I teach firearms indoors and I needed a monocular to help my aging eyes see the. 22 caliber bullet holes on black targets with dark backgrounds. I can readily see holes out to 20 yards with these and I am very happy, especially at the pricepoint. I carry them in my jacket pocket for birding when riding my motorcycle. Hech, I even tried the ant thing and it was impressive that I could stand above an ant pile and watch them as if I was on my knees, like when I was a kid. I recommend this monocular and I promise you that you will like Carson as a brand, especially if you have to contact them. I just wish that they would make a nice birding spotting scope. Regards and happy viewing.
A small external drive that backs up my computer. It is easy to take with me and I have satisfaction that if my computer develops a problem, I will not lose my files and applications.

This had great bickering between the hero and heroine. The heroine had been abandoned by her people when she was just 9 years old for being unusual while the hero's talent allowed him to be embraced by his clan. A nice source of tension. The romance is good even if the sexy times are behind close doors. We also get lovely little treats-lectures on alien cultures and the wonderful healing pets and their adorable fluff ball babies. The reveal of the real reason for the title is much fun. Very good Science Fiction Romance reading.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with no bent corners. Started reading the first chapter right away and I'm already hooked.
Arrived quickly with no damage to my Kindle screen. Started reading right away and I'm already hooked on this sweet romance series. Great download!
This monitor is a very solid budget monitor. However, the screen was not durable and now there is a dent in my screen.
These are NOT the pearls. These are the hard sharp chunks that neither my maine coon kitty or I enjoy stepping on. I love the actual pearls, but this sucks.

I live in California and earth quakes can be a bit of a problem so having water in a bag is pretty good for an emergency. I keep some in my bug out bag, and in my car. I have never tasted the water inside so I can't say how it tastes, but in an emergency who cares how it tastes?
Nice period piece set before D-Day invasion. Great to see how the characters in the story unraveled until the very surprising conclusion.

I'll be honest, I grabbed this on a whim during a Kindle sale and didn't expect much. Figured it'd be a decent way to pass a few evenings, nothing more. Turns out I stayed up way too late three nights in a row because I kept telling myself "just one more." The stories range from quiet and reflective to genuinely surprising, and the poems are tucked in at just the right moments. What got me most was how grounded everything feels, the author doesn't show off or try too hard, which I've run into a lot with short story collections. It's just solid writing that trusts the reader. Way better than what I paid, honestly. If you're on the fence, just get it.

Switched my two picky seniors to this after years of trying different brands and they actually clean their bowls now. Their coats look noticeably shinier and digestion has been solid. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone dealing with fussy older cats who turn their nose up at everything else. Worth every penny.

This is one of the MOST superb and enigmatic titles of the Noir Film in any age. After being twenty long years in prison, Victor Mature must infiltrate gang run by the psychopath Richard Widmark who simply ignites the screen with his mercurial performance This is the famous film that offers the brutal and merciless sequence in which gleefully pushes a wheelchair-bound. woman to her death downstairs. This is to my mind the glorious contribution of Henry Hathaway in this genre.
Arrived two days early in a nice ziplock bag. Opened them right up and the material feels surprisingly soft. They look just like the photos. Excited to try them out tonight.

I gave this as a gift to someone who likes turtles and LOVES cooking. She tells me they are perfect and really cute. So that works for me too! Actually they look even better in person than in the picture.

These did cut down on drafts but didn't eliminate them completely. Installation was straightforward and they fit standard outlets fine. Decent product for the price, just don't expect a perfect airtight seal around every receptacle.

Gorgeous dress! I LOVE the sequins and the fit. It was delivered really quickly. I ordered it in "gold" which is more of a rose gold, but it's stunning. And I liked it so well that I've ordered another one in green.

Got this for my kids and honestly it's been a mixed bag. The little compartments are actually pretty handy for holding small toys or candy, and the door flaps have held up surprisingly well after a month of daily use. My toddler is rough with everything and nothing has torn yet, which is more than I expected. That said, the overall design is kind of frustrating. The layout doesn't follow any logical order so my older kid had trouble keeping track of which doors were already opened. The front images are also misleading, what's pictured isn't necessarily what's inside. The cardboard backing is decent quality but started bowing a bit after we hung it on the wall. Fun enough for the price but don't expect anything super polished.

I had gone through 2 "cheapie" scroll saws over the past several years. I do a fair amount of fret work and intarsia. I finally have a machine that holds the blade tightly and is easy to thread into pilot holes.the blower works great. Having the arm tilt is an invaluable feature for me. I am not crazy about the hold down...the arms are too far apart for some of the small work I do. But other than that, a fantastic machine, and getting the stand free is a great incentive. A built in light and blade holder would nice added features. I just completed cutting and building a very intricate clock that was all fret work with this saw. It's outstanding to operate. Changing the blade and re-tensioning from one hole to the next is fast and easy to do. I like the extra long air hose on the saw; it does a nice job of keeping the work area clear of dust when cutting and it adjusts easily. This saw also runs very smoothly and quite. If you enjoy doing fret work or making small detail cuts this is the saw to have.
This was a Valentine's gift for my wife. She loves Matthew. So the movies were a hit. 4 Stars because the discs come "stacked" on top of each other - not separately.

Got these on sale and honestly can't complain. The sliding closures take a little getting used to but hold securely enough. Perfect for organizing extra toiletries and cleaning supplies under the sink. Not fancy, but you get what you pay for and then some.
This was perfect for the wedding I was in!! It was a little long but luckily a belly dancer friend taught me how to tie it up cute!!

I was surprised Viviane found herself and was able to bounce back from her cheating husband. It didn't take long before her cheating husband found her desirable once more. It took seeing her with another man and her transformation to realize he had a good woman.

Decent read if you want a straightforward timeline of her time in office, but I was hoping for more personal reflection. Felt like reading a resume at points. Still, it covers the key moments and gives you a sense of what she dealt with as a female leader.

I put this in last month to replace an ancient Honeywell that was starting to act up, and honestly wish I'd done it sooner. The interface is super intuitive, my teenagers figured it out without asking me, which says a lot. What really sold me was the scheduling flexibility. I've got it paired with my Bryant heat pump and it handles the transition between heating and cooling without any weird short cycling. The app works smoothly too, though I mostly just use it to bump the temp up from bed on cold mornings. If you're reasonably handy with low-voltage wiring, installation is a breeze. I'd highly recommend this to anyone with a standard residential HVAC setup who wants smart features without paying for a fancy brand name. Solid value.
Love the Ludlow Hall Series. Who doesn't love sexy hot alpha men & gorgeous women who steal their hearts.
Bought this six months ago for my daughter and it's still holding up great.

For the price, I'm honestly impressed. I picked this up not expecting much but it's been running smoothly for about two months now with no real issues. Setup took maybe fifteen minutes and the picture quality is decent enough for what I need. You can't adjust the lens itself which is kind of a bummer, so I ended up just mounting it at the right distance to get the framing I wanted. Once I got that sorted it's been set-and-forget. Night vision works better than I thought it would. My only real complaint is the mounting bracket feels a little flimsy and I wish there were more angle options. Still, for under forty bucks I really can't complain. It gets the job done and hasn't given me any trouble.

Picked this up after moving into a new place and wanted to make sure the basement was safe. Really appreciate the digital display, it updates continuously so you can see exactly what's happening in real time instead of waiting months for a lab test. The backlight is handy for checking readings in dim light too. My only gripe is that it took about three days to calibrate and show steady numbers, which felt longer than expected. The instructions said this was normal, but I was anxious to get results right away. Once it settled in, readings were consistent and matched the short-term test kit I'd ordered separately. Build quality feels solid, not flimsy. Worth the money for the peace of mind alone. Just be patient during that initial startup period.

Sound quality is solid for the price, crisp highs and decent bass that doesn't get muddy at higher volumes. Battery life gets me through a full week of gym sessions without needing a charge. That said, the fit is hit or miss. They kept slipping out during sprints, and the rubber tips don't have enough grip. I'd recommend these to casual listeners or anyone using them at a desk, but runners with smaller ears should probably look elsewhere. Great audio, just not the most secure fit for active use.

Solid little camera bag for day trips. I packed my DSLR with a attached lens, couple extra batteries, lens cloth, and a small charger. It's tight but workable if you pack smart. The padding feels decent and the strap is comfortable enough for all-day wear. Wish the front pocket was a bit roomier though. Overall pretty happy with it.

Arrived two days early in a sturdy box with no damage. Pulled it out and was immediately impressed by the thick material and solid zippers. Smaller than I pictured but holds way more than expected. Really happy with this purchase so far.
Another great read by Ms. Steel. From start to finish, she kept me intrigued.

Bought this on a whim and honestly worth every penny. The psychological dynamics the author explores really opened my eyes to how guys think about commitment. Super engaging read that kept me hooked. Can't believe I got this for the price.

I've had the Blu-ray set for about two years now and honestly the discs have held up well despite being played dozens of times. No scratching issues and the packaging is still intact, which is more than I can say for some other box sets I own. The movies themselves are a mixed bag though. The extended editions add some nice moments but also drag in places. The picture quality is solid and the special features are extensive if you care about behind the scenes stuff. My main gripe is that the third film feels padded compared to the book. Overall I'm glad to have it in my collection and it's survived kids handling it, which says something. Just don't expect it to match the original trilogy.
Great film. Have not seen in years. Looking forward to viewing.
Bought these for my volleyball league and the cushioning on the heel is amazing. No blisters after three-hour tournaments. The colors are super vibrant too, my teammates keep asking where I got them.

I have used these for about two months and they are useful, handy, and keep your hands cool. However, there is no coverage for the thumbs, and sometimes the bar will still rough that area up a bit when doing overhead lifts with a lot of weight. Durability-wise, a problem I am having now is that one of the finger loops is starting to tear away from the palm pad. No problem, I can stitch that back together. But there is also a small tear in the leather on one of the pads. I hope it doesn't get much bigger.

Loved it. He has lost one leg and she has lost both breasts. Hers to save her life and his in the service. They had an amazing night when they were both recovering. Now they meet up at his uncles hotel to live out a fantasy. She has a lot of deep hurt because of her ex. He does because of his leg. Can they heal each other and find happiness? Very emotional heart tugging enjoyable read. I was given a review copy and voluntarily review it.

I've been reading this on my Kindle Paperwhite for about three months now, taking it on commutes and weekend trips. The digital file holds up great with no formatting glitches or loading issues even after constantly flipping back to check earlier chapters. That said, the actual story left me wanting more substance. What's here is well-written and the world-building caught my attention right away, but it wraps up way too quickly. I found myself checking how much was left and being surprised I was already at the end. For the price point I expected a bit more depth. Still, it's a decent enough read if you're looking for something short to kill time on a train ride. Just don't go in expecting a full-length experience.

This is a wonderful flash for my Olympus OMD5 - small and powerful, just like the camera... and the ability to tilt the flash as well as regulate it's intensity makes it a real asset to any photographer.
My arthritic lab devours these chews like treats. Her mobility improved within weeks and she's moving around like a puppy again. Way cheaper here than at the vet's office.

Mounted this on my 10/22 about eight months ago and it's taken a beating. Still holding zero perfectly after plenty of range trips and being bounced around in the truck. Solid little optic for the money.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but this frosted glass spray really delivered. I used it on a pair of sidelights next to my front door and the coverage is surprisingly even. You definitely need to do light, quick passes, I rushed my first coat and it came out blotchy, but the second pass evened everything out nicely. The finish looks professional, almost like real etched glass, which is way better than the peel-and-stick films I've tried before. My only gripe is the can seemed to run out faster than I anticipated. I got through maybe 4 square feet before it started feeling light. Still, for the cost and ease of use, I'm pretty satisfied. Would buy again but maybe grab two cans if you're doing multiple windows.
Still holding up great after a year of regular reading and lending it out. Spine is intact, pages haven't loosened. Solid quality.

Arrived quickly but the box was pretty banged up and the unit had a small scuff. Works fine for keeping my phone topped up, but don't expect it to handle anything heavy duty. Seems okay for the price.
Read it twice on commute, spine held up great. Galbraith writes a solid mystery that keeps you hooked throughout.
Arrived quickly in nice packaging. Opened them up and the material feels great.

Bought these for everyday wear and they've exceeded my expectations. The fit is spot-on and they feel broken in from day one. Leather looks better with scuffs too. I wear them constantly and my feet never hurt. Worth every penny.
Fine if your cat never spills water. Great for dry-only setups, but falls apart the second moisture touches it.
Pretty good book. Had my attention until the end. Toward the end of the book it couldn't keep my attention and moved pretty fast. I found myself slightly confused. Will probably read book two though.
Arrived next day in nice shoebox. Look even better in person!

I picked this up at a thrift store not expecting much, just something for vacation reading. Honestly, I was blown away. The Louisiana bayou setting is so vivid you can practically feel the humidity, and Tucker Longstreet is one of Roberts' most charming heroes. The murder mystery aspect genuinely surprised me too, I usually figure out who did it way before the reveal, but this one kept me guessing until close to the end. Caroline is a solid protagonist, though her whole "fragile musician recovering from a breakdown" thing felt slightly repetitive after a while. That said, the chemistry between her and Tucker absolutely sizzles. Way better than the generic romantic suspense I was anticipating. If you're new to Nora Roberts or just want something gripping, this is a great choice.

An entertaining look at the excesses of the eighties: greed, corruption, hubrisit's all there portrayed by some of today's most versatile actors. Christian Bale as an under the radar conman content with the small con being hustled by an overambitious FBI agent (Bradley Cooper), and Bale's partner in crime Amy Adams blurring their relationship with her own agenda. Mix with the political machinations of Jeremy Renner and Jennifer Lawrence as Bales mercurial wife, and it's a roller coaster ride full of punches and counterpunches with many laughs along the way. A fun ride and deserving of Oscar nominations.

Bought these as replacements after my toddler got ahold of our domino set and scattered half the markers across the house. Figured for the price it was worth grabbing a full set rather than hunting for the originals. They showed up fast and work perfectly on our standard Mexican Train board. The plastic feels solid, not flimsy, and they slide smoothly across the table without scratching anything. Size-wise they're pretty close to the ones that came in our original tin maybe a hair taller but honestly nobody at game night noticed. I'd definitely recommend these to anyone playing Mexican Train regularly, especially families with kids who tend to lose pieces. Grabbing a backup set now so we're never short-handed again. Great little product for the money.

Absolutely gripping from start to finish. The sheer determination of these men is mind-blowing, and the visuals really make you feel the brutal cold. I watched it twice in one weekend. If you're into survival stories or historical adventures, this belongs in your collection. Couldn't look away for a second.

Got this to get my deer rifle roughly zeroed without burning through a box of premium ammo. It does the job at 25 yards and got me on paper in about four shots, which I appreciate. The big issue is the red dot is pretty dim even in low light. By the time I pushed out to 100 yards I couldn't pick it up at all through my scope. Fine for close range prep but you'll still need real rounds to finish sighting in.

It's not well constructed. I haven't used it to field dress a deer yet, but out of the package the knife seems sharp, but the blade wiggles greatly. The blade wiggles so much that I'm afraid the lock may break and there goes my fingers. I can't suggest this item. There are better dressing knifes for just $5 more.

Great leash, the length is great, and it has a firm hold with my dog. Just be cautious, they don't recommend using retractable leashes with choke chains and harness to stop dogs from pulling as there is constant tension on the leash.

I bought this book about six months ago and have reread it three times since. The paperback has held up great through all that abuse, no spine cracking, pages still intact, cover looks good despite being tossed in my work bag and taken on two flights. The story itself keeps pulling me back. The dynamic between Abby and Edwin feels real, not forced like a lot of romance novels I've picked up lately. Their history gives everything weight, and the banter actually made me laugh out loud more than once. I usually pass books along to my sister but I'm keeping this one. It's become one of those comfort reads I reach for when I need something familiar. Solid purchase all around.
Had these for six months of daily abuse and they still work flawlessly. Built like an absolute tank.

The concept was nice but was very disappointed with the quality of the materials used. It is a fleece like material but is basically threadbare. The cats are basically laying on particle board. Had they used just a little thicker/softer material I would have given this 5 stars. I would not purchase again.

Works perfectly with my iMac. I have the wireless mouse, external hd plugged in all the time and use the other two ports as input from other things such as my MP3 player and it works for everything. My old hub was powered but had begun to short out but this works just as I had hoped.

I've had these water shoes for about eight months now and they've held up surprisingly well. I've taken them on multiple kayaking trips, worn them on rocky riverbeds, and even used them for some light hiking near waterfalls. The soles still have plenty of tread and no signs of separating from the upper. They do collect a bit of sand inside which is annoying but rinses out easily. Sizing was spot on for me. They're not winning any fashion awards but that's not why you buy them. Solid construction for the price point. Would buy again.

Ordered these for my 4 year old daughter's reward chart and they arrived next day in a sturdy little box, no bending or creasing at all which I was worried about. Opening the pack, I was honestly shocked at how many you get. The quality is way better than expected. Each sticker is glossy, thick, and peels cleanly without tearing. My daughter gasped when she saw the animals and little food characters. Even my teenager grabbed a handful for her laptop. The adhesive sticks well to paper but doesn't ruin surfaces if you need to reposition them. Perfect for potty charts, goodie bags, or just keeping little hands busy at restaurants. Will definitely reorder.
The pocket clip is super sturdy and hasn't bent yet. Cuts through darkness like nothing else. Can't beat it for the price.
Bought for my mom and she loves them. True to the color. I'm going to order the orange for my living room.

The premise grabbed me right away and Susan's writing flows well, but the whole thing wraps up before it really gets going. The gun subplot needed way more development. That said, if you want a quick weekend read and don't mind loose ends, it's decent enough. I'd recommend it to casual readers looking for something light, but hardcore thriller fans will probably want more meat on the bone.

I received this tool as a gift. It is well made and very useful, especially with trim molding and almost anything that requires an angle on the sliding miter saw. However, the scale was misaligned by one full degree. I called Starrett and was told that their tolerance for this tool is +/- one degree. That is unacceptable from a company like Starrett renowned for their precision. I exchanged the tool for another, hand selected from inventory, and found one just.1 degree misaligned after looking at a dozen or so. This is workable accuracy but IMO the tool should be engraved, and the scale should be accurate or the scale should be eliminated. The decal itself may be accurate but the application process seems to produce a fair number of these tools with misaligned scales. With a sliding miter saw this is not really a problem as you can just transfer the angle. But, if the scale is there it should be accurate or at least installed properly. With the scale accuracy problems it rates three stars. If the scale were properly installed and accurate, I would give it 5 stars. Then I would not have to use my engraved Starrett protractor to read the actual angle when needed.
Not quite what I expected but it will get used.
Terrible. Halfway through the plot is still unclear. The whole thing just needs help.

Installed these about eight months ago when I redid our master bath. Running a rain can and handheld off separate lines, and these valves get used every single day. Still smooth as butter with zero drips or stiffness. Solid brass feel, no pitting or finish issues. Way cheaper than the name brand trim alternative. Absolutely bulletproof for the price.
Wow this is a scorching hot short story, and so true how many times have I talked to others in the book club about this kind of stuff. Amazing can't wait to read the next book.

It works as advertised, but the brush is extremely soft and takes more effort to use than I would like. I guess I just prefer a stiffer brush for my work. If you have a lighter touch and don't manhandle the brush like I do, it may be a good fit for you. I had some trouble with the first brush, but the seller was immediately there to try and resolve the issue. He sent me another brush and assured me that it was a very rare manufacturing anomaly. He even went so far as to focus on looking to see what may have happened at the manufacturing facility. I only mention this because if you are even remotely thinking about purchasing this, you can with confidence as the owner/CEO stands firmly behind his invention.

Feels durable when used, and yes, I've used it: Well, the bottle opener, anyhow! The day it came in, I put it on my neck before we went to dinner. My wife ordered the "glass bottle" (Mexican) Coke. The waiter said, "Oh, I forgot my bottle opener, hang on a minute." and I almost yelled, "No, no! Wait! I've got a bottle opener." And I dug this little guy out of my shirt, and pffft, opened that sucker right up! I mean, when does that ever happen? Maybe two times in 40 years has someone said to me, "Uh oh, forgot a bottle opener" and I got the best chance ever to show off my sweetie! So, I can see using the bottle opener once in a while, the screw driver, the knife. I'm not sure how often I'll use the knife or the wire stripper. But like a wise reviewer previously said, it's nice to have a little fixed blade that doesn't make me look like some sort of paranoid knife nut. As I've already proven, this little knife (and tool!) is helpful. PS For those of you who like a small knife for self defense (I carry a semiautomatic pistol and pepper spray instead) and want this because it's unobtrusive, keep this in mind: There is an almost exact same model sold by Shadow Ops. It's about the same price. Hell, it might even be the same knife. But if you're looking for non-tactical-looking, remember that the other knife says, very clearly on it: SHADOW OPS. If the law pats you down, it's harder, I imagine, to say that your Shadow Ops knife is harmless.
This set was offered with two others. We are happy with the quality. I am sure our grandson will love playing with it.

Such a great tool. Gets in tight spaces with ease. You do need to hold on to it to keeps it steady and apply pressure to it to help drive screws in since the weight of the drill is not directly behind the fastener with it attached. The head of the tool also has a nice magnetic ring that olds the heads of screws firmly in place.

Honestly expected these to feel flimsy based on other beach sets we've owned, but the plastic is surprisingly thick and solid. My two-year-old stands right in the bucket with zero cracking. The shovel actually moves sand instead of just bending. Way better than I thought for the price.

I bought this for my shephard mix. Perfect size for her. At first she was skeptical about going in it, but now she absolutely loves it. It is her "room" and one can tell she feels absolutely comfortable in it. Easy to assemble, the double door is great because you can set it up however you want at home, and it even has a divider that comes in handy when potty training.

Total waste of money. My vet recommended these for my cat's immune support, but she wouldn't even sniff them. The texture is weirdly hard, not chewy like the label claims. Honestly, I'd only recommend this to someone whose pet will eat absolutely anything. Going back to the powder I can mix into wet food.

Picked this up about three weeks ago and I'm genuinely impressed. The screen is the real standout for me, colors are vibrant and text looks razor sharp, way better than I expected at this price point. I've been using it mainly for reading comics and watching videos during my lunch break, and battery life easily gets me through a full day. My only minor complaint is the speakers could be louder, but with headphones it's a non-issue. For what I paid, this thing punches way above its weight. Zero regrets.

Decent garment steamer for the price. Heats up reasonably fast and handles most wrinkles without much fuss. I'd recommend it to anyone in a small apartment who needs something compact. Just don't expect heavy-duty performance if you're steaming thick fabrics regularly.
Arrived crushed in a padded envelope. Pads seem flimsy but they'll do the job for now.
Good utilitarian blade. Not razor sharp out of the box, but that leaves options to the end user as far as sharpening to their liking.

This bike rack is great and does exactly what I needed to do--hang my bike vertically off a wall in my home. The included hardware worked great and allowed me to anchor into the drywall of the wall that I hung the bike from. In the end it allowed me to save a lot of space in my small studio. The dimensions of this rack are 9 inches tall by 3 inches wide. The top hook that goes around the tire sticks out 4.5 inches. The bottom part that sticks out a bit on either side of the bike rim sticks out about 1.5 inches. Included in this set is the bike rack and the hardware needed to mount it. Pros: *Saves a ton of room *Hardware included that worked well *Easy to install Cons: *None Additional Considerations: Be aware, this is a vertical storage system, not a horizontal one. Additionally you will want to make sure the bike is not ran into a lot or you could damage the bike or the wall that the bike rack is mounted into. Overall: 5/5 stars (>=.5 rounds up, <.5 rounds down) => 5 stars If you have any further questions regarding the product in my review please leave a comment below and I will get back to you as soon as possible.
Read this on my old Kindle Paperwhite over six months ago, reread twice since. File holds up perfectly, no formatting glitches. Villains are unforgettable.
Arrived super fast and the digital download was instant. Started reading right away and I'm already hooked. Great purchase!

Put this on my 410 pistol grip and what a difference. For under 30 bucks the quality is outstanding, rubber feels solid and absorbs the kick way better than the factory stock. Installation took maybe five minutes with a single screw. Way more control when firing and my hand doesn't slide around anymore. Can't beat it for the price, honestly feels like a much more expensive upgrade.
Lower end toys, but they are what I ordered. Excellent for the price

Got these for my labrador since he hates walking on hot pavement. The sizing chart seemed accurate and they stayed on fine during our first outing. But by day three, the rubber sole was already peeling away from the fabric on both front paws. For the price, I expected them to last at least a couple weeks. My dog only wears them on short neighborhood walks around the block. Really disappointed with the build quality. Returning for a refund and would not recommend.
Very nice shoes, feels nice on feet and fits perfect.

Arrived two days early in sturdy packaging with no damage. Opened it up and the blade came razor sharp right out of the box. Solid feel in hand, locks up tight with zero wiggle. Impressed with the build quality for the price. Can't wait to take it camping.
Fit good & feel good; so comfortable, I forget I have them on. I have no complaints, at this time.
Honestly pretty underwhelmed. Apps crash constantly and the screen freezes up randomly. Expected way better performance for the price. Sending it back this week.
Picked this up for my nieces and they were glued to the screen. The traditional 2D art style is gorgeous. Perfect low-key weekend watch for families with little ones.
I enjoyed the setting and the characters. The twist with the magical jukebox gave it an interesting vibe. A well written love story.

Jesse Kellerman seems to be getting better with each book he puts out. THE GENIUS was much better that TROUBLE, which was much better than SUNSTROKE. I enjoyed the originality of the story line and, as flawed a character as Ethan was, I really liked him a great deal. My only criticism is that the ending, while not bad, was a bit anti-climatic. I read this book while I was traveling and it really occupied those boring hours waiting in airports and on planes. A four star recommendation for this one.

Original and great series. I don't usu read fantasy type but this series is so good that no matter the genre you get sucked in. Writing style better than most with the occasional odd tense or participle. I would guess English is not original USA variety. So technically she could be correct while sounding off... Example: he swimmed across the river and leant into the wind (shorter paraphrase) I would write as he swam across the river and leaned into the wind. For some reason that kept bugging me. Fabulous characters that grow and change, surprises everywhere, great fun. Be aware they start free and cost more at the end. Which is fair and smart.
Gave this to my mom as a gift. She loved it. Really nice and large tea bags, just what we were looking for!
My son wanted a red Yoshi and this fit the bill. Not the best quality, comparable to a carnival prize stuffed toy.
Beautiful. But the embroidery gets snagged when she scratches. Not great for everyday wear.
This knife is very sharp, be careful. Worked perfect for what i needed.
Arrived quickly in a sturdy case with no cracks. Popped it in right away and did the first session, definitely broke a sweat. Solid intro, curious to keep going.
This book was a very heartwarming book!! I hope she turns it into a series! All the books by Hazel Gower that I read I have absolutely loved.

This book will haunt you. Truth is stranger than fiction. Outstanding chronology of the events that fill the horrific chapters of the mistreatment of the American Indian by the US Army and the brutality of those Indians. The gory extinguishing of cultures. The author hits it out of the park. This book belongs on any American history book shelf.

I love these books! I love the way all 3 series groups inter-mingle each with the other. All these characters are easy to love and their stories are gripping and keeps you interested through the end. Great job with all these guys and their gals! Cant wait to read Michael and Nikki's story and the Free books.
Bigger than I expected which is great. Holds all my golf essentials without feeling bulky on the course.
Thought these would be flimsy but they're surprisingly sturdy. Catches all the splatter and wipes clean fast. Way better than expected.

Please note that the USB ports have 2.1 amps current available between them. That means two 1 amp cell phones charging or one iPad or Tablet. But NOT a cell phone AND an iPad or tablet. And certainly not two tablets. For the price, it's a win.

Holds everything from my old wallet in about half the thickness. It fills the back pocket and is barely noticeable. I have not gotten used to it yet, I'm always double checking to make sure it is still there. With my old wallet, I'd have to take it out of my pocket when on a long drive but I can barely feel this one. A few people have seen it and asked about it. After showing it to them, they were so impressed that they bought one for themselves.

I ordered this dog food because my dog didn't seem to like his other dog food and it looked very healthy. My dog liked the food, but I noticed he was losing weight. I have a Sheltie that thinks he is a Greyhound, and weight has never been an issue for him. I suppose if your pet needs to shed a few pounds this may be the food for him.

Thought these would be just like the regular darts but they actually fly way straighter. The colors are brighter than expected too, which made them easy to find in the bushes. Worth every penny for the quantity you get.
Nice headgear on headlamp, but it seems as though headlamp use's a lot of batteries,and for the price I expected a little better light.
Good movie! Can't wait to see the new one!! Not a lot of curse words. Action packed. Highly recommended.

Picked this up to deal with the smell coming from our diaper pail in the nursery. For the price, you really can't complain. The gel does knock out most of the odor within a few hours of setting it out. I'd say each container lasts me about three weeks before I notice it needs a refresh, which is pretty decent given what it costs. My only gripe is the scent itself is kind of medicinal, not terrible, just not the fresh linen smell I was hoping for. Still, it handles the gross smells better than the spray I was using before. Already ordered another one for the garbage can in the garage. Would recommend if you need something budget-friendly that actually works.

Arrived two days early in a sturdy little box with batteries already included, which was a nice surprise. The aluminum body feels solid and the beam is surprisingly bright for the size. Way better than the cheap plastic ones I've bought at hardware stores. Already ordered three more for the garage and the cars.
Such a cute doll for the price! The stilt accessory is a unique touch and my daughter loves playing with her. The curls stayed nice and bouncy right out of the box.

If you have ever taken an exercise class that has totally kicked your butt & you are looking to get that kind of workout at home - this is it!! When you are done you know that you just did a serious work out. It's approximately 48 minutes of constant cardio that includes an active aerobic warm up and about 6 minutes of cool down & stretching. I am in fairly good shape although I have some weight to lose and I find this workout an excellent challenge. If you are just starting out exercising I would think that this would be a bit too much to take on although JM does show some easier versions of some of the exercises. A note about JM - I have to admit that I have never been a fan of hers previously. When I would see her on the Biggest Loser she would rub me the wrong way. However, after trying this workout I am a big fan now! She is one awesome trainer & is able to get that across even via video. Some people have commented that she does a lot of talking during this video and that is true - but it doesn't really matter what she's doing....it's what you do that matters:)

Best Laid Plans is like no other book I've read before. The story is action packed, raw, gritty and beyond entertaining. There are funny bits, and of course romance. But the best part is the two awesome main characters. Stylo's writing style is one of my favorites. She captures your attention from the first pages of her books and this one is not different. At the same time, this book is nothing like her others. I felt like I was watching an action movie while reading it. Her attention to details and how well researched everything in her books is doesn't go unnoticed. It makes the experience of reading this book feel much more real. The story is incredibly well written. The descriptions of the places make you feel as if you're there. The characters are intriguing, and captivating. Marc and Lily are headstrong, brave and they are focused on getting their respective jobs done. These two make quite the dynamic duo. They had me clutching my heart, laughing and swooning. Not only the main characters are intriguing, the side characters as well. Kingsley, is I have to say, one of my favorite things about his book, and I'm hoping we get a lot more from him. I highly recommend this book. I can't seriously wait for what's to come from Stylo. Be sure to 1-Click this bad boy!!

I build custom cabinets and go through a ton of melamine and hardwood plywood. Tear-out has always been my biggest headache until I picked up the LU79. This blade is an absolute game changer for finicky sheet goods. Every crosscut comes out flawless with zero chipping on both sides. It runs surprisingly quiet on my table saw and leaves an edge that barely needs sanding before assembly. Blade swaps take a few minutes like any standard blade, but the results make it completely worth it. I'd strongly recommend this to cabinet shops, furniture makers, and serious weekend woodworkers who are tired of wasting material on rough cuts. If you're working with delicate veneers or coated panels, do yourself a favor and grab one. You won't regret it.

The concept of using regular pipe is great and saves money compared to buying dedicated clamp bodies. My issue is the sliding jaw doesn't lock firmly in place before you apply pressure. It keeps shifting on the pipe when I'm positioning materials. Once everything is tightened down it holds well, but getting there is frustrating. Decent clamps overall, just wish the jaw had better grip.
Brave is a great kids movie that an adult can actually sit through. This movie has a good story and its told well. The animation is very good and I would recommend this movie.

Bought this for my pastor dad and he couldn't put it down. The depth of research across thousands of sources is seriously impressive. Perfect for clergy, theology students, or anyone curious about Luke's life.

For the price, this is a decent everyday cardholder. The leather portions feel nice and have held up well after a month of use. That said, the back panel is clearly a different material and already showing minor scuffing. It's functional and slim enough for front pocket carry, just don't expect full-grain throughout. Decent budget option if you're not too picky.

Especially for fans of "Romeo and Juliet" this film has much to offer. The changes in the story are interesting. Much of the acting is good, especially from the lovers. It is a spectacular film to watch. The biggest disappointment is the songs. They are not particularly exciting to hear or see. When the songs are dull in a Bollywood film, the film really suffers.
Couldn't put this down! The storytelling pulls you in immediately and the characters feel like real people. Totally lost sleep finishing it. Worth every penny.

UPDATE Mar-2016: I bought a second one for myself. Overall, it seems fine, and I like the size of the teapot, but the design allows the last drop of every pour to run down the spout. Buy the time we are done drinking tea, there is a stain at the bottom of the spout. ORIGINAL REVIEW: I bought this teapot for my sister who has been looking for a large teapot for a long time. This is a nice size teapot that is large enough to serve a party of 6+ people. With a normal teacup being about 6 oz, the teapot holds about 12 teacups. I like the plain white classic design as it would go with anything. The overall quality seems to be very good, although the empty teapot weighs less than I imagined it would just by looking at it. The small loop handle in the front is very helpful for serving because the full tea pot is quite heavy. One of the pictures of the white teapot shows a lid open that seems to have a built in brewing vessel, however, the teapot I have received has a plain lid. Not a big deal for me, but something I feel others should be aware of. UPDATE: After about a year of regular use the teapot is still holding up well and nothing broke or cracked. My sister is very happy.

"Ordinary Men" chronicles the rise and fall of Reserve Police Battalion 101, one of several units that took part in the Final Solution to the Jewish Question while in Poland. During the course of their stay, they were responsible for the shooting of 38,000 Jews, while also deporting 45,200 to the Treblinka Concentration Camp. The book argues that the men of Reserve Police Battalion 101, and other units like it, were comprised of ordinary men. It begs the question: How did ordinary men become the cold-blooded killers of the Holocaust? Author Christopher R. Browning does a tremendous job of covering the ground. He also presents a strong case that these people were indeed ordinary men, who came from ordinary backgrounds, only to end up being transformed into the murderers of thousands. However, the book also stresses that some of the men, including several officers, could not be considered "ordinary," as they were trained in Hitler's Nazi organizations from youth. Browning also does something nearly impossible: He humanizes these people without excusing their horrendous actions. Their defense that "they were just following orders" just doesn't fit the bill, as some refused to take part in the actions, and asked to be relieved. If a few men could get themselves relieved from doing the killings, why did so many more not? That is the main question the book gives. "Ordinary Men" is an extraordinary book that chronicles just one unit that took part in the murder of innocent Jews, while also presenting a good case of how ordinary men can become killers. I highly recommend this book to all students of the Holocaust.

I like these underwear. They came in a variety of colors. I like the fabric, it is smooth and it stays in place. The only thing that I don't like is that the lining that goes in the private part is white; I just wished the lining was of the same color of the rest of the bikini.

Bought this on a whim since I love Austen adaptations and wow, what a gem. The modern twist actually works instead of feeling gimmicky. The casting is spot on - especially Amanda, who brings such warmth and humor to the whole thing. My only gripe is the US DVD is missing the Downtown karaoke scene that apparently aired in the UK. It's referenced later so you can tell something got cut. Still totally worth owning though. Watched it twice already this month.
Returned. Wasn't happy with the fit or how the product was made

Got three of these for my kids' playroom and they've been a total hit. The motion activation works surprisingly well, they respond fast whether the kids are crawling, chasing, or just waving their hands around. What I really appreciate is the auto-off feature; I've had them for about two months now and haven't needed to swap batteries yet, even with daily use. They're sturdy enough to survive being dropped on hardwood and tossed between siblings, which says a lot in this house. Volume is tolerable, not the ear-splitting kind you usually get with toys like this. My three year old figured out how they work immediately and my seven year old still thinks they're fun for obstacle courses. Would absolutely buy again as gifts.

Took me about 45 minutes to build solo. The sisal posts are honestly great quality, way better than I expected for the price. My only complaint is the top perch feels a little wobbly when my big boy jumps up there. Still, both cats use it daily and scratch it nonstop.
Tossed it in my backpack daily for six months, still works perfectly.
These socks are even cuter than the picture! They shipped fast and the price is really good for the good quality you're getting.
Watched this disc dozens of times with my kids and it still plays perfectly. No scratches, no skipping. Total classic.

Ordered this carrier on a Monday and it showed up by Wednesday in a sturdy box with no damage or weird creases. Really impressed with the packaging, they actually care about how it arrives. Pulled it out and immediately noticed how thick the material is. Not flimsy at all like some other pet bags I've tried. The stitching is clean, zippers feel solid, and the ventilation panels are bigger than they look in the photos. Comes with a little luggage tag-style clip inside for harness attachment which I wasn't expecting. Fit my 11-pound terrier perfectly with room to spare. Haven't taken it on a long trip yet but initial quality is way beyond what I paid. Would absolutely recommend to anyone shopping around.
My picky labrador actually finishes every bowl. Way cheaper than the boutique pet shops too. I'd recommend this to anyone with a fussy eater at home.

I loved Beg for Mercy and Hide from Evil. This book is a part of a series. I was really excited this book came out. As soon as I saw it I grabbed it. This is Talia story. She is getting her life back together after she was tortured. She was in awful 'relationship' which is mentioned in Beg for Mercy. She was helped by Jack. I liked Talia the most part but she got stupid which I found annoying. Jack our hero is there to protect/help Talia (she doesn't know he was)had potential but he fell flat for me. This book talks about Gemini Security/Gemini Men. I felt like Alden was just trying to get me to buy those books. Not going to happen. This book seemed rush and didn't have the depth I felt in Beg for Mercy and Hide from Evil. Not a terrible book but I certainly won't be grabbing a book by Alden just b/c she wrote it. By the way, if you want to read this book I recommend you read Beg for Mercy 1st. It explains the back story which you really don't get in this book. If I didn't read the 1st 2 books in the series I think I would have given it 2 stars.

Really enjoyed this one. The chemistry between the two leads felt genuine, and I liked that the author didn't drag out the will-they-won't-they forever. The Texas setting was a nice change of pace from the usual small-town romance backdrops I've been reading lately. Some of the secondary characters added good flavor without taking over the plot. My main gripe is the editing, there are enough missing words and wrong names to pull you out of the story at times. Nothing deal-breaking, but noticeable. Still, the emotional moments landed for me and I finished it in two sittings. Would definitely pick up more from this writer. Just hoping the next book gets a better proofread.

This is the best accessory ever developed for concealed carry. Purchase this for all of mine and love everything about it. No more slippery grip and it doesn't make it hard to holster or pocket it. Treat yourself to this, you won't regret it! Not a single issue ever. Stays on nice, doesn't slip or slide. Used a blow drier then put it in the freezer for 10 minutes. 'Very' complicated, to say the least. Don't know that this is something to attempt for he faint of heart:) Interesting way to have the MCs interact, and I wavered between liking it and not liking it. Much thought went into how this would work with a pseudo-parental relationship, and what is left of the family dynamics. When it was done, I found I enjoyed the story, and am glad everyone came out with their needs and life-dreams somewhat addressed.

Bought this for field inspections about eight months ago and it's been an absolute tank. I work in construction management and this thing lives in my truck console, gets tossed in with hard hats and clipboards, and has survived more dust and rain than I care to admit. The lens is still scratch-free despite zero babying on my part. Photos come out sharp even in dim basements and crawlspaces where my phone camera is useless. Battery holds a charge for a solid week of moderate shooting. My last point-and-shoot died after one drop on concrete. This one has hit the ground three times and doesn't have a scratch or dent. Watched this with my husband last weekend. The footage from early 2001 really stuck with me, especially the segments showing intelligence briefings that got ignored. I appreciated how it connected dots between Saudi connections and the subsequent legislation. Some claims felt like a stretch and could've used more sourcing. The pacing dragged around the middle section. Still, it raises questions worth thinking about even if you don't buy every theory. Good conversation starter.

Bought this to digitize my family's old home movies on VHS and honestly it's been a frustrating ordeal from day one. The machine powers on fine but the recording quality is terrible. Every DVD I've burned has major skipping issues and audio sync problems about ten minutes in. The menu system is confusing and the remote feels cheap, like it might stop working any second. I tried three different brands of blank discs thinking that was the issue, but no luck. Called customer support twice and both times they just told me to reset the unit, which fixed nothing. I've wasted countless hours and a stack of discs on this thing. For the price, I expected way better. Going to cut my losses and look for something else.
At this price point they're decent enough. Looks nice on but pretty flat inside. Fine for casual wear, wouldn't recommend for long walks.

Haven't had much occasion to use yet as we got for a newly acquired rescue dog who was trained to a crate. I keep the foam separator in place and the fit is snug but not tight. Battery and spare SD card go in the front zip pouch without any issues. The mesh section under the lid holds a lens cloth nicely. My one complaint is the belt loop is pretty stiff and the stitching looks a little sketchy there, so I mostly carry it by the strap instead. For the money though you really can't complain. It's not a premium case by any means but it protects my camera and holds the essentials. Would buy again.

Picked up a handful of these for my hallway closets and bedroom doors. At four bucks a pop, you really can't complain too much. They install easy and the mechanism feels smooth enough. The matte finish is pretty bland though, kind of flat looking in person. Nothing wrong with them functionally, just don't expect anything fancy.
