I use this router at the receiving end of a wireless bridge between the two floors of my apartment, and also as a print and file server. I know this unit may be a bit of an overkill for the purpose, but I couldn't find any lower cost alternatives that would provide the same feature set. I was a bit worried about the speeds I would get through the concrete floor, but the connection to the main router, an Apple Time Capsule, is rock stable at a 866 Mbps signal rate (the signal sits around 47-49 dB against a 92dB noise floor). The connection would stay up for months at a time. I was pleasantly surprised that the stock firmware supported all the features I needed, but it's still nice to know that I can fall back to Merlin or DD-WRT if I need additional tweaking possibilities or special features. The performance and ease of use of the web GUI has also improved a lot compared to my previous Asus router, a WL500W. Being able to set most configuration items without a reboot is a godsend. Another nice touch from Asus was providing a discovery utility, that finds the router on the LAN and detects its current IP address, which saved me a lot of time when I was tweaking the IP configuration of the two routers. I cannot comment on the 2.4 GHz range or behavior, as I only use the router at 5 GHz. Update (9/17/2014): I was having print server reliability issues with the stock firmware (after a few days the printer stopped printing, even though the router showed it was connected). So I installed DD-WRT, and I'm back to being a perfectly satisfied customer. Aside from the printer trouble, I only had to reboot the router for firmware updates and I never experienced any connection issues whatsoever.
Does exactly what I need without breaking the bank. Transfers files from my camera's SD card to my MacBook super fast. Tiny enough to keep in my bag. Great little gadget for the price.

I've been beating on this little charger for about eight months now and honestly it's held up way better than I expected. I mainly run 3S packs for my basher and this thing gets tossed in my field bag every weekend. The housing has taken a few drops on concrete without cracking and the balance port still connects solidly with no wiggle. No it won't win any speed contests, my 2200mAh packs take a good while to top off. But for what I paid I really can't complain. The fan kicked in a little louder around month five but still works fine. If you're just starting out or need a backup that can take some abuse, this one's worth picking up.
Really impressed with the quality for what I paid. The adjustable sides are super handy for fitting different serving sizes, and the bamboo finish is gorgeous. Great buy.
Catty Noir is always a standout with her hot pink hair. Seeing her in this series is cool.
It works okay but the mounting opening is pretty narrow. Had to rig up an adapter to get it on my stand. Decent light once attached.

Wesley Snipes plays an undercover CIA agent in Romania. Pitted against this perpetually angry hero (whose emotions are delivered with bland voice-over) is a sexy and strong-willed Russian beauty played by Silvia Colloca. Snipes must protect Colloca going back to USA from the attacks of the villains of this country, whose motives I'm still trying to figure out. There is no denying that this is a low-budget action film made in Romania, kind of film you watch for shoot-outs and explosions. To their credits, the stunt persons of the film did a decent job and in one memorable scene a baddie falls out of the window (of the second floor of a house) and falls onto the roof of a van below, hitting his head against it really hard and bouncing like a rubber ball. That is amazing. And don't forget the cat-and-mouse chase scene in the subway where a bald-headed baddie shows one surprising stunt. But the rest of the film is very dull. "The Detonator" uses every clichd element of action genre taken directly from other better films, and throws them into the convoluted narrative in the wrong way. The film attempts to be different with a portrait of a gangster who owns a soccer team and several scenes about soccer games. However, it just doesn't work because of the tepid descriptions of games and banal action sequences mixed with them. It was in 2004 when we saw the third entry of `The Blade' which was not bad. But now Wesley Snipes seems to have officially joined in the direct-to-video land where Steven Seagal is the king or the Great One. (In fact `The Detonator' is co-produced by Andrew Stevens who is also responsible for such films as "Half Past Dead" "The Foreigner" and "Out of Reach.") I'm not saying that all straight-to-video actions are bad - remember Dolph Lundgren who is doing a very good job as star and director. - but as to `The Detonator" the result is simply disappointing.
Way better than I expected. Binge-watched the whole thing in one weekend.
For the price, you can't beat it. Grabs pet hair and dirt off hardwood fast. Worth every penny.
compass needs recal often, temp is off always, awesome idea execution sub par.

This was an amazing read! L. Ann Marie always has the perfect combination of action and romance to keep the readers wanting more. Mitch knows she needs help. Her ex is watching her at the door of her college class. She knows what this means but how is she to get away and get her daughter and get somewhere safe? At the end of class when a large hunk walks in she knows this is her chance. So she simply asks him to walk her to her car. She never expected for him to give her his truck and tell her where to meet him later. She also has no clue where this all will lead.

I bought them in black after loving them in brown. They are lightweight, cuter than Emus, and way more economical than Uggs. They are warm and comfortable enough for all day wear. After a few wears, they soften and are more wearable. I don't know how they would hold up in actual snow, but they are fine in the rain.

Used this guide for a long weekend trip to Wilmington and honestly the 3-day itinerary was spot on. I really appreciated how it broke things down by neighborhood so we weren't wasting time crisscrossing all over town. The walking tour of the historic district was our favorite part, we hit the Cape Fear River area, some gorgeous old churches, and a couple local eateries we never would've found on our own. My only gripe is I wish it had more budget-friendly restaurant options since a few of the picks were pretty pricey. Still, it packed a ton into a short read and kept us moving without feeling rushed. Definitely worth grabbing if you're doing a quick visit.

After searching my local furniture stores for a TV stand and coming up empty handed I came across this one several times online. I decided to try it out and it was worth it. We thought there would be some press-wood somewhere in the mix but we didn't see any. It was as the description said: "Made of poplar hardwood solids and cherry veneer" which was shocking. Overall we were pretty happy with the purchase and the price even though it was a piece together unit.
It kept my kids (4 and 5 old) silent almost 3 hours of the trip!

Got this for my husband and he gets compliments every time he wears it. The fabric breathes well in hot weather and fits exactly as expected. For what I paid, honestly can't beat it. Ordering another color because he practically lives in this thing now.
Wife hasn't complained yet so it must work. Priced right because she is the word frugal.
Great price for a bulk pack. My golden retrieval goes through chews fast and these hold up well.
Without giving anything away this story is an up and down ride of emotions and choices. While I would have liked to have a more uplifting ending, it was still a good read.

Picked this up on sale and honestly I'm torn. The New Orleans setting is gorgeous and the cast is stacked with heavy hitters, which makes the first half feel really promising. But somewhere around the middle it starts spinning its wheels and never quite recovers. The witchcraft storyline had so much potential and they just... don't do much with it. For what I paid (around fifteen bucks) I'd say it's an okay deal. You get some genuinely creepy moments and great performances from Bassett and Bates, so it's not a total waste. But I wouldn't recommend paying full price for it. If you can catch it discounted like I did, go for it. Otherwise maybe just stream it somewhere if available.
Bought this for my nephew's birthday and he plays with it every single day. Super sturdy material.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this little stand completely surprised me. It holds my dutch oven and lid perfectly without any wobble, and the compact footprint fits right on my counter next to the coffee maker. Assembly took maybe two minutes. I figured the metal would feel flimsy based on the photos but it's actually solid and well-balanced. Way sturdier than the wire rack I was using before. Definitely exceeded what I was expecting.

For the price these foam tiles are hard to beat. They're not super thick and the seams split if my kids drag furniture across them, but they cover the concrete garage floor well enough. Can't complain too much at this cost.
We found a cut place on one of the dvd watching it. It totally stop working. A one star rating they don't deserve even that.
Wow! This book is awesome. I don't even have words to describe how great. Add this to your MUST READ! I loved it T. K.

I got it because it has a magnetic end. Which is strong and holds on to the piece of metal that you want to hang on the wall. Well built and withstands drops from a couple of feet. Would i buy it again? yes... but i would buy the same generic china made one that is exactly the same at half the price. Edit: middle bubble it doesn't really give an accurate reading. Half of the liquid is gone:/ kinda worthless just to use the level vertically only.
Arrived quickly and well-packaged. Looks sturdy and my kitten immediately went crazy for it.
Bought this for my RCIA class and ended up grabbing extra copies for family members. Perfect for anyone exploring Catholicism or just wanting a solid reference. Clear, thorough, and easy to digest.
Liked it but it was torn when it cane in

i love the con-tact brand lite tack light adhesive shelf liner. easy to install and easy to remove with no residue. The regular contact is difficult to remove and leaves an adhesive mark on the shelf.

Decent concept but falls a bit short of what I was hoping for. The mount itself attaches to my bow fine and stays put during transport, which is good. My issue is with how the arrows actually fit. I'm shooting standard diameter carbon shafts and they sit in the rubber slots okay, but not great. There's enough wiggle room that I wouldn't trust it walking through brush or anything rough. My buddy has a similar holder from a different brand and his arrows lock in way more solidly. For the price I guess it's acceptable for range trips where my bow rides in a case anyway. Just don't expect your arrows to feel truly secured. Three stars because it works, just not as well as advertised.
Very pleasing to the eye Miy knife came very sharp The ball bearing system is the best, extremely smooth
Does exactly what I needed for weekend trips. Comfortable enough and the price was right.

I bought this unit for the bedroom. I was looking for something that would work with my Ipod. This one does as advertised but only using the original Ipod cord. I tried a USB extension and a 30 pin extension. Neither would work. In the end I used the 3.5mm connection. Other than this annoyance I like the unit. Good value for the price.

I only knew Saki for his bite-sized stories and figured the novels would feel padded or stretched thin. Boy, was I wrong. Both full-length books are fantastic, with the same wicked humor but way more room for the chaos to breathe.
Very useful clamps. It's good to have a couple of long reach clamps
Action scenes were decent but the plot made zero sense. Expected way better.
Way better than I expected for the cheap price.

This book is laugh out loud funny. The simple drawings add wonderful, ridiculous understanding of the events being described in Allie Brosh's unique voice. One of the most poignant descriptions of what it is like for a brilliant mind to be haunted by depression. She still manages to make the subject entertaining.
Great deal compared to what the hardware store charges. Bright, cool-running, and paid for themselves already.

This book was perfect for me because I have a collection of over 4,500 old photos taken by strangers...in my case, color slides in 3-D taken of everyday family life during the 1950s. I have had a lifelong love of anything 3-D (movies, comic books, View Master, etc.), plus I grew up during the '50s. This book, in my opinion, is a mirror on life itself (as well as life that has ended). I agree with the reviewer that wished the author had gone into some detail on finding and buying vintage photos. The sad thing is that most of the digital photos taken today will end up lost in la la land in the years to come, never to be seen again.
Bought it cause my wife likes the movie. My wife is a cheating witch though.

The price was right for these candles. I used the proper size votive candle holder for them but only got slightly longer than 8 hours of burn time. Yes, I did time them. They do burn odorless and clean and did not flicker at all until the last two hours. They did burn nearly every drop of wax. Overall, I was satisfied especially now that I know how long they will last.

Ordered these late Tuesday and they showed up Thursday morning, way faster than expected. They came in a sturdy shoebox wrapped in tissue, no crushed corners or anything. Slipped them on right out of the box and honestly didn't want to take them off. The wool upper feels super soft but still structured, and the footbed has that nice contoured support that just cradles your arch. I've got plantar fasciitis so I'm picky, and these instantly felt better than slippers I've paid way more for. Only worn them around the house so far but planning to wear them to run errands tomorrow. No break-in stiffness at all. Really impressed with the quality for the price. Already thinking about grabbing a second pair in another color.

Got this about six months ago and it's held up way better than I expected. My kids have watched it at least twenty times now and the disc still plays perfectly without any skipping or freezing. The case has survived being shoved into a packed entertainment center and tossed around the minivan, which honestly is more than I can say for most of our collection. No cracks, no scratches on the surface. The movie itself is pretty solid too, nothing mind-blowing but genuinely entertaining for family movie night. Took off one star because the bonus features are kind of thin and the menu navigation is clunky. But if you're just wanting something that'll survive regular handling and repeated viewings, this one's built to last. Definitely worth picking up.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this completely blew me away. I've paid way more for books in this genre that were half as good. The writing pulls you in right away and the emotional depth is no joke. I genuinely cared about what happened to these characters. The tension between them is written so well and the intimate scenes are seriously hot without feeling cheap or thrown in just for the sake of it. Finished it in two sittings because I literally could not put my Kindle down. For under three quid you are getting a properly gripping read with actual character development and a storyline that keeps you hooked. Already gone and bought the next one. Absolute bargain and easily worth five times what they're charging.

Got this for my daughter's fourth birthday and she's barely taken it off since. I was honestly shocked at how sturdy everything feels for what I paid. The apron has real stitching, not just cheap glue like most play sets in this range. The oven mitt actually has padding thick enough that she can grab warm (not hot) things from the kitchen without issues. The little hat adjusts easily with velcro in the back so it'll fit her for a while. We've thrown the apron in the wash twice already and no fading or fraying. Honestly would've paid double and still felt good about it. My niece is turning five next month and I'm already ordering her the same one. Can't go wrong here.

I've followed this series from the very first book and this finale hits every emotional beat. If you're a parent trying to pull your tween away from screens, hand them this entire series. Perfect for kids who outgrew mysteries but still want something fun and heartfelt. My daughter ripped through it in two days.

I've had this in for about four months now and figured it's time for an update. Honestly didn't expect much for the price but it's held up way better than some of the pricier ones I've tried. The color hasn't faded at all, which was my main worry since I drink a ton of coffee. Still screws on tight, no loosening or wobble. My tongue healed around it quick and I barely notice it anymore. Only complaint is the ball is a touch smaller than I prefer, makes it a little tricky to unscrew when I clean it. Lost a star for that, plus the packaging could've been better. It came loose in a tiny baggie. Overall solid buy though, would order again.

This was a decent read but didn't fully grab me. The premise hooked me right away, a widow struggling to keep her crumbling home together while dealing with her late husband's suspicious family. Unfortunately, the execution felt a bit flat. Kate's backstory is heartbreaking, but I wanted more depth from her instead of just seeing her as a victim waiting to be rescued. Ryan made for an unsettling antagonist, though his motivations seemed inconsistent at times. The romance between Kate and the love interest was sweet but predictable. I finished it in one sitting, so it held my attention, but I'm not rushing to recommend it. Fans of darker small-town suspense might enjoy it more than I did. Solid three stars.

I'm really picky about dresses since I'm curvy and most things cling in all the wrong places. Took a chance on this one for a wedding and wow, it delivered. The fit is surprisingly forgiving, the fabric has just enough stretch to hug without squeezing, and the bow detail sits perfectly without looking juvenile. I got the black with red trim and the contrast is sharp in person. Shipped fast and showed up wrinkle-free, which I was not expecting from a bagged dress. Wore it all day and stayed comfortable through dinner and dancing. Got tons of compliments. Honestly looks way more expensive than it was. Already thinking about grabbing another color. If you're on the fence, just go for it.

Picked this up wanting to broaden my reading habits. Honestly took me a bit to get into the swing of the old-fashioned prose, but once I adjusted I really enjoyed it. Some of the dated scientific ideas are funny now, but the adventure holds up surprisingly well. Glad I stuck with it.

Paid $4.99 for this and honestly expected way more. The romance felt hollow and the plot barely moved. I've read free webnovels with better character development. Not worth the price tag at all, glad I didn't spend more on it. Wouldn't recommend unless it drops to free.

The case arrived with a cracked corner, which was disappointing. Shipping took longer than expected too. As for the movie itself, it starts pretty rough and took me a couple sittings to get through. Eventually it picks up and finishes strong, but man, that opening act is a slog. Not terrible overall, just not something I'd rush to revisit. Glad I watched it once at least.
This thing is plastic so don't step on it! But it does the job so well! I had to push the magnets down in their little slots so it would stick to the metal register and it works great!
Arrived two days early in secure packaging. Opened it up and the material felt super durable. My kid immediately put it on and refused to take it off.
Honestly expected cheaper quality for the price but this thing feels substantial and looks way better in person. Totally exceeded my expectations.
Got this for under ten bucks and it's totally worth it. Both leads give fantastic performances and the story sticks with you. Not a feel-good watch by any means, but a solid indie pick for the price.
Really? The laser function is OK, but as a square, it's a joke. I only keep it because I like the laser.
Didn't expect much from this one but the drama between the husband and nanny surprised me. Way less cheesy than similar books in this genre. Some parts dragged but overall entertaining.
Arrived with the cover bent up and corners dented. Flipped through the first chapter and the writing felt pretty amateurish. Expected better quality for the price honestly.
wow, what we didn't know was going on during the cold war! Very good to finally know "some" of the history, amazing...
Honestly didn't expect much for the price but it outperforms the original charger by a mile.

Charity looked for love in a all the wrong faces. She needed to seek the face and love of God. Her home life was not the best, she did not feel the love from her parents or her sister. She caused herself a lot of heartache before she found TRUE love in another hurting soul Drew. He had a rough time of it when his father left the family and he was raised by his mother along with one sister and the other sister went to live with his father. Marriage can only truly survive when God is head of the house and then the man it is God's perfect plan for us. We need to let Him guide us to His choice for our soul mate. Thank God they came to that knowledge, Aaron, Harmony, Drew and Charity. Now little Faithe has a family she can thrive and grow in with lots of love. I enjoyed this story very much and I am sure you will also.

This is my second cover from this seller. I love that it is durable, functional and stylish. I have recommended this product to several friends and bought one as a gift. The case is easy to clean and the color is perfect. Great seller, fast shipping and excellent price. You really can't go wrong with this product.

Grabbed this on a whim and honestly didn't expect much for the price. Turns out it's packed with practical detox info I've actually used. Donna breaks everything down in a way that's easy to follow without being preachy. I've already loaned it to two friends who keep asking me about it. For what I spent, this is an absolute steal. Don't hesitate, just get it.

This is for Valentines for my wife. After taking out of package it looks Goood but will try to remember to update after valentines. OK after valentines it definetly looks goood and doesn't need removed to fulfill the mood it sets.

I've really enjoyed this series and feel this book is the best so far. Relationship issues between the main characters (Ivy, Rachel, Jenks, etc. ) are becoming more complex and less confusing. The author has really hit her stride in bringing all of these characters to life. The plot was fast-paced, resulting in me staying up way too late to finish it. Although the main character, Rachel, is getting stronger, she still has flaws and makes mistakes - keeping her real. The only (mild) criticism that comes to mind is the continued Ivy/Rachel angst. It hasn't hit overload yet, but I fear it might if it continues throughout the series. Overall, this was a great 5-star read for me.
The color hasn't faded at all after months of weekly washes. Fits my table perfectly and the fabric repels stains like magic.

All the Single Ladies is another outstanding novel from Dorothea Benton Frank! I've read all her books and enjoyed every one of them immensely. Her writing portrays down-to-earth, realistic yet delightful characters, their experiences, and emotions in ways to which readers can relate. Settling into a comfortable chair or sofa to begin reading a Frank book is the nearest thing to heaven I can imagine!
Great quality for the price. Handles daily use perfectly. Really impressed with this purchase.

Picked this up on sale for about six bucks, which felt fair enough for what you get. Derleth tries hard to capture Lovecraft's atmosphere, and some of the cosmic horror imagery lands well enough. The problem is every single story follows the same predictable path. Somebody arrives at a creepy inherited property, finds weird documents, consults Miskatonic scholars, and confronts something from beyond. You can see the twists coming from a mile away after the second tale. The prose is serviceable but lacks that genuine sense of dread Lovecraft pulled off. For the discounted price I paid, it was a decent way to kill a weekend. Would I pay full retail? Probably not. Grab it cheap if you are curious about how Derleth handled the Mythos, just keep expectations modest.

For under fifteen bucks this is a solid deal. The pry tip has decent leverage for opening paint cans and popping small nails. Screwdriver bits hold up okay for light tasks. Bottle opener works fine. Not heavy-duty by any means but worth keeping on your keyring for quick fixes around the house.
bought these for my daughters Minnie Mouse bday party. They were very cute and perfect for hot beverages.
It's ok if you like watching those cheesy sy-fy TV movies

Thought this would be flimsy for the price but it's surprisingly sturdy. Holds two large water bowls without any sliding around. Edges are tall enough to contain splashes and the matte finish looks way nicer than those cheap plastic mats. Fits perfectly by the back door.
Read it twice and the paperback's still holding up great, no spine creases or loose pages. Solid legal thriller that kept me hooked.

Race's story didn't grab me quite as much as Bax's did, but still a solid read. I'd definitely recommend this to anyone who likes gritty romance with morally gray guys. Crownover's world-building stays strong.

A month after I purchased this I gave it 4 stars. Today I will give it only one. The pan is great, a bit tinny so it warps easily but pretty good. The problem: The rack in NOT Stainles and "rots." See photo. You can see corrosion from chicken and pork? See exposed copper which was used as an inter-plating before chrome plating. Now regular steel wire costs about $1/lb and Stainless Steel costs about $2/lb. Therefore, for being miserly, by not using good materials two things happen: 1) In ordinary use the plating breaks off meaning you may be ingesting both chrome and copper (ingesting iron won't hurt you, and actually the copper won't either, but I don't really know about chrome. C'mon Manufactuer spend $1 more and raise the price $2 and give me a pan WITH A RACK that lasts. The manufacturer says stainless steel pan so is semi-honest and so gets one star. I'm disappointed.

I like the plot, I enjoyed the book. The characters are likable and I understood why the female lead acted the way she did because of past hurts. The books was a good length and the ending was satisfying.

BUtterfield 8 the phone number that rang Elizabeth Taylor to her first Academy Award!! Taylor is gorgeous as the woman who lights the evening fires of mens hearts. Her ethics prevented her from taking money for she is looking for true love only to be reminded what kind of woman she truly was. Lawrence Harvey is an unhappily married wealthy man who does fall in love with Taylor. His constant insecurities and jealously drives their romance and lives over the edge. Can Taylor ever achieve a normal life? Will she escape her past? The ending will surprise you. This DVD has both Full Screen & Anamorphic (auto adjusts to your tv) WideScreen formats. The picture quality is good, but disappointing considering this is 2003. Extras only include; Trailer and cast & crew listings. Worth a rental view before buying. Enjoy. Taylors performance and beauty is worth the viewers time.

Got this for my daughter's fifth birthday and she's obsessed. The instruction booklet shows how to make a bunch of cute little scenes and she actually sat still for an hour working through them. The pieces are good quality and everything snaps together nicely. I'd highly recommend this for kids ages 4 to 7 who are starting to follow directions on their own. Great gift idea that won't break the bank either.

This second in the series deals with a totally different sort of crime. A political conspiracy that erupts into a violent ending that you will not want to miss. I am getting ready to read the third book in the series and can't to see what the Hunters do next.

Grabbed this on a whim and so glad I did. A rockstar shifter romance for under three bucks? Total steal. The connection between the two leads felt genuine, and seeing the Bear Claw crew pop up was a nice touch. Finished it in one sitting. Already checking out the rest of the series.
Arrived two days early in a sturdy case with no scratches. The square shape looks even better in person, very stylish. Wish they sat a little higher on my nose, but overall a solid buy.

I, recently, bought this unit, for a friend. Upon installation, I found it to have a crystal clear picture, but here is the drawback. In order to hear ANY sound at all, the box had to be placed on MAXIMUM volume, AND I had to set my stereo on "acid rock concert" volume level, to hear ANY sound, at all. In short, to hear any volume, at all, I had to set the volume so loud that, for any other device, I would have had noise complaints, from my neighbors. AVOID this product, if you are serious about enjoying t.v.. Its just NOT worth the headache.

5 Stars This is the 13th book in this series by Hannah Ford and I have fallen in love with it. The suspense in this book is just like all the others. Each time this author puts words on the screen it is simply amazing. This book has it all suspense, outrageous sex, domination and romance. You can't go wrong in this series and the cliffy with this book had me wanting to jump through the screen...This is not a series you can predict in the very first few books this author keeps you hanging each and every time. Get this series is all I have to say Happy Reading

It does what it's supposed to and the flexible tentacles are handy for awkward wall warts. At sixty bucks though, I expected a bit more. The build quality is just okay, nothing feels particularly premium and the indicator light is annoyingly bright at night. I've seen similar designs from other brands for less money, so I'm not totally convinced this is the best bang for your buck. It works fine, just shop around first.
Been using this beast hard for six months now and the edge still bites. Tough as nails.
Nothing beats camping coffee. Plus, a great pot for boiling water for dinner.
Finally resolves the Gamache/Beauvoir relationship. Murder plot is secondary to Surete intrigue. Nice periods of suspense. I love Henri, the dog!
needed a little judicious sanding to smooth out mold spots but works fine

Perfect little keyboard for my home server rack. Plugs in with one cable and just works, no drivers, no hassle. Keys feel solid and the trackpad is surprisingly responsive for the size. Exactly what I needed.
Blade loosened up after just a week of light pocket carry.
Clean, short, easy read. The writing style could use some improvement.

Ordered this for my daughter's Monster High collection and it arrived two days earlier than expected. Box was in great shape with no crushing or damaged corners, which is a big deal for collectors who care about the packaging. The doll itself was securely fastened inside with no loose pieces rattling around. First impression when I took her out was how striking the white hair looks against the molded snakes underneath. The paint application on mine was clean with no smudges or wonky eyes. The outfit feels well-made and her accessories were all included and intact. My kid was absolutely thrilled and immediately added her to the display shelf. Really happy with this purchase and the seller shipped it fast and protected.

I love using the sliding discs for mountain climbers because my shoes tend to come off when I don't. One of my feet is larger, and to get my shoes to fit, one shoe always seems to slip. I don't like tying my shoes too tight, so I like using the sliding discs. They also work for other strengthening exercises. The quality is top notch. I love getting products from Epitomie Fitness. They are always well made and they are always willing to answer any questions. Thanks Epitomie Fitness for another great product!!
Daughter loved her gift this year, sparkle uggs. There not only cute but they are warm as well. I wish Santa brought me a pair of Uggs.

Arrived next day in pristine condition, no bent corners or dings. The cover art is stunning up close and the pages feel quality. Cracked it open immediately and the opening chapter hooked me fast. Already telling my coworker she needs a copy.
Been using this cable daily for six months and the connector still fits snug with no wobbling. The braided covering hasn't frayed at all. Worth every penny.

These are fantastic!! We've been able to DRASTICALLY reduce the amount of space our almost 100 Blu rays take up in our entertainment center. I HIGHLY recommend it, especially for those living in small spaces (like myself)!!! They shipped fast and appear to be good quality too.

Came apart completely. Blew Across the Kitchen after 4 uses. Its 90% plastic 10% metal Certainly not the quality I expected from the great MOEN which costs 6x as much as a cheap Danco. No wonder an illustration is shown not an actual image of the item. I will add my own. I thought the bottom portion would be a beautiful chrome. NOPE. 1970s kitchen plastic! The concept is nice. The less than fan shaped flow in spray mode is nice and more controlled that it is on a Danco Danco 36325B Swivel Aerator and Sprayer, Chrome aerator and the pull push mechanism felt solid. I did love the way it will stay in the spray mode, you don't have to keep pulling down on the fitting to move it from solid flow to spray time after time like you do with all the others on the market. Yes its swivel hips moved smoothly as the gears in a great engine, the twelve hours I owned that is. BUT - lot of good it did to have all of the nice features when all of it disassembled and bounded across the room. I tried repeatedly to re-seat it but things kept getting worse. With the upper fitting being totally plastic every time you grip it especially with pliers its soft threads (whether you protect it with a rag or not) get more misshapen and you can forget ever getting it back to working order if this happens to you. I had never had one come apart like this. I didn't even know that the insert which you screw to the faucet was also threaded at the bottom and connects in screw fashion to the swivel element too. I assumed that area was soldered or otherwise adhered. Well in this Moen it was just threaded on so when the threads came undone they came undone in two places.... the upper end toward the faucet and toward the bottom piece! Ka Boom!

Been using this rotary laser for about eight months on job sites and it's taken a beating. Dropped it twice and still calibrates fine. The beam could be brighter outdoors but for the price, solid build.

We got a new swing set and needed a few swings for it. I had a baby bucket seat but my 2yo wanted her own big girl seat. I picked up another seat a few days before this one so will be comparing the two. The other one was $7 more so will take that into consideration. This seat says that it will hold up to 250lbs and so does the other one. One thing that this one says on the bag is that it is meant for 3-10 yo. Also it is just a plain green swing and the other one has information on the backside. The other one has more plastic underneath so it looks heavier and stronger. The chains are both the same length and commercial grade and covered with a yellow plastic coating for comfort and safely. Overall I am very satisfied with this swing. It is perfect for our play set and the girls love it. I think that the other swing is slightly better than this one but just by a hair. I got this Heavy Duty swing seat at a discount for my testing, evaluation & honest, unbiased review. The fact that I got them at a discount has not influenced or impacted my judgment of this product. I am in no way required by the seller to leave positive remarks about their product.
Way smaller than I expected but pushes air better than my old one.

I've had this iron for over three years now and it's still going strong. Heats up fast, steam works perfectly, and the soleplate hasn't scratched at all. Survives my weekly laundry sessions without any issues.

After having bought a seat from our local super center, we took a chance on buying one sight unseen! I am so glad we did! This is a top quality seat, attractive hardware, and not much more can be said about a toilet seat! Worth the money, and can throw out the junk bought previously!
It was everything I expected it to be. Really happy with this purchase. It was clear and has focus.

A very interesting movie. The main problem I had was the musical score blaring over the dialogue. At times it was impossible to understand what the actors were saying.

Solid mystery with decent twists that kept me guessing. Not the most groundbreaking plot, but definitely entertaining. Would recommend to anyone who enjoys a quick, engaging whodunit for a weekend read.
I have 4 of these in the Natural color. I use them as drawers on my record player holder. They hold a lot for their size! And the Natural color matches any furniture.
Didn't stick at all and looked cloudy on my coffee table. Total waste of money.
For the price, this is the best sports bra I've ever bought. Holds everything in place perfectly.

Gave this to my 6 year old granddaughter who Loves headbands. We made them together and she loved it and was so very excited that she made her own with her own special jewels, etc... wonderful gift, will buy for gifts for other little girls!
Watched this five times already and the disc still plays perfectly. Awesome blend of genres with nonstop excitement throughout.

Bought these for my niece and they're way nicer than I expected for the price. Solid construction and super cute. Had to size down though.

I had high hopes for this set based on the description, but honestly it falls a bit short of what I expected. The magnetic strip is decent and holds okay on flat steel, but not super strong on round pipe. The vials are easy enough to read, though one of mine seems slightly off when I flip it to check. They're lightweight and compact, which is nice for tight spots, but the overall feel is more budget-grade than I anticipated. Not bad for the price, just not impressive.

They arrived crammed into a padded envelope so half of them were wrinkled and misshapen. Had to iron each one before my kid's birthday. Once smoothed out they looked okay and held a handful of candy each. Not bad for the price, but the packaging really does them dirty. Would probably order again in a pinch.

I've been reading Gerritsen for years and grabbed this one right away. After finishing it over the weekend, I'm honestly underwhelmed. The plot felt thin and the twists landed flat. Characters I usually love barely had any depth here. It took me longer than normal to get through because I kept putting it down. Not terrible, just forgettable compared to her usual stuff. Borrow from the library before spending money on this one.

I do love it. It's light weight, feels well built, rolls easily over cracks and great for getting the boys out of the house and into some fresh air. I know it's silly to take two cats for a walk in a stroller but have you ever walked a feline on a leash? I received this last week and the first 3 times they balked a bit as I made the walk only 20 minutes long. Gradually they got used to being in a confined area. I kept it open and in the living areas so they could play in it but their play got to be a bit rough and I see they have a pull in the netting. That was my fault and certainly not of the manufacturer. Now I bring it out of the closet and they both get in. The walk is up to 1/2 hour and today they even laid down and I didn't hear a peep. You should question how big your critter is before putting him into this stroller since it is a tad small. My cats aren't yet a year old and probably not even 5 lbs. each. There's no problem with them walking inside. However, I hope they don't get too big to use through the years. I recommend and do like the no zip. The only thing I don't like is that I can't store the stroller folded and standing upright. Perhaps I'll need to get a luggage strap to wrap around.

My cat has asthma and this litter has been a god-send. Clumps really, really well. I tried to switch her back to regular cat litter, but she began having asthma attacks again. This stuff works! It does not cure her asthma, but is not as much of an irritant as regular litter.

case back cracked on corners within first week and proceded to warp. The case would not stay attached to the ipad, it simply fell off after being attached. The JETech slim-fit case is a much better choice for a budget case

I've had my Fatcat for about eight months now and I'm pretty disappointed with how it's holding up. The blade edge chips way too easily, I mostly use it for normal cutting tasks and light camp duty, nothing crazy. Already had to reprofile it twice. The pivot loosens up constantly no matter how much I tighten it, and there's noticeable blade play developing which isn't acceptable on a knife at this price point. The handle scales have also started showing wear marks just from regular pocket carry. My buddy's got a $80 benchmade that's taken way more abuse and still feels solid. Honestly expected way better fit and finish for what SOG charges. It looks cool sitting on the desk but as an actual user it falls short.

These are great Yeti knockoffs at a fraction of the price! Bonus two lids and two straws! This is my new go to gift! I order monogramed initials and put them on......voila.......the recipients love 'em

Most of my computers (HP Z210) have one display port and one dvi output and the new monitor had only vga and hdmi inputs. The handy adapter worked just as I needed so all is good.

At thirty bucks a pair I expected better. The denim feels noticeably thinner than the Levi's I bought five years ago, and I can already see fading around the knees after just a few washes. The fit is fine and they're comfortable enough for everyday wear, but I don't see these lasting more than a year with regular use. My older pairs held up for ages with no issues. Seems like they've cut corners on material quality while keeping the same price tag. For what you're paying, the construction just isn't there anymore. They're okay if you catch them on sale, but honestly I'd look elsewhere if you want jeans that actually hold up. Disappointing for a brand I used to trust.

Great tool quality and doing a great job on soft copper. If not soft, you need to heat treat it first or the copper tube will split. Comes whit nice sturdy carrying case and looks like it will last forever if properly cared fore - worth the extra price if you like quality and take good care of your tools.
fantastic knife, very sharp strong and light weight. I just wish them made a partially serrated version with the wave feature.

I went into this expecting a true crime thriller, but it's really more of a dense historical and theological exploration with the Lafferty murders woven throughout. Not a complaint exactly, Krakauer does a phenomenal job tracing how fundamentalist offshoots developed and why they still attract followers today. I just thought the pacing would be quicker based on what friends told me. Some chapters drag when he gets deep into LDS church history, but the sections dealing with Ron and Dan Lafferty themselves are genuinely chilling and hard to put down. The reporting is meticulous and you can tell he interviewed tons of people. Overall really solid and thought-provoking, just be prepared for a slower, more academic read than the cover suggests.
Bought this for daily step tracking and it's been spot on. Battery lasts forever, the app syncs smoothly, and the screen looks great. Super happy with it.

-"She scurried back up the steps and quickly closed the door. Heart thudding, she felt defenseless. She scanned the one room cabin and spied a large wooden spoon by the stove. She darted across the floor, grabbed it, then positioned herself behind the door and waited. Footsteps stomped with the force of a giant on the wooden steps. Pounding in synchronization with each ragged inhale Nikki took. Dang it. The door. Just as she lunged forward to lock it, the handle turned. She jumped back. This is probably nothing, just an innocent mix up in dates. But then again She lifted the spoon over her head. A broad shoulder, covered in dark blue, entered her line of vision. Then a crop of longish, wavy hair. Just as the man angled his back to the door to close it Womp! Not one to sport violent tendencies, she lowered the spoon with all the force of a pillow fight. Owe! What the! Startled blue eyes rounded on her. Apples and oranges skipped off the top of the brown paper sack and went flying across the floor. Shock, pain and aggravation crossed the mans features. His strong jaw clenched as if he fought against retaliation and she supposed, a string of cuss words. He tumbled toward the sofa and lowered the bags in one smooth motion. He grabbed his right shoulder and winced. What the hell, lady. Who are you?- Excerpt From: Flynn, Darcy. Seven Days in December" This is such a fun, light, romantic read. Ideal for reading by a fire on a cold winter day with hot cocoa and marshmallows. I read it while on vacation on a hot day in August and it was just as good! Highly recommended.

The voltage tester works ~20% of the time and has to be held just right on the 12/2 and 14/2 wire I tested it with. Feels very cheap and made out of very cheap / fragile plastic. Throwing it in a tool bag would probably damage it. There is no way I would trust it to be accurate and use it in any situation. It is a dangerous device in my opinion and will frequently give "False negative" readings - indicating there is no power running through a wire when there actually is. On a positive note the flashlight works so there is that...
Swapped out my ancient sump pump for this beast. Plenty of power, quiet operation, and installation was a breeze. Arrived two days early and packaged securely. Totally satisfied.

Arrived two days earlier than expected in a neat, compact sleeve with a small carrying loop. Unfolded it right away and was surprised by how soft and lightweight the fabric felt. Way thinner than a normal bath towel but clearly well made. Love it so far.

Wore this shirt maybe four times before the collar started fraying and the seams came undone at the shoulder. Fabric pills like crazy after one wash. Spend a little more and get something that actually holds up. Total waste.
My favorite Star Trek of all. Not one bad season in the bunch

Soft, Washable and best of all can put in dryer!! Come in many sizes, as I have 1 45 lb Vizsla and 90 lb Lab mix. They LOVE Them!! Have had them for 8 months, wash every week, & still look good. Put in their crates at night, in the rooms were we are for them to stretch out & sleep, (we have all hard woods in the house). And in the back of out SUV, when we go on road trips. They'r the best I've found!!

I was looking for something different and came across these while looking through the Amazon lists. They are larger than I expected, which is excellent! They were delivered quickly. I'm very satisfied with this purchase.

(Source: I receieved a digital copy of this book for free on a read-to-review basis. Thanks to author Kris Kreisman.) Erin is good at tennis, but while she likes it, it doesn't mean everything to her, not the way it does to her mom. Erin's mom is determined that Erin use her talent for tennis, and become something really good, but Erin just wants to have a normal life. One day whilst visiting her grandmother, Erin finds herself sent back in time to 1970, where she has the chance to play tennis against her mother. Who will win the match? Is Erin better than her mother? And how will Erin get back to her own time? This was an okay read, but it felt a little awkward in places. Erin liked tennis, but not as much as her mother did, and more than anything she wanted to be a normal teenager, and go to the movies with her friends when she wanted to. Erin tried to fit in when she realised that she had travelled back in time, but I expected her to be a lot more concerned with how she was getting back than she was. I personally would have been worried about how I was going to get back, and how soon I would be able to get back rather than making friends in 1970 and taking advantage of how cheap the prices were in the shops! The storyline was okay, but the time-travel aspect felt a little strange. At the beginning of the story we hear from Erin how annoyed she gets with her mum, and how irritating some boy at school is, and then we're suddenly thrown back in time to 1970. Very sudden, and unexpected, and just didn't fit well with the rest of the story. The ending was okay, and it was good that Erin learned a little about the sort of person her mom really was. I also liked the fact that Erin's actions in 1970 had consequences, and that her meddling in the past changed things in the present. Overall; an okay time-travel/coming-of-age story. 5 out of 10.

I like the old three original movies the best, but these are good too and I always gt a little more of the story each time I watch them. The movies played well even though they were not brand new (ran smoothly, no skips). These movies have good special effects, action, and adventure, but are a little on the sad side because of the storyline.
Been using this daily for six months and it still looks brand new. Zippers and stitching are solid. Perfect size for essentials.
Way better quality than I expected for the price. The velvet looks rich and the fit worked perfectly over my outfit.
Arrived two days early with zero dents in the bag, which is rare for dog food orders. Opened it up and the kibble smells fresh. My lab pup dove right in. Super happy so far.

It's getting hotter up in here! The tension between Artemis and Orion is about to burn the book up. As much as Artemis is trying to keep from mating with Orion is as much as she's getting closer to the act. Behind the scenes we find that someone has altered her DNA and there's more to her and her powers that she has yet to know. I'm certainly looking forward to the next book to see where Artemis and Orion end up

Exactly what I needed for the awkward spot behind our nightstand where only one outlet was reachable. Both plugs fit snugly and I've had a phone charger and a small fan running off it for about a month straight with zero issues. The cord feels substantial and well-made, not flimsy at all. My only minor gripe is that it sits at a slight angle when plugged in, but it hasn't loosened or caused any problems. Nice to finally use both sides of a duplex outlet without blocking the second socket. Would absolutely grab another pack for the other tight spots around the house.

The motion sensor works great, which is the one thing I really like. But the housing feels flimsy and the plastic is thin. After two weeks of rain, condensation built up inside the lens. Not confident this will survive a full winter on my porch.
Love love love this cooler. My gf and I use this for our picnics in the summer. It makes a great lil table for stuff when sitting down.
Comfortable enough for daily wear, just wish they were slightly thicker.
The fire striker works instantly every single time. Threw plenty of sparks even in damp conditions. Solid addition to my hiking pack.

Picked this up for my daily commute and honestly it did the job. The plot moves along at a good pace and some of the characters are pretty memorable. I found myself actually wanting to pick it back up each morning, which says something. That said, I finished it about a week ago and honestly some of the details are already fading. The themes the author is going for are interesting but feel a bit heavy-handed in spots, like you're being led to a conclusion instead of finding it yourself. A few sections dragged and I caught myself skimming. Overall it's a solid read that passes the time fine, just nothing that stuck with me long term. Would probably recommend grabbing it from the library before committing.

My daughter is 18 months old so she is at the starting age for this toy. At 18 months, she does not even come close to having the dexterity to stack these bocks. Now, when I stack them, she gleefully knocks them down. Regardless, the blocks are very well made. They are real wood with a lacquered finish that will prevent splinters if they go into babys mouth. The animals are very cute, although the parrot looks more like an owl.

Bought this to use in a commercial kitchen for hard to clean dishes. All employees used it when cleaning dishes and it got job done. Its durable as it wound up in garbage disposal a couple of times and was still usable. A two pack supply was nice for the money.
I couldn't figure out how to wear this thing no instructions were included

Bought this for a backpacking trip after reading good things about microfiber. Big mistake. The thing feels like you're wiping down with a plastic bag. Zero absorbency. I'd get maybe one arm dry and then it just pushes water around instead of soaking anything up. Tried wringing it out like the instructions say and it barely released any moisture, so by the second day it had this sour mildew smell that wouldn't go away. The stitching around the edges started fraying after two hand washes too. For what they charge you'd think they could at least hem it properly. Ended up using my spare t-shirt to dry off for the rest of the trip, which honestly worked better. Don't waste your money on this overpriced piece of junk.

Super large vestibule area to store gear. Neat how they have the doors open opposite of each other, good for catching the wind to keep you cool if it is hot outside. Tent well made but I had to read the instructions on how to set it up first time, totally different with the three poles crossing each other.
Arrived quickly in solid packaging. Feels sturdy right out of the box. Mounted my 55-inch with zero issues so far.

I really enjoyed the small-town Southern setting in this one. The author nails the atmosphere of a close-knit community where everybody knows your business, and that backdrop makes the mystery feel more grounded. Savannah is a solid protagonist, flawed but determined, and I liked watching her piece things together while dealing with her own baggage. My one complaint is that the family dynamics got a little confusing at times. There are quite a few siblings and in-laws to keep track of, and I had to flip back more than once to remember who was who. That said, the pacing moves along nicely and the ending caught me off guard. Not a perfect read but definitely engaging enough that I'll check out the next installment.

An orphaned boy is raised in a protected and isolated environment. He eventually leaves to see the rest of the world, works as a fruit picker and lobsterman. He falls in love with a former patient of the orphanage abortion facility. If I tell you any more it may ruin it for you.

Bought this for my kids expecting a fun little boat to keep them entertained. It's okay, but not quite what I hoped for. The accessories are cute and my youngest likes arranging all the little figures on the deck. Problem is the whole thing feels pretty flimsy for the price. The top canopy piece pops off constantly and the plastic is thinner than similar toys we own. My son played with it enthusiastically for maybe two days before losing interest and going back to his other stuff. For what we paid, I expected something a bit more substantial. It looks great in the pictures but doesn't quite deliver in person. Not terrible, just underwhelming. Probably wouldn't purchase again but the kids don't hate it either.
Great pair of shoes! My 2 year old has very wide feet, and the 8W fit perfectly.

I've had this DVD for over three years now and it still plays perfectly despite being used almost daily. The disc has held up way better than other workout videos I've owned. Ravi and Ana's routines never get old either, I keep coming back because of how great I feel afterward. Definitely worth every penny.
Perfect starter kit for my daughter's first hamster. The water bottle actually doesn't leak which is rare! Tube tunnels connect easily and the wheel spins quietly at night.

This wallet works well. I have an access dot that is used to scan into some locations at work and the RFID blocking didn't interfere with its function. There's a fair amount of room inside and the wallet stays fairly slim. I can't say anything about the long-term reliability of the wallet, but so far it's holding up well without any signs of wear and tear.
Way better than I anticipated. Fabric is thick and cozy, and the shade matches the photos perfectly. Runs slightly cropped but fits exactly how I wanted.

I've been wanting stretched ears for years but could never commit to actually gauging them. These fake plugs are the perfect solution. The screw-on backing is what really sold me, I sleep in these every night and they haven't come loose once. I used to lose earrings constantly because those tiny butterfly backs would just slide off, but these stay put no matter what. They're comfortable enough to forget I'm wearing them, and the front and back look the same so they sit flat against my earlobe. The stainless steel hasn't irritated my sensitive skin at all, which is a big deal for me. Honestly looks like I have 0g plugs in. Nobody can tell they're fake unless they get super close. Worth every penny.

Got this to mount a couple of SSDs into my older mid-tower case and it does the job fine. The metal construction feels solid enough and doesn't flex once everything is tightened down. What I really appreciated is that Thermaltake includes a full set of mounting screws right in the package, saved me a trip to my spare parts bin. My one real complaint is the screw hole alignment on the outer edges was slightly off on one side, so I had to wrestle a bit to get the last screw started. Not a huge deal if you're patient, but it was annoying in the moment. For the price though, it's a decent little bracket that gets the job done without much fuss.
I KEPT HAVING PROBLEMS WITH MY BIKE NEEDING AIR IN ONE OF MY TIRES EVERY COUPLE OF DAYS SO I FIGURED I HAD A SLOW LEAK. BOUGHT THIS TUBE AND NOW I"M CRUISING ON MY BIKE WITH NO HASSLES.
Arrived quickly with zero damage. Looks even better in person.
Bought a handful of these to keep in my closet for emergencies. Handed two out already and both guys loved them. Quality is decent for the price and they feel like a real gift, not an afterthought.
Been using these daily for about four months now and they still work perfectly. No issues whatsoever, really solid quality.

Picked this up for a Stormtrooper build and it gets the job done without breaking the bank. The silver paint on the barrel is actually pretty decent and gives it a nice metallic look from a few feet away. My main gripe is the seam running down the middle of the grip is super visible and the two halves don't line up perfectly flush on mine. Had to hit it with some black paint to hide the gap. Also worth noting the scope is just a solid molded piece with no actual detail underneath. That said, it's lightweight enough that it won't drag your belt down during a long troop. Decent placeholder if you need something fast and affordable.

Finally a nursing bra that doesn't make me look like I'm wearing a sports bra from 2005. The clip-down mechanism is what sold me, it's genuinely one-handed, which matters more than I can explain when you've got a hungry newborn and zero patience left. Previous bras I tried had these stiff clips that needed two hands and a prayer. These are smooth and secure at the same time, so nothing accidental is happening when you bend over. Fabric is buttery soft and hasn't pilled after a bunch of washes. I'm a 34D and grabbed a medium based on other reviews, spot on. No digging straps, no weird gaping, no uniboob situation. Wearing it basically every single day since my little one arrived. Already ordered a second one.

I always heard this was Kevin Smith's weakest movie, so I put off watching it for years. Turns out everybody was wrong. Is it crude? Absolutely. But that's kind of the whole vibe, and it completely works. Jason Lee steals every single scene he's in, his comic book rants had me dying. I actually think the dialogue here punches faster and is way funnier than Clerks in a lot of places. Jeremy London is honestly the weakest link, but you barely notice because the supporting cast carries the weight so hard. If you grew up hanging around malls in the nineties, this hits different. Way exceeded my expectations. Definitely picking up the Blu-ray so I can watch the bonus features next.
Arrived next day in a sturdy box. Really sharp looking bag, feels well made right out of the package.

DMG is an adaptogen (sort of like Ginseng for us) for animals. I have an older cat who I am hoping will benefit from this as it's supposed to help enhance circulation and muscle recovery. From my research, DMG is produced naturally by both animals and humans and it's supposed to boost immune response (by over 400%!). It can also support skin health, glucose metabolism and brain function. I am hoping that this will be helpful for her to make her aging process healthier. My husband and I take 'people' adaptogens for our health so why not one for your pets health as well. Good for dogs, cats and birds too.
Installed these in our dining room fixture six months ago and not a single one has burned out yet. Solid lifespan for the price.
These are great for starting charcoal in the grill. Burn long enough to get a good coal going.
Took these out for a long run yesterday and zero chafing. The mesh behind the knees keeps things cool, and the waistband stays put without digging in. Flattering fit too.

Naomi is half of a very successful mother and daughter singing group. Her rise from poverty and struggles with raising two daughters on her own has been well documented. Once the spotlight faded however she suffered from severe depression. This book is hard to read but she is very honest about her disease. She writes about her struggle with her disease, the medical establishment and her difficult childhood. It is obvious she wrote this book in hopes of helping others. At the end of the book she does offer helpful advice. I found the book very easy to read and hard to put down. Whether you or someone you know is struggling with depression this book will inspire you.

Loved it..l found out so much about my Kindle Fire. I found out things i could do that i didn't know about. I had this on my Kindle Fire when I purchased it but didn't think much about it because i have owned so many Kindles before. Well one night i had no internet access and all i had was this manual on my Kindle to read...because i had no other new books at the time.. i was amazed at what i could actually do with my Kindle Fire. This is your typical cheap, made-in-China-esque product. That's fine, but it wasn't.99 - it was what, $6? I got it for evening walks with my dog and at first, I was really happy with it. It sheds a nice blue light and allows her to see where she's walking and, more importantly, allows passing cars to see both of us! It attached nicely to her collar. Even before the clasp broke (in literally fewer than 10 uses), there were a couple issues--the light itself is very hard to turn on. I pressed both sides as hard as I could, and I ended up having to hit it against a wall to get the thing to turn on. Also, the clasp is difficult to get on a squirming dog. You'd think it would easily collapse so that you could slip it onto the collar...I don't want my dog wearing it all the time (just one more thing on her collar to jingle/get caught/etc.). But it's a hassle to get on. And yet, it broke after only a few uses! All in all, not worth the money. It's a good idea, just poorly made.

I will be using them to play softball. I know that the are trail and hiking shoes but with the comfort and tread, they are a good softball shoe.

I had high hopes for this scale based on the listing, but it's been a total letdown. My old cheap scale from Walmart worked better than this. The readout jumps around constantly even when nothing on the platform is moving. I'll put a bowl on, hit tare, and watch the number drift up and down by two or three grams before settling somewhere random.
