The surface is also way smaller than it looks in the photos, so anything bigger than a coffee mug hangs off the edges. Honestly expected better accuracy for the price. Going back to my old trusty scale and returning this one today.
perfect to use when I'm on my dailey execrise program.

The trick is to READ THE DIRECTIONS before you put it on. I didn't with the first screen I tried to apply and didn't do it right. Fortunately there are 3 screens here. Read the directions and put the last two on my two cameras. They fit very nicely and allow the touch screen to function well while protecting it. And you can't beat the price!

Perhaps it was bad luck for V. Hislop that I came to this book immediately after Michael Chabon's Telegraph Avenue - now there's someone whose characters zing off the page, from whose pen flows effortlessly great prose and who can put together a damned good story. None of which, sadly, applies to Ms Hislop. OK, so I might have been dazzled by Telegraph Avenue, but I think that even if I'd read The Thread close on the heels of say, a thoroughgoing perusal of the phone book, the latter would shine by comparison. I think that Ms Hislop intended The Thread to be a peon to Thessaloniki which is, I'll grant her, a great little city. But it never comes to life; if there is such a thing a taxidermic prose, Ms Hislop can do it. Poor old Thessaloniki is just a one-dimensional sketch under her hand, a stage set about which she poses a cast of cliched cardboard cutouts (the Nazi's mouth is 'thin' - aren't they always? - the protagonist's bad husband is fat and smelly; the university students are all intellectual firebrands. Etc etc). There are far better books than this about this area and this period. For example, anyone who wants a great fictional account of the sack of Smyrna should read Jerusalem Poker (Edward Whittemore), or Middlesex (Jeffrey Eugenides) or Birds without Wings (Louis de Berniers) while Alan Furst's Spies of the Balkans brings pre-war and wartime Thessaloniki beautifully alive in a way that Ms Hislop could only dream about. Don't waste your time with this book. Read something good.
My kitten is much more excited about eating this than she was about both Nula and Canidae wet food. After a few weeks, so far, so good.

I read Stuck in the Middle and loved it. I was so happy to start this second book in this series and loved it just as much, if not more, than the first book. The characters and relationships are so real and something most of us can relate to in one way or another. Each family member and the rest of the characters were interesting and fun to get to know. I really enjoyed this book and Im on my way to starting the 3rd book in this series. I wish there were more!!!!! It was a nice, clean and sometimes funny story I was so happy to have found. Thank you Virginia Smith for writing a super nice series!!!!!!
Very comfortable right out of the box. The neutral color is great and the style goes with about anything you'd wear. Very happy with my purchase.

Bought this little juicer about six months ago for my morning routine. I mostly juice oranges and grapefruits, and it handles both without struggling. The motor isn't super powerful, so you do need to press down a bit and pause to let it catch up, but the juice comes out pretty clean with minimal waste. Cleanup is genuinely easy which is a huge plus for me. The plastic feels decent, not flimsy, though I'm careful with the reamer part when washing. For the price point, I really can't complain. It's become part of my daily breakfast setup and I haven't regretted the purchase once.

This movie wasn't meant to be a documentary. It was just a vehicle for some good ole good guy beats the heck outta the bad guy movie. It exceeded my expectations. Even though I've seen this movie many times, I contine to enjoy it.
Looks like another fun one. Suspending disbelief but hey that's what escapism in reading is for.

This is the best book I've read in 2017 -- funny, sad, entertaining, totally satisfying, At the end (a denouement I never expected), I wanted to turn back and read it again to watch for the preparation and clues Towles had scattered throughout. What's to be said about a book in which the protagonist (a Former Person to the Bolsheviks, Count Rostov to his friends) is under house arrest in a Moscow hotel for 40 years, Nikita Khrushchev plays a very small part, and New York Times correspondent Harrison Salisbury's overcoat is crucial to the way it all works out? But the plot isn't the best part -- it is Towles' light-hearted prose style. Though he doesn't let the reader forget the horrors that were occurring outside -- massive starvation, five-year plans that didn't work, World War II -- what is important here is one man's mastery of his circumstances.

This float has been a total game-changer for us this summer. We've taken it on vacation and used it in our backyard pool at least a dozen times. Setting it up is quick once you get the hang of the inflation sequence, and it feels sturdy enough that I'm not constantly panicking. The canopy adjusts easily so I can angle it as the sun moves, which means we actually get to enjoy our pool time instead of heading inside after twenty minutes. My eight-month-old sits comfortably and seems genuinely happy kicking around in it. I will say the canopy catches wind a bit on breezy days, but it's never been a real problem. For the price, this is easily one of the best baby purchases I've made this year.

I've had this little humidifier running in my bedroom for about eight months now and it's been solid. It's not fancy, the construction is mostly lightweight plastic and the power indicator is ridiculously bright for nighttime use. I ended up taping a small piece of cardboard over the light and that solved it. I run it on the low setting most nights and a full tank gets me through until morning. Just use filtered or distilled water because tap water will leave deposits and reduce the mist output over time. I'd recommend this to college students, apartment renters, or anyone wanting a budget-friendly option for a single room. It's not built to last forever, but for under twenty bucks it does the job. Four stars for the price point.
A pleasant watching experience through and through. Masterson, Thompson, Stoltz, Koteas, Sheffer, all give strong and enduring performances. A little gem.

Pluses: The base appears to be strong, well designed, and well made. The armature is also strong and adequately rigid. The adjustment is reasonably easy and keeps it's place without causing damage to the armature. And, the bolt at the top of the armature is strong and rigid. Minus: The corded loop does not hold without risking strangling. I would much prefer something that was adjustable and had a break-away connector to assure that it would not injure my dog(s) if they became desperate to escape the grooming table. I am currently looking for a replacement for the loop. All said, I would buy this product again for my 65 pound poodle, especially after her matures enough to stand more steadily for grooming. I have never found a lead that I found completely adequate, so I forgive Master Equipment for not satisfying my desires on this grooming stand. I have never used a stand for a dog larger than 80 pounds; when I had Newfoundlands, I groomed them on the floor.
Wore these constantly for six months. Still holding up great with zero rips or fading.

Our dog hasn't ripped it open yet, and she's the kind of burrower that tears and digs into every bed we bring into the house. FYI: It's not because of this bed's durability. It's just because our Pitt bull mix likes the pre-existing shape of this particular bed. Otherwise it would be in pieces on the floor, and then in smaller shreds in the garbage. Every dog has her own opinion

Got this little bed for my niece's third birthday and she absolutely loves putting her dolls to sleep in it. The wood frame is solid and has held up to a toddler climbing on it more than once. The included mattress and blanket are definitely on the cheap side, but for the price you really can't complain. I'd highly recommend this to anyone with a 2-4 year old who's into pretend play. Just maybe upgrade the bedding yourself.

LOVE at first warmth. I wear my fall riding gloves at 15' F and my hands still sweat. I have small bar ends. Not the long aluminum type shown on their website. I also don't want to remove my hands from the mitts to use the bar ends. I bought this model, no hole for bar ends, and I am able to use my bar ends without removing my hands. The fit is a bit tight even in XL size. The length from the end of the bars toward the stem could be an inch longer and it would work better. There is a velcro tiedown inside that straps to your handlebar but with bar ends it simply won't work in my case. If the velcro were at the bottom as opposed to the end of the mitt it would work. I may perform some minor surgery to move the velcro or punch some grommet holes to better attach the mitt to my bars. Otherwise it keeps wanting to slide off and I find myself yanking it back on all ride. It's not terrible but could be better.

For what these cost, I expected a lot better. The material feels thin and cheap, like something you'd grab off a clearance rack for a third of the price. After one wash the seams started fraying near the collar and the color faded noticeably. I don't mind paying good money for a shirt but this one just doesn't deliver. The stitching is uneven in spots and the buttons feel like they'll pop off if you stretch at all. Honestly you're paying for the name on the tag and not much else. I've bought similar styles from other brands for way less that held up ten times better. Wouldn't buy again and honestly wouldn't recommend it to anyone looking for decent quality at this price point.
Honestly didn't expect much for the price, but this little dongle punched way above its weight. Streaming is buttery smooth and it recognized my network instantly.
The clasps broke after just two months of use. The fabric also started pilling really badly around the seams. Expected better quality for the price.

Been buying this for about eight months now for my three retrievers and the quality has been super consistent. The kibble holds up well in our airtight storage bin without going stale or crumbling into dust like some other brands I've tried. Even my picky old girl cleans her bowl every single time. Their coats are noticeably shinier and my vet commented on their improved muscle tone last visit. Yes it's not cheap but you genuinely get what you pay for here. Won't be switching anytime soon.

This is the first book by this author that I have read and, unfortunately I found it quite disappointing. I never felt a connection to the heroine and then I really didn't like the lies she told her supposed best friend, who had helped her and also set her up with her cousin. She continues with her lies to the hero and his friends to almost the very end. This dishonest behavior is from a woman who is portrayed as a devout Christian. The hypocrisy was off-putting and the subsequent HEA not believable.
Been using these for my tank for over a year. They fit perfectly and keep the water crystal clear. Will keep ordering.
When i got my PS3, there was only one missing link to complete my total entertainment center and this is it.

Bought this for my daughter's birthday and it completely made the night. The colors are super vibrant and it lit up our whole backyard. Setup took about two seconds. My neighbor already asked where I got it after seeing it through the fence. Highly recommend for anyone hosting kids' parties, backyard BBQs, or really any get-together that needs a fun vibe. Worth every penny and then some.

I use this Blu-ray disc as a demo for my home theater, with a 110-inch projected image. There are many times I do not have time to show a long movie to visitors who just want to see the theater in action, so showing a chapter from this disc is perfect. Even teenagers, notoriously hard to please, love seeing this footage. Well done. I wonder if there will be a 4K version eventually, once that format catches on (assuming is does)?

For under ten bucks, these are an absolute steal. The seamless design means no gross food buildup where the handle meets the head. They've held up perfectly to my cast iron skillet and dishwasher runs. Solid construction, great price, can't ask for more.

I really wanted to love this one because the ranch setting drew me in right away. The author clearly knows how to describe the landscape and you can picture the dusty trails and wide open skies. That part was genuinely well done. But the romance itself fell completely flat for me. The male lead was way too controlling and honestly pretty condescending toward Callan. Every time she tried to stand up for herself he would just override her decisions and the book treated it like it was romantic instead of frustrating. The letters from the mother were an interesting plot device but they got resolved too quickly and felt rushed. I kept waiting for Callan to actually push back and reclaim her independence but it never really happened. Disappointing overall.

This years favorite book. I really wanted to understand life in Kentucky and the exodus to the midwest and the problems in the area after coal left so many people without jobs. This is an important book for Democrats to understand why people voted for Trump and a way to have more compassion for those coming from Coal country. I don't want to give more away but this shows the situation in a compassionate loving way about family and their strong bonds.

Perfect for anyone wanting a clean romance that doesn't drag on forever. I bought this for a weekend trip and finished it in two sittings. The leads actually talk to each other like real people instead of having ridiculous misunderstandings. Gave my copy to my mom and now my sister wants it too.

dont let the awful title fool you.it was originally called stepkids but was changed for no particular reason.dont stop watching this movie when you see the first half hour.i was about to but i decided to give it a chance to get much better.and it really did! it started to have very good cinematography or something.definetely overated.well maybe because i saw it on disney channel and they might have cut out some of the language.i really enjoyed this movie

Picked this up on a whim and honestly couldn't be happier. Right out of the box the blade was razor sharp and the action is buttery smooth. Fits perfectly in the pocket without being bulky. I've been carrying it daily for a few weeks now and it still looks brand new. Definitely worth every penny.
Had these hanging for six months now and they still look brand new. Great at filtering sunlight without darkening the room.
Love the motion sensor on this thing, it grabs soap instantly every time without any weird delay. Refilling is easy too. Definitely worth the price.

Arrived two days late and the box was practically destroyed on my porch. The plastic itself had a crack running along the seam near the bottom, so I couldn't even test it without water leaking everywhere. No padding inside, just the tank rattling around in a cardboard box with one crumpled sheet of paper. Honestly even if it hadn't been cracked, the quality is a joke. Feels like a cheap novelty cup you'd win at a carnival. The lid fits weird and the whole thing just screams flimsy. I was planning to use this for my desk but there's no way I'd trust it holding water near my electronics. Returning immediately. Don't waste your time on this.

I LIKE THIS ITEM, FULL DETAILED, VERY GOOD FOR PAPO. Is really a Dinosaur very interesting and very educational for all people because is made exactly and is very realistic when one is close of him. Thanks you to Papo for your great job
These are much better than the Uniden OEM batteries. Having 1400mAh makes a world of difference. My portable Uniden phones last much longer off the base chargers.
Arrived quickly with no dents in the bag. Pup seemed to enjoy the first bowl.

I've had this shape wear for nearly one year. It probably does run a tad small but it also needs to be snug to do its job. I am short- 5'2"- and (was) 40ish lbs overweight so I ordered the L. It fit very well with no riding up or sliding down at all. There are no lines visible on your clothes to even hint that you're wearing something like this. I ended up ordering another in the 2nd color & wear one or the other most days. It hasn't seemed to wear out in any way with numerous washings over the year. In fact, drying them helps them regain snugness. After a decent weight loss, it obviously doesn't work quite as well but I like the product enough to order both colors in a smaller size, perhaps even a couple of each. They are comfortable and just help me feel sleeker, whether it's under a business suit, dress, or jeans! Honestly, I feel wrong going without them now. Compared to most effective shape wear, you simply cannot beat the price. At my height, it does pull up to my bra line, which seems appropriate to me. I definitely recommend this to anyone wanting to smooth out their shape & just feel slimmer!

The way the author weaved music history into the coming-of-age narrative really stuck with me. The vinyl record subplot felt incredibly authentic and added such a rich layer. My teenager actually enjoyed it too.

I really like these sneakers. They have moderate arch support and a firmly cushioned sole. They are comfortable right out of the box. The design is cute in person - bright, but not crazy. They do run nearly 1/2 size smaller than the newer New Balance sizing, but if you've worn New Balance for years, get your old size and you'll be fine. I recommend them. If they had better arch support, I'd give them 5 stars.

Ordered this as a birthday gift for my brother and shipping was impressively fast, arrived two days earlier than expected. The packaging was solid, no dented corners or crushed edges, which is honestly rare these days. Book came shrink-wrapped and in pristine condition, so first impressions were great. As for the story itself, it's a decent thriller. The whole secret facility angle is entertaining enough, and Preston keeps things moving at a good clip. That said, some of the science feels pretty far-fetched and I found myself skimming through a few slower sections in the middle. Not a bad read overall, just didn't fully grab me the way I was hoping. My brother seemed to enjoy it more than I did, so maybe it's just me. Three solid stars.
This is a great heater for bedrooms or other small to medium rooms. Shuts off when it reaches the desired temp. The listed temp may not be exact, but you can adjust to your comfort.

My wife and I have already made multiple batches of gummies with this product. I was afraid the dropper to fill them wasn't going to work, however I was very pleased. After letting them sit up they popped right out and were delicious!
Works great. Comfortable and fills up in a matter of minutes.

I really wanted to love these pots. The glass lids fit snugly and the handles stay cool which is great. However, the exterior finish disappoints me. After just a few weeks of normal cooking my gas range left dark scorch marks along the bottom that will not scrub off. They cook food evenly and cleanup inside is fine, but if you care about keeping them looking nice on the outside, maybe look elsewhere.
My puppy loves batting it around to hear the sounds. Older dog, not so much. It does pick up vibration of walking when on the hardwood floors and will make animal sounds when you walk close.
Nice Drogonov fits nicely and very secure even with optics.
I have this sitting in a bucket which I use to circulate clweaner then sanitizer, then water through the three lines on my beer tap system. Quiet and works well.
Shade looked brighter online. Sizing runs a full size small, sadly.

Possibly the worst book I have read this year. Really easy to put down, took me weeks to read it and I would usually finish a good book this length in 3-4 days tops (I have a lot of waiting time to fill so I read while I am waiting to pick people up). SPOILER (perhaps) - I do not enjoy romance books where the hero and heroine end up having sex within the first few pages, especially when it makes no sense at all. I didn't feel any chemistry between them, I didn't think the way it was written in the historical sense was particularly logical either. I really wanted to read the Arcane society novels and I have book two, so I might try that one, but it had better be written WAY better than this one. Was this perhaps one of her first books? I don't know, but I really like JAK usually, just not this one at all!

As many other people have reported, the vinyl is nice and heavy and very white. 9' x 20' is a great size for my studio. I did run into 2 things that I haven't seen mentioned: 1) The roll comes in a plastic bag which is inside a heavy round cardboard shipping tube. The problem was it was so tight in the tube that it took two of us 15 minutes of hard work to get it out! We had to use an empty core tube to push the roll out as it could not be pulled out by pulling on the plastic bag. 2) The cardboard core it's wrapped on is smaller than standard seamless paper cores so it may not fit your backdrop support depending on what you're using. I have one of these 3 roll wall racks and the roll fittings for it are too big to fit into the core of the vinyl roll. So I had to re-roll the vinyl onto a cardboard core from a previous roll of seamless paper.
Got this for my niece's birthday and she absolutely loves it. Perfect fit on her doll. Highly recommend for any AG collector!
Needed this to hook up an old laser printer to my laptop. For eight bucks it does the job flawlessly. No driver issues on Windows 11. Great deal.
Great for small calm dogs, but my lab still drags me everywhere.

I like the yoga sequences in this DVD I find them chanllanging, and invigorating. However, the first 2 sequences "energize" and "tone" are very similar, "tone" just inlcudes a little more standing balance exercies. I like the the third sequence the best, "sweat", which inclues partial headstand and arm balance exercies. The one thing I don't like about this DVD is the music. It sounds like music from a bad 80s action movie.
Way too many superfluous F bombs, but an interesting story and decent actors, lots of sci fi action
Been using this for six months and it still looks brand new. Sturdy build, no scratches or dents. Holds loose tissues perfectly.
I'm very happy with this 4tb drive - I'm using a two year old iMac with Snow Leopard as my Operating System and haven't experienced any glitches or problems.
It is nice bowl and have had a fast shipping!

The textured back gives decent grip so it doesn't slide around on smooth surfaces. My main gripe is the cutout around the charging port, it's too narrow for thicker third-party cables, so I have to take the case off every time I want to charge with anything other than the original Apple cord.

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this thing is way better than I anticipated. I've gone through maybe five or six wine openers over the years and they usually bend or leave cork bits floating in my glass. This one feels solid in your hand, like actual quality metal instead of flimsy junk. The worm goes in smooth without any wobble and pulls the cork out clean every single time. Used it on some older bottles with crumbly corks and had zero issues. The stopper that comes with it was a pleasant surprise too, seals tight and doesn't leak when the bottle's on its side. Honestly wasn't expecting something this nice. Already told my sister to get one.

It is interesting but I elected not to read the entire book. With all that is going on in government today, this book just hits too close to truth. I did read about 5 of the first chapters and the last chapter and decided I was glad I did not read the entire book because even though it is part of a series, it cannot be read as a stand alone. You are left hanging and so really need the next book to find out what happens.

I wasn't expecting much from a freebie, honestly. Most giveaway books feel rushed or half-baked, but this one genuinely surprised me. The chemistry between the leads builds in a way that actually feels earned, not forced. You know how some romance authors just throw characters together and declare them in love? This isn't that. The tension simmers properly, and the small moments, a glance, a brushed hand, carry real weight. It's refreshing to read something that relies on genuine emotional connection instead of jumping straight to the bedroom. Ended up buying two more books from the same author immediately after finishing. If you like your romance with actual substance and zero smut, grab this now.
the beater blade works great... we use this all the time over the stock beater

Binged all four books in a weekend and honestly couldn't put my Kindle down. The character development throughout this series is incredible, you really feel like you know these people by the end. Love Belvin doesn't shy away from the messy stuff either, which makes the emotional payoffs hit so much harder. Fair warning: the first book ends on a cliffhanger that'll have you scrambling to one-click the next one immediately. If you're into contemporary romance with real depth and characters who actually grow over time, this whole series is a no-brainer. I've already told my book club they need to read it, and my sister's downloading it tonight. Highly recommend grabbing all four at once so you're not left hanging between books.
These things need to be wider and stronger. They stretch out to easily and the sowing comes apart on the Velcro after a couple of months.

I've yet to turn to this kit and not find the bit I need to complete a project. It's got what I need and I love that. I also love knowing that if something did go wrong with a piece, Tekton will stand behind their tools from what I've seen.
Been using these for about six months now and they're still going strong. No degradation whatsoever. Handsets hold a charge for days. Definitely worth swapping out the originals.
Kid is happy! I am happy that my child has fallen in love with Scooby.

Arrived two days early in frustration-free packaging. Plugged it in right away and both outlets work perfectly. Feels solid, not cheap or flimsy. The USB ports handle my phone just fine. At this price point, honestly can't complain. Grabbed one for my mom too.
I loved the book and storyline. I encourage you to read it too! I've been very pleased with the selection on the free section! I have found many new authors this way!

Was hesitant to drop this much on sandals but honestly they're worth every penny. The arch support is way better than any cheap pair I've owned before. I've had mine about four months now, wearing them almost daily for errands, yard work, and casual Fridays at the office. No blowouts, no worn-out footbed, still going strong. My feet don't ache after standing all day like they used to with drugstore flip flops. Definitely buying a second pair in another color soon.

Couldn't believe how much punch this thing has for the money. Fills my living room with deep, clean bass that you can feel in your chest. Replaced a unit costing twice as much and honestly can't tell the difference. Fantastic bang for your buck.

I am as surprised as anyone that I enjoyed reading this book. It tweaked my interest from the first page, and it did not diminish throughout the whole book. I have suggested this book to several people, and I know of at least one who is reading it, and also having a difficult time putting it down. I am not necessarily a fan of Mike Tyson, but it does show how easy it is to be caught up in the media frenzy and be used by those one should be able to trust. Mike listened to the wrong people too many times.

Expected way better for the price. The numbers are basically invisible unless you're in bright light, and the dial sticks constantly. Couldn't even get it unlocked at zero to set my own combo. Total junk.

I grabbed this expecting another generic zombie survival romp, maybe some cool action scenes and forgettable characters. What I actually got was a genuinely smart exploration of how different societies handle a global outbreak. The way the author contrasts how a high-tech city versus a rural community with limited resources responds to the same crisis is eye-opening. Normally I skim the worldbuilding stuff in these books, but here I was hooked on every detail about supply chains breaking down and governments fumbling their responses. The characters feel like real people making impossible calls, not just cannon fodder. If you're burned out on the usual apocalyptic tropes and want something that actually makes you think, grab this. Went in skeptical, came away seriously impressed.
Not his best work. The plot felt tired and I figured out the twist way too early. If you're new to this author, maybe start with an earlier book instead. Longtime fans will likely be disappointed.

Wish I had read the reviews more carefully before buying these. My dog normally devours any treat I give her, but she literally turned her nose up and walked away. I tried offering one again the next day and she just sniffed it and left it on the floor. The texture is weird too, kind of crumbly and damp when you break them apart, not dry like you'd expect. They smell off, almost like they went bad or something. Even my neighbor's dog who eats literally everything wouldn't touch them. Ended up throwing most of the bag away. For the price, this is incredibly disappointing. Don't waste your money. I rarely leave bad reviews but this was a total bust for us.

Was hesitant at first because of the low price tag, figured the straps would be flimsy or the rings would feel uncomfortable. Turns out these are an absolute steal. The buckles hold tight with zero slipping, even during aggressive muscle-ups. I've had them mounted to my backyard beam for about two months now, through rain and heat, and there's barely any wear on the strap material. The ring texture gives decent grip without chewing up my palms. Honestly performs just as well as the pricier brands my buddy uses at his gym. If you're curious about ring training but don't want to drop serious cash, just grab these. Can't imagine what paying triple would actually get you beyond a fancy logo.

Picked this up after playing it at a friend's game night and honestly can't stop. The route-building mechanic is super satisfying, watching your train network spread across the map never gets old. What really sold me was how the destination tickets create this constant tension between blocking opponents and finishing your own routes. Components feel sturdy too, those plastic trains take a beating. Easy enough for my ten-year-old to grasp but still competitive for adults. Solid purchase.
Arrived quickly with no dents. Picky eater immediately cleaned the bowl.
I enjoyed this story. I was a little disappointed when it came to an end, but I guess that all good things must come to an end. Perhaps there is another story that pucks up where this one left off.

Got this as a budget replacement for my aging Sony unit and honestly I'm blown away. For seventy bucks the sound quality is way beyond what I expected. The controls are straightforward without a bunch of unnecessary features I'd never use anyway. Volume knob feels solid and the buttons have a nice tactile click to them. Hooked it up in my Tacoma in about twenty minutes using a standard harness adapter, no issues at all. The display is readable in direct sunlight which was a concern of mine. Doesn't have Bluetooth or fancy EQ settings but if you just want clean reliable audio with good power output this gets the job done. Been running it daily for three weeks now with zero complaints. Would buy again without hesitation.
I started giving this to my dog after she had ACL surgery and I think it keeps her in better shape. It's hard to find, so I'm glad Amazon carries it and at a great price.

Honestly, this is just okay. From the photos I was expecting something a bit more heavy-duty, but the material feels thinner and a little flimsier than what I'd hoped for. It does the job, don't get me wrong, I've been using it daily for about three weeks now and it hasn't fallen apart or anything. The size is spot on for what I needed, which I appreciate. But the finish started showing minor wear pretty quickly, and for the price I paid I thought it would hold up a little better. It's not bad enough to return, but I wouldn't say it wowed me either. If you go in with tempered expectations you'll probably be fine. Just don't expect premium quality.

Ordered this on a whim after seeing Andre talk about it somewhere. Shipping was crazy fast, arrived two days earlier than expected in a sturdy mailer with no bent corners or damage at all. Cracked it open the night I got it and ended up reading the first three chapters standing in my kitchen. His voice comes through right away, super genuine and down to earth. I'm already halfway through and just ordered the next one so I don't have a gap between books. Really glad I picked this up.
Bought these as extra containers for my 6 Pack Fitness Renee tote. Easier to meal prep with more.

Got this pajama set for my husband who runs cold at night and he's been living in it since it arrived. The long sleeve shirt is surprisingly soft and doesn't have that stiff feel some thermals get after washing. Pants have a good elastic waistband that actually stays put without digging in. He's 6'1" and around 190, ordered a large and everything hits right where it should, no highwater situation on the legs which is usually the struggle with pajama pants. The fleece lining keeps him warm without making him sweat. For what these cost compared to other brands I've tried, honestly can't beat it. Already ordered a second set in a different color. Would definitely recommend to anyone wanting something cozy that holds up.

These shoes are lightweight yet provide a more dressy look. I can wear them for long periods of time and walk comfortably. I would recommend them for women who are trying to wear more heels but don't want the discomfort of a v-shaped front shoe.

This was a hot short story, but as another reviewer pointed out, I was disappointed it was all a dream. It seemed a little cliche. Still, it was well written. I wish it had been longer. I'd have loved scenes from his pov.

Didn't expect much from a short story but this genuinely surprised me. The author packs more genuine emotion into a few pages than most novels do in 300. The autumn atmosphere feels incredibly real, and the way she balances tender coming-of-age moments with darker undertones just works. Finished it in one sitting and immediately wanted more. Perfect quick read for a chilly October evening. Way beyond what I anticipated for the price.

There are several choices when it comes to cooking utensils: Stainless remains my favorite choice given that it is dishwasher safe, sturdy enough to hold up under force, and thin enough that it can easily get under the cooked product. Silicone, also dishwasher safe, has the advantage of being good for teflon-coated pots and pans but the disadvantage of rarely being tapered sufficiently to get under, say, a sunny-side up egg, without damaging the appearance of the food. Bamboo is a great alternative; though you have to hand wash wood utensils, wood is generally stronger than silicone and can still be used in teflon-coated cookware. The trick, though, is that it has to be cut properly. This set could have used a little more in the finish department. The colored handles are a nice touch, but the half that touches food is rough to the touch, not quite sanded sufficiently, and doesn't come to as thin an edge as is necessary on the spatula tools. Further, the slotted cuts on two of the utensils had left a few bits of little wood splinters that I needed to make sure were thoroughly removed when I first cleaned the items. The wood was also finished with a light outer coating - some type of urethane? - that wasn't smoothly applied. There are areas which lack the coating, and some areas which appear to have blotches and extra coating. So overall, the set is ok, particularly as a lightweight set for a camp or RV stove, but at home you would likely be better served with two or three higher grade utensils than this set.
it is not working. Too bad that I opened it too late so the return due is missed....

I've been using this for about three weeks now on various projects around the house and I'm seriously impressed. Didn't expect much given what I paid, but it's held up to everything I've thrown at it. Built quality feels solid, no weird rattles or loose parts. The grip is comfortable even after extended use, and it hasn't shown any signs of wear yet. Honestly thought self-inflating meant zero effort, but you still need a few breaths to top it off. That said, it's way more comfortable than the foam pad I upgraded from. Packs down surprisingly small for my pack. Not perfect, but definitely worth what I paid.

Picked this up on sale and honestly it's been a mixed bag. The battery lasts forever which I appreciate, and the screen looks decent for the price. Boot up is super fast since it's Chrome OS. But man, I really miss being able to just install regular software. Tried using it for some light work stuff and the web-based alternatives just don't cut it compared to actual desktop apps. Brings back memories, gave it to my girls n the 7 year old liked it.
My kids love building with these. The magnetic pieces are surprisingly strong.

Been using this for about three weeks now and I'm genuinely impressed with how even the heat distribution is. My old kettle had a serious hot spot problem on one side and everything scorched no matter how low I kept the flame. This one doesn't have that issue at all. The copper body conducts heat fast, water boils noticeably quicker and my simmer sauces cook evenly across the whole surface. The handle stays cool which I was skeptical about given the metal construction. Only minor complaint is it does require more polishing than I expected to keep the shine looking good, but that's just the nature of copper and not really a flaw. Feels solid and well-made. Thunderbolt transfers are ridiculously fast compared to Firewire and USB -- 10 gbps -- and are incredibly handy when working on the fly with large files. It's an excellent choice for large video, photo, and audio files. It can be daisychained, too, so you can have multiple adapters setup for one machine (ultimate efficiency and speed!). Unfortunately, no cable is included - so this can become an expensive upgrade pretty quickly. I used this in conjunction with a 3TB Seagate drive, and was very pleased at its utility for backing up and storing files; Thunderbolt's speed is definitely overkill for regular small backups, but is invaluable with huge files and directories. It doesn't require a Seagate hard drive, just any SATA III drive.

These do the job for keeping the drone in the air longer. Having spares makes a big difference outside. The charging block takes forever though, and the connection feels loose on mine. Decent value for what you pay but nothing fancy.

For the money, this little camera does a decent job. I picked it up as a grab-and-go option for family stuff and vacations, and it hasn't disappointed me too much. The HD footage looks fine outdoors in good light, colors are natural and it's sharp enough for casual viewing. Low light is where things get grainy fast, so don't expect miracles indoors at night. The menu system took me a bit to figure out, and the buttons feel a little cheap, but that's par for the course at this price point. Battery life is okay, I get maybe an hour and change of recording before needing a recharge. Overall, you're getting what you pay for. Nothing fancy, but it gets the job done without breaking the bank.

My labrador mix goes through toys like nothing else, so I was skeptical about these. Turns out the squeaker is the real winner here. Most squeaky toys lose their noise after a day or two, but these have lasted almost three weeks and still make plenty of sound. The felt covering is way more durable than actual tennis balls too, no bald spots or tearing yet. My dog carries one around the house constantly and even sleeps with it. I bought the pack of six and honestly could've just gotten two because they last so long. They bounce really unpredictably which drives my dog crazy in the best way. Only complaint is they pick up dirt outside pretty fast, but a quick rinse fixes that. Will definitely reorder.

** spoiler alert ** I liked the first Jack Reacher book but Die Trying was a mess. ***Warning Spoilers***. Very little worked for me in this book. A kidnapped FBI agent keeps escaping from an escape proof room and they keep just putting her back in it. What?!? Reacher keeps escaping, keeps getting caught and the bad guys still don't kill him. Ok, that's a thriller trope, I can live with that, but it's pretty extreme in here.. None of the FBI agents behave like you would expect an FBI agent to. We can't send in the military, 8 Marines aren't enough against a 100 militia wackos so lets sneak in 3 FBI agents wearing suits. Really? Child leaves open loops about mass suicide and women wanting to escape the compound. Finally, it's a.50 caliber, not half inch. Militia members would know that so Child comes off sounding like a neophyte.

I've not yet taken the unit out on the road and subjected it to the vibration of highway travel, so the jury is still out on this subject. As usual with my Amazon orders, the acquisition was virtually painless and packaging from the vendor was compact, effective, and prompt. I bought these on a recommendation from a buddy at the shop and honestly can't believe I waited this long. The grip strength is unreal, once they bite onto something, it's not slipping. I've yanked off some seriously stubborn coolant hoses and rusted clamps without any rounding or slipping. The build quality feels bulletproof, and the hinge is still smooth after months of daily use. Yeah, the price stings compared to standard channel locks, but you're getting what you pay for here. I'd absolutely recommend these to any mechanic, especially guys doing older car restorations where everything is seized up. DIYers who only change oil occasionally might not need something this heavy-duty, but if you turn wrenches for a living, just get them.

I bought this for my daughter, who is eight years old and interested in robotics. It took about an hour for her to put it together, and she was so proud of her robot when she was done. I liked that it was easy enough for her to build by herself, though she did need a bit of adult assistance to tighten some of the screws. The robot is very cute and it works perfectly. Not home theater quality obviously but for the price and size, you're getting a great little unit. Four stars easy.

the rule is one inch of fish per gallon of water. i keep 25-30 goldies in a 9 gallon, skim the water daily, I use this sponge filter (don't rinse it in the faucet b/c the chlorine level is 1ppm and will kill the bacterial colony living in the Sponge; rinse it in dechlorinated water). I have a fluval C2 5 stage filter, a 240gal/hr water circulator (fish don't live in stagnant water in the wild), and i use "Prime" water conditioner by Seachem. Also my gravel is colonized (Eco-Complete)- black color. Add few fake plants and some decorum. I feed Drs Foster and Smith goldies flakes twice a day, and i make a seafood buffet of shrimp-clams-crab-salmon from the canned seafood department, and feed it twice daily also (one can of each, drained, finely chopped and mixed will last 3 months, so freeze it), alternate with the flakes. In the wild these fish are prey animals (not predators) and they spend the whole day looking for food. It's a lot easier to do than to write up a review, so give it a go and personalize your tank.

One cannot ask for a better product than this exercise pen. Although I did not purchase this playpen for a puppy, it served its purpose exceptionally well for a mother cat and her five newborn kittens. The purpose was to keep them isolated from my other cats while they were being cared for by momma and so that they could not wonder off and become lost prior to their eyes opening. This playpen is built strong and durable, with two zippered opening on the side. The netting on each opening can be rolled up and vecroed into place. The entire top can be zippered off and on, providing easy access to reach your puppy or kittens/cats. Two sturdy pouches on the side is available for grooming products and accessories. There is also two net pockets. One of the nicest attributes of this playpen is; it can be folded and broken down quickly and stored in the storage pouch that comes with it. Portable and easily moved by two people, even when erected. Durable enough to be placed outside to allow your pets to get that fresh air environment. I highly recommend this product if you're looking for something to assist in isolating your pets during their younger days. For the price, you will not be disappointed.
Used this bag daily for six months now, still looks brand new.

Wow are these small - they're both more narrow than expected, a shorter shoe and a narrow toe box. Not at all like a croc. More like a Naturalizer slide. I ordered a size larger than My mother normally wears but even with that she still can't fit a thin-ish stretch cotton sock into the shoe. The entire top is one giant elastic cocoon - puts quite a bit of pressure on your foot. Unsure if she can even wear them. It's not looking promising. It's not like any croc I've ever worn or bought and I have all sorts and styles.

Got about a third of the way through before I gave up. The premise sounded interesting enough when I read the description, but the execution just fell flat for me. Characters would make decisions that didn't feel earned, and the dialogue felt stiff and unnatural, like nobody actually talks that way. Every time the story started building momentum it would stall out with long descriptive passages that added nothing. I kept pushing through thinking it would pick up, but it never really did. Not the worst thing I've downloaded, but there are much better options in this genre. Glad I got it on a deal rather than paying full price.
I enjoyed receiving this book in the mail. It came in good shape and will be a nice addition to my collection.

The box arrived looking like it had been kicked down a flight of stairs. Both corners were crushed and the tape was barely holding on. Surprisingly the headphones inside were intact, but the carrying case had a crack in it. Not a great start. I plugged them in expecting decent sound for the price, but honestly my old Sonys sound warmer and clearer. The build feels plasticky and cheap, not what I'd call premium. The ear pads are okay but nothing special. They do cancel some noise, just not as much as I'd hoped. For what these cost, I expected better packaging and better audio out of the gate. Returning them this weekend. Two stars because at least they powered on.

I heard about this from CNET and a few other places. Thought for $20 had to try it out. Hooked it up to some small JBL bookshelf speakers I had at home and plugged in my android phone. While not audiophile quality (due mostly to the mp3 files i guess), the sound was fantastic. Highly recommend this.

It was so nice to see this book & others now available on Kindle. Helen Macinnes always has a good, solid plot & engaging characters. She also gives enough of history, so the reader understands the broader context, in this case, as in many of her books, WWII. Helen, I think, wants the reader to understand all the ramifications for choices for good or evil, and that true evil really does exist. Her heroes, thankfully, are always the good guys, which makes for an entertaining, as well as educational, read.

I think it's a nice little rattle that my 4 months old daughter plays with for few mins each day. It lights up and the lights change colors everytime you tap it so it captures the baby's attention. my daughter loves trying to put the face part into her mouth but since she cant, she settles with just sucking on the ears. She also tries tosuck on the middle part but she cant get to it.. its not long enough and with the two bulky ends, it just doesnt fit her face. When I was buying, I thought it would be a good teething toy also but that didn't work out too well. There is also a mirror on the bottom that my daughter looks at for few mins but why look at the small mirror when you have a color changing face! Its a cool toy that does what it says it does but at the end of the day, it is regular toy- a rattle, that I am not sure I would pay $20 for. She is just as entertained playing with her $2 rattle, then going out of town on her link of rings as her teething toy!
I have had a handful of kneepads over the years and these are well made

Honestly didn't expect much for the price but this exceeded my expectations by a mile. The quality is way better than those flimsy novelty cups you see everywhere. Print hasn't faded after a bunch of dishwasher cycles and it's got some real weight to it. Bought it as a gag gift for my sister but now I kinda want one for myself.

Bought this for my daughter two years ago when she was five, and it's still going strong. The binding has held up to countless bedtime reads and the pages haven't torn despite her flipping through it on her own constantly. The story itself is fantastic, keeps her engaged every single time without spooking her. Nice to have a book that survives actual kid handling. Worth every penny and then some.

This item has one function, and doesn't hold up to that function. The sides of the ball don't close tight enough to prevent little particles of tea getting into your water. Don't buy it, get something else.

I'm an old shaky-hand gentleman who had absolutely no problem replacing my headband cushion on my QC-15. Bose offers no replacement at all, so, I chose this to try. I watched their link to a video, noted all cautions and replaced in less than 15 minutes. I was worried an after-market product might cause it to not fit into the case. No fear was needed; it fit perfectly. Fit my head perfectly. I now have a like-new QC-15.

I've been an Anne Rice fan for years so I picked this up expecting her signature lush prose with an erotic twist. The writing is definitely atmospheric and the world she builds around the BDSM club feels rich and authentic. That said, the pacing drags in the middle and the plot gets repetitive after the first few chapters. There's a lot more dialogue about power dynamics than actual scenes playing out, which left me wanting more. I'd recommend this to readers who enjoy slow-burn gothic romance and don't mind that the kink elements stay fairly tame. If you're looking for something truly explicit or fast-paced, this probably isn't it. Three stars because the prose is gorgeous but the story itself didn't fully grab me.

Arrived quickly and packaging was fine, nothing damaged. Out of the box these looked decent quality and I was optimistic. Two of my three cats batted them around the first evening but lost interest by day two. Not terrible for the price, just don't expect long-term entertainment.
Fit a little tight but I think theyll break in nicely
Bought to do some school work and crafts on my bed or couch. Works perfect and very easy to clean!!!!

I used this canner for the first time today and was very happy with how easy it was to set up, process and clean. The temperature gauge on top is really helpful. Being so inexperienced I don't think I would want to chance it, and not give the canner enough time to do it's job. I am looking forward to doing much more in the future!
